ブイティーケー・イノグループ社  (VTKイノグループ)

bio.en: Jeyran Hezaveh is Co-Founder and CEO of AVAtronics SA, a Swiss deeptech company developing Edge-AI audio and noise-cancellation technologies. With 30 years of experience, she works at the intersection of innovation, engineering, and business, transforming advanced research into real-world solutions. Her experience spans several industries, including consumer electronics, semiconductors, and telecommunications. She brings a Swiss perspective on how companies can use AI to improve products, strengthen competitiveness, and create meaningful value for industry and society.
bio.jp: coming soon

name.jp: ファシリティジャポン株式会社
イエロースキャンジャパン株式会社
カルドゥメン・キャピタル

company.en: Counsellor - Digital, Technology and Life Sciences Investment, Japan
company.jp: Counsellor - Digital, Technology and Life Sciences Investment, Japan
インパクト・キャピタル株式会社
根津アジアキャピタルリミテッド
エミネントグループ株式会社

bio.en: Andrew Maywah is a Silicon Valley–based venture capital investor and strategic advisor focused on deep technology and cross-border innovation. He is the Managing Partner of Pacific Summit Ventures and co-founder of TDK Ventures, where he helped build a $500 million global investment platform connecting startups with Japanese industry leaders. Andrew advises Japanese corporate enterprises, CVC teams, and startups on globalinvestment strategy, innovation, growth, and overseas expansion. With experience spanning venture capital, private equity, and corporate partnerships, he is passionate about helping Japanese organizations engage with global innovation ecosystems and scale internationally. Andrew holds an MBA from The Wharton School at the University of Pennsylvania and bachelors and master’s degrees in engineering from MIT.
bio.jp: Andrew氏は、シリコンバレーを拠点とするベンチャーキャピタル投資家であり、ディープテックおよびクロスボーダー・イノベーション分野における戦略アドバイザー。Pacific Summit Venturesのマネージング・パートナーを務めるほか、TDK Venturesの共同創業者として、日本の産業界とスタートアップをつなぐ総額5億ドル規模のグローバル投資プラットフォームの構築に携わる。日本の大企業、CVCチーム、スタートアップに対し、グローバル投資戦略、イノベーション創出、成長戦略、海外展開に関する助言を行う。ベンチャーキャピタル、プライベートエクイティ、コーポレートパートナーシップにわたる豊富な経験を有し、日本企業がグローバルなイノベーション・エコシステムと連携し、国際的に事業を拡大する支援に注力。ペンシルベニア大学ウォートン校にてMBAを取得し、MITにて工学の学士号および修士号を修了。

bio.en: Hayata is a Vice President and Japan Lead at Fin Capital, responsible for investment sourcing and strategic partnerships with LPs and institutional partners across Japan and APAC. Prior to Fin Capital, he headed Business Development at LUCA Japan, focusing on expanding access to alternative investments through institutional and private wealth channels.Earlier in his career, Hayata worked at Deutsche Asset Management (DWS) in Tokyo, covering institutional clients across both traditional and alternative asset classes. He also held roles at Merrill Lynch and UBS in Tokyo and Hong Kong, and spent several years at a Hong Kong–based hedge fund focused on trading across multiple asset classes.He holds an MBA from IE Business School and a BA in Policy Management from Keio University.
bio.jp: UBS証券及びメリルリンチ日本証券（現BofA証券）を経て、香港拠点ヘッジファンドでトレーディングに従事。帰国後、ドイチェ・アセット・マネジメント（DWS）にて伝統資産及びオルタナティブ資産の機関投資家カバレッジを担当。その後LUCA Japanで事業開発責任者としてオルタナティブ投資のアクセス拡大を推進。現在Fin Capitalにて日本及びアジアの投資ソーシングとLP及び事業会社との戦略的パートナーシップをリード。IE Business School MBA、慶應義塾大学総合政策学部卒。

bio.en: Holly Wu – Vice President of M&A at Mercedes-Benz Corporate Investment LLC and Mercedes-Benz Financial Services Investment Company LLC - Responsible for M&A, Venture, and Partnerships. Her team is committed to propelling Mercedes-Benz’s electrification, AI and robotics strategy through strategic technology investments, acquisitions, and partnerships. Holly's extensive background prior to joining Mercedes-Benz includes investment banking / M&A, venture capital, and startup experience.
bio.jp: Holly氏は、Mercedes‑Benz Corporate Investment LLCおよびMercedes‑Benz Financial Services Investment Company LLCにおいてM&Aバイスプレジデントを務め、M&A、ベンチャー投資、パートナーシップを統括する。戦略的なテクノロジー投資、買収、提携を通じて、メルセデス・ベンツの電動化、AI、ロボティクス戦略を推進。メルセデス・ベンツ入社以前は、投資銀行／M&A、ベンチャーキャピタル、スタートアップ分野における豊富な実務経験を有する。

bio.en: Jerry Yang is General Partner at HCVC, a Paris-based VC firm with offices in SF and London, managing 110M€+ of early-stage VC funds and focusing on deeptech startups. Prior to HCVC, Jerry spent the first 12 years of his career in semiconductor both as an engineer and entrepreneur, across Taiwan, Silicon Valley and France. He led HCVC into investments in Giraffe360, Navier, Eva AI and AIM Solutions. A polyglot fluent in 5 languages, Jerry obtained his B.S. and M.S. degrees from National Taiwan University and MBA degree from HEC Paris.
bio.jp: Jerry氏は、パリを拠点とし、サンフランシスコおよびロンドンにオフィスを構えるベンチャーキャピタルHCVCのジェネラル・パートナー。総額1億1,000万ユーロ超のアーリーステージ向けファンドを運用し、ディープテックスタートアップへの投資に注力する。HCVC参画以前は、台湾、シリコンバレー、フランスにおいて、エンジニアおよび起業家として半導体業界で12年以上のキャリアを重ねる。HCVCでは、Giraffe360、Navier、Eva AI、AIM Solutionsなどへの投資を主導。5か国語を操るポリグロットであり、国立台湾大学にて学士号および修士号を取得、HEC ParisにてMBAを修了。

bio.en: After working for a consulting firm and a securities company, he participated in the launch of Treasure Data's Japan business in 2013. As Marketing Director, he is in charge of everything from PR to project development for the customer data platform in the digital marketing field, which is Treasure Data's flagship service. He supports data collaboration in the marketing domain that connects the value chain from financial institutions and consumer goods manufacturers to major media outlets and retailers.In August 2021, he founded Carbide Ventures with the founding members of Treasure Data and others. With offices in Silicon Valley and Tokyo, he is a partner in a venture capital firm that invests in enterprise SaaS and other startups, mainly in Japan and the United States.
bio.jp: コンサルティング会社および証券会社を経て、2013年にTreasure Dataの日本事業立ち上げに参画。マーケティングディレクターとして、同社の主力サービスであるデジタルマーケティング領域のカスタマーデータプラットフォームにおいて、PRから顧客向けプロジェクトの企画・推進までを統括。金融機関、消費財メーカー、大手メディア、流通企業をつなぐマーケティング領域におけるデータ連携を支援。2021年8月、Treasure Dataの創業メンバーらとともにCarbide Venturesを設立。シリコンバレーおよび東京に拠点を構えるベンチャーキャピタルのパートナーとして、日本および米国を中心に、エンタープライズSaaSをはじめとするスタートアップへの投資に従事。

bio.en: Oscar Moralez is the Founder and Managing Partner of Boomerang Ventures, an early-stage venture capital firm and venture studio based in Indianapolis, located in the Midwest United States, and focused on the “Connected Future of Healthcare”. He invests in AI- and tech-enabled solutions addressing global healthcare challenges—driven by an aging population, rising polychronic disease, increased mental health needs, and a growing shortage of healthcare professionals. With over two decades of experience in healthcare and venture capital, Oscar brings deep operational insight and a global perspective to the companies he supports. He previously founded BioStorage Technologies, a life sciences company acquired in 2015 by Brooks Life Sciences, now Azenta Life Sciences.
bio.jp: Oscar氏は、米国中西部インディアナポリスを拠点とするアーリーステージのベンチャーキャピタルおよびベンチャースタジオ、Boomerang Venturesの創業者兼マネージング・パートナー。「Connected Future of Healthcare」をテーマに、AIやテクノロジーを活用したヘルスケア分野のスタートアップへの投資に注力する。高齢化の進展、複数慢性疾患の増加、メンタルヘルス需要の拡大、医療人材不足といったグローバルな医療課題に対応するソリューションを支援。ヘルスケアおよびベンチャーキャピタル分野で20年以上の経験を有し、投資先企業に対して深い事業運営の知見とグローバルな視点を提供。過去にはライフサイエンス企業BioStorage Technologiesを創業し、2015年にBrooks Life Sciences（現 Azenta Life Sciences）により買収される。

bio.en: Philipp Moehring is a Berlin‑based technology investor with a focus on the earliest stages of ambitious and technically challenging startups. In 2017, he co‑founded the Tiny Supercomputer Investment Company, which backs a wide range of founders across Europe.He is particularly interested in technologies and ideas that will matter five years from now, and enjoys debating different versions of the future. This perspective has led him to back several highly successful founders early in their journey, while also helping others navigate the ups and downs of being a founder.
bio.jp: Philipp氏は、ベルリンを拠点とするテクノロジー投資家であり、技術的難易度が高く、志の高いスタートアップのシード段階への投資に注力する。2017年には、Tiny Supercomputer Investment Companyを共同創業し、欧州各地の起業家を幅広く支援してきた。今後5年で重要となる技術やアイデアへの関心を持ち、将来の社会や産業の在り方について議論を重ねている。その視点を生かし、創業初期から有望な創業者を支援するとともに、起業に伴う試練や成長過程においても伴走してきた。

bio.en: Yumiko is a business development professional at HiJoJo Partners, focusing on private market solutions and global investor access.She previously served as a Manager at Antler, where she supported over 250 founders from ideation to investment and contributed to pre-seed investments. She later worked on corporate innovation initiatives, bridging startups, corporates, and global ecosystems.Her experience focuses on connecting global capital and innovation across sectors. She is passionate about building cross-border ecosystems and enabling new forms of growth through venture collaboration.
bio.jp: Yumiko氏は、HiJoJo Partnersにて事業開発を担当し、プライベートマーケット領域におけるソリューション提供およびグローバル投資家へのアクセス創出に注力する。以前はAntlerにてマネージャーを務め、アイデア創出から投資実行に至るまで250名超の創業者を支援し、プレシード投資にも関与。その後、スタートアップ、大企業、グローバル・エコシステムをつなぐコーポレートイノベーション施策に従事。グローバル資本とイノベーションを分野横断で結びつけることを専門とし、クロスボーダーなエコシステム構築およびベンチャー連携を通じた新たな成長創出に注力している。

bio.en: Dr. Khedro is a Senior Vice President and Managing Director at Evolver with over 25-year experience of driving technology strategy and innovation with track record in leading organizations to realize the value of technology, digital and artificial intelligence transformation and deal with disruption. Dr. Khedro is an architect and strategist with the ability to combine technology depth, business insights, and organizational appreciation to engage clients and put forward practical and innovative solutions delivering value. He has led large-scale technology / digital consulting transformation programs. In his different roles, he has built and led technology and consulting businesses exceeding $100M in revenue.Dr. Khedro has held senior positions including partner, director, and CTO with leading organizations including Ernst & Young, PwC, Atos Origin, Verizon, Bechtel, and others. Taha has acted as an advisor to senior executives and government leaders in the Middle East. He is a holder of two US patents and has published more than 29 articles on various technology and artificial intelligence topics. Taha received his PhD from Stanford University in Computer Science / Artificial Intelligence.
bio.jp: Evolverのシニア・バイスプレジデント兼マネージング・ディレクターであり、25年以上にわたりテクノロジー戦略およびイノベーションを牽引してきた実績を有する。テクノロジー、デジタル、AI変革を通じて組織の価値創出を実現し、ディスラプションに対応してきた経験を持つ。技術的専門性、ビジネス視点、組織理解を融合させるアーキテクト兼ストラテジストとして、実践的かつ革新的なソリューションを提示。大規模なテクノロジー／デジタル変革コンサルティング・プログラムを多数主導し、これまでに年間売上1億ドル超のテクノロジーおよびコンサルティング事業の構築・運営を担う。Ernst & Young、PwC、Atos Origin、Verizon、Bechtelなどの大手組織において、パートナー、ディレクター、CTOなどを歴任。中東地域において、企業の経営層および政府首脳に対するアドバイザーも務める。米国特許を2件保有し、テクノロジーおよび人工知能分野に関する論文・記事を29本以上発表。スタンフォード大学にてコンピュータサイエンス／人工知能分野の博士号（PhD）を取得。

company.jp: チューリング株式会社

role.jp: 創業者 / 代表取締役CEO

bio.en: FOUNDER, CEO of Turing, the company with the mission of “We Overtake Tesla.” Spent 10 years developing the computer shogi program Ponanza, achieving the milestone of defeating a professional master. After graduating from the University of Tokyo Graduate School, he joined HEROZ Inc., where he served as a lead engineer and supported the company through its IPO. He has given numerous talks, both in Japan and internationally, and has appeared on the TV program Jounetsu Tairiku. He concurrently serves as a Specially Appointed Professor at Aichi Gakuin University.
bio.jp: 創業者 / 代表取締役CEO。愛知県出身。東京大学での留年をきっかけにプログラミングを勉強し始める。その後10年間コンピュータ将棋プログラムPonanzaを開発、佐藤名人(当時)を倒す。東京大学大学院卒業後、HEROZ株式会社に入社、その後リードエンジニアとして上場まで助力した。2021年8月、チューリング株式会社を創業し、代表取締役CEOに就任。海外を含む多数の講演を実施。情熱大陸出演。現在、愛知学院大学特任教授も兼任。

company.jp: 株式会社フジテレビジョン

bio.en: Koki Adake graduated from the university of Tokyo with master’s degree of engineering and joined Fuji Television as an announcer in 2017. He has established his career primarily in the field of news broadcasting. During the astronaut selection process conducted by JAXA between 2022 and 2023, he advanced to the final group of ten candidates, though was not ultimately selected. He subsequently delivered the first  broadcast reporting the appointments of Astronauts Makoto Suwa and Ayu Yoneda on his program. His long-term aspiration is to contribute to humanity’s exploration of space by delivering live television broadcasts from Mars.
bio.jp: フジテレビアナウンサーとして、報道番組を中心に活躍。2022年から2023年にかけて行われたJAXAの宇宙飛行士選抜試験でファイナリストの10人まで残るも、惜しくも落選。諏訪理（すわ まこと)飛行士と米田あゆ飛行士の合格ニュースの第一報を自身が担当する番組内で伝えた。東京大学大学院工学系研究科修了、2017年フジテレビ入社。将来の夢は、火星からのテレビ中継。

bio.en: Shota Aizawa began his career at Panasonic Corporation in accounting and later spent nearly 10 years at Johnson & Johnson in FP&A, serving as Finance Controller for multiple business units. He joined his current company in February 2025 as Head of Corporate Administration, overseeing all corporate functions, and was appointed Director and CFO in November 2025. He also led the company’s JPY 4.4 billion Series C financing from Insight Partners.
bio.jp: 新卒でパナソニック株式会社に入社し、経理業務に従事。その後、ジョンソン・エンド・ジョンソン株式会社で約10年間、FP&A職に従事し、複数事業部におけるファイナンス責任者を務める。2025年2月より現職に参画し、管理本部長として管理部門全般を統括。2025年11月より取締役CFO。Insight Partnersからの44億円のシリーズC資金調達を主導。

role.en: Deputy Director General for Strategic Public Relations and Media

bio.en: Joined the Tokyo Metropolitan Government (TMG) in 1995. Engaged in a wide range of administrative fields, including planning, personnel, and public relations (PR) at the Bureaus of Industrial and Labor Affairs, Taxation, General Affairs, and the Office of the Governor for Policy Planning. In April 2022, when the Office of the Governor for Policy Planning launched the Strategic Public Relations Division to spearhead TMG’s PR efforts, she was named its first Senior Director. Serving at the top PR post of Deputy Director General for Strategic Public Relations and Media from April 2024.Committed to “delivering policies to every Tokyoite,” she promotes strategic PR initiatives leveraging AI and other latest trends. Also devoted to women’s empowerment as a female executive.
bio.jp: １９９５年、東京都に入都。産業労働局、主税局、総務局、政策企画局など、様々な行政分野において、企画、人事、広報をはじめ、幅広い業務に従事。２０２２年４月、広報力をより一層強化するため、都の広報の司令塔として政策企画局戦略広報部が新設、初代・戦略広報部長に就任。２０２４年４月から、広報のトップである戦略広報調整監。「政策を一人ひとりの都民に届ける」ため、AI等、最新の広報トレンドを踏まえた戦略的な広報を推進。また、女性管理職として、女性活躍の推進にも積極的に取り組む。

bio.en: Professor, Interfaculty Initiative in Information Studies, the University of TokyoNoboru Koshizuka is a Professor of Interfaculty Initiative in Information Studies, the University of Tokyo, Japan.  He was born in Tokyo, Japan in 1966.  He received the B.S., M. S. and D. S. degrees in information science in 1989, 1991, and 1994 from the University of Tokyo, Japan.Since 1990, he has been researching ubiquitous computing, IoT (Internet of Things), embedded systems, human-computer interactions, and computer networks.  Currently, his main research interests are AI, IoT, smart city, smart building, data distribution platforms, blockchain, operating systems, and computer networks.  He is a director of Data Society Alliance, and a member of Digital Society Initiative Council of Digital Agency.
bio.jp: 東京大学大学院 情報学環 教授1966年生まれ。1994年、東京大学大学院 理学系研究科 情報科学専攻 博士課程修了、博士（理学）。東工大助手、東大助教授・准教授を経て、2009年より現職。一般社団法人データ社会推進協議会会長、一般社団法人スマートシティ社会実装コンソーシアム理事長、JEITA Green x Digitalコンソーシアム座長、気象ビジネス推進コンソーシアム会長など、さまざまな領域の研究に携わっている。コンピューターサイエンスを軸に、近年はAI、IoTやデータ基盤、スマートシティなどの研究に取り組んでいる。

company.en: TOKYU FUDOSAN HOLDINGS CORPORATION　Sustainability Promotion Department
company.jp: 東急不動産ホールディングス株式会社　グループサステナビリティ推進部　事業支援グループ

bio.en: Joined Tokyu Land Corporation; since 2010 has led a wide range of initiatives, including formulating group-wide sustainability strategies, advancing environmental initiatives, and responding to ESG ratings and assessments. Since 2013, has concurrently served at Tokyu Fudosan Holdings Corporation.Master’s program in Urban Engineering, Graduate School (The University of Tokyo).Registered First-Class Architect (Japan); Adjunct University Lecturer; member of Ministry of the Environment (Japan) committees, among others.
bio.jp: 東急不動産入社後、2010 年よりグループ全体のサステナビリティ戦略策定、環境取り組み、ESG 評価対応など幅広い業務を推進。2013年より東急不動産ホールディングス兼任。東京大学大学院　都市工学専攻　修士課程一級建築士/大学特別講師/環境省委員など

bio.en: Haruka Mikami is the CEO and Co-founder of JINGS Inc., a Tokyo-based AI solutions company specializing in digital transformation for the manufacturing industry. Founded in April 2024 as a startup from the University of Tokyo Matsuo Laboratory, JINGS develops RAG and LLM-based AI systems to preserve and transfer the tacit knowledge of skilled engineers — protecting the quality of Made-in-Japan manufacturing. By digitizing frontline expertise and enabling AI-driven decision support, JINGS empowers manufacturers to maintain their competitive edge in an era of workforce transition.
bio.jp: 製造業のDX推進に特化したAIソリューション企業・株式会社JINGSの代表取締役兼創業者。東京大学松尾研究室発スタートアップとして2024年4月に創業。「メイド・イン・ジャパンの品質を守る」をミッションに掲げ、熟練技術者の現場ノウハウや暗黙知をAIで継承・可視化するシステムを開発。LLMを基盤とした技術知識継承・AI判断支援ソリューションを大手製造業へ提供し、現場の競争力維持とデジタル変革を牽引している。

bio.en: Hidetoshi Tojo is President and Representative Executive Officer of Anthropic Japan G.K., the Japan subsidiary of frontier AI company Anthropic. In October 2025, he established Anthropic's first Asia-Pacific office in Tokyo, and oversees business strategy, enterprise sales, partnerships and alliances, government and policy engagement, and organization building across the Japan market. Previously, he served as Founding Country Manager of Snowflake Japan, where he built the operation from scratch to over 200 employees and more than 1,000 enterprise customers in six years. Before Snowflake, he spent approximately 20 years at Google Cloud Japan and Microsoft (both U.S. headquarters and Japan) in business development and sales across cloud and data. He holds an MBA from the University of Washington.
bio.jp: フロンティアAI企業Anthropicの日本法人であるAnthropic Japan合同会社の代表執行役員社長。2025年10月、Anthropicにとってアジア太平洋地域初の拠点となる東京オフィスを立ち上げ、日本市場における事業戦略、エンタープライズ営業、パートナーシップとアライアンス、政策渉外、組織構築を統括する。前職ではSnowflake Japanの初代カントリーマネージャーとして、ゼロから200名超の組織と1,000社以上の顧客基盤を6年間で構築。それ以前はGoogle Cloud Japan、Microsoft（米国本社および日本）にて、クラウド・データ領域の事業開発・営業に約20年間従事。ワシントン大学MBA。

bio.en: Founding Partner, MPower Partners Fund.  Miwa is a former Japanese growth equity portfolio manager with Clay Finlay, and she previously worked in investment banking for Morgan Stanley. She has translated over 50 business/entrepreneurship publications, and taught at Kyorin University. Miwa earned an MBA from Harvard Business School and a BA from Keio University. She serves as a board member of Orix Corporation and Daiwa House Industries. She also serves on a board of Fast Retailing Foundation as well as Asia University For Women Support Foundation
bio.jp: MPower Partners Fund L.P.ゼネラル・パートナー／翻訳家。ORIX株式会社、大和ハウス工業株式会社社外取締役。ヘラルボニー社外取締役。アジア女子大学（バングラデシュ）支援財団理事。柳井正財団理事。一般財団法人ファーストリテイリング財団理事、一般社団法人LEDGE理事など。ハーバード大学経営大学院でMBA取得。モルガン・スタンレー投資銀行部門を経てクレイ・フィンレイ投資顧問元東京支店長。2009年より翻訳を始め、大ベストセラーとなった『FACTFULNESS（ファクトフルネス）』など、話題の洋書を数多く手がける。2021年5月、キャシー松井氏、村上由美子氏とともに日本初のESG重視型グローバル・ベンチャー・キャピタル・ファンド「エムパワー・パートナーズ・ファンド」を創業

bio.en: Born in 1979. Graduated from the Faculty of Law at Keio University.He has produced acclaimed TV dramas such as the BORDER series and dele, winning the Excellence Award at the Tokyo Drama Awards twice and the Galaxy Award three times. In France, dele received the Grand Prix at Cannes.His film Monster won both the Best Screenplay Award and the Queer Palm at the Cannes Film Festival. Godzilla Minus One became the highest-grossing Japanese film in North American box office history and won the Academy Award for Best Visual Effects—the first ever for a Japanese film.In the same year, he personally received two Elan d’or Awards and the Fujimoto Prize for Monster and Godzilla Minus One. In 2024, he was selected as an official member of the Producers Guild of America (PGA).In 2025, he went independent and became CEO of Tyken Inc. His latest projects as planner/producer include 1ST KISS (box office: ¥2.88 billion) and Exit 8 (box office: ¥5.17 billion), both major hits.Starting in 2026, he serves as a Professor in the MFA program at Nihon University College of Art.
bio.jp: 1979年生まれ。慶應義塾大学法学部卒。ドラマ「BORDER」シリーズ、「dele」などを手掛け、東京ドラマアワード優秀賞を2度、ギャラクシー賞を3度受賞。また、仏カンヌでは「dele」でグランプリを受賞。映画「怪物」でカンヌ国際映画祭脚本賞、クィアパルム賞の2冠。「ゴジラ-1.0」では北米の邦画興行収入歴代1位を記録し、史上初のアカデミー賞視覚効果賞を受賞。同年、個人として「怪物」「ゴジラ-1.0」で2つのエランドール賞と藤本賞を受賞。2024年よりPGA（Producers Guild of America）の正式会員に選出。2025年に独立しTyken Inc.のCEOに就任。最新の企画・プロデュース作『ファーストキス 1ST KISS』が興収28.8億、『８番出口』が興収51.7億のヒットなった。2026年より日藝MFA（日本大学大学院芸術学研究科）の特任教授に就任。

company.jp: 株式会社スペースデータ

role.jp: 産業共創事業本部　宇宙利用促進　ディレクター

bio.en: Aki Takei graduated from the University of Tokyo and began her career at Japan’s Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry, working on policy. She later moved into the space and tech sector, focusing on digital twins and business development. Leveraging cross-sector experience, she is also active as an influencer and media personality, gaining wider recognition through The Bachelorette Japan Season 3.
bio.jp: 武井亜樹は、東京大学航空宇宙工学科卒業後、経済産業省にて人材政策、女性活躍政策の立案に従事。その後、宇宙・テクノロジー分野に転身し、デジタルツインや宇宙関連ビジネスの発信・事業開発に携わる。政府・産業・メディアを横断する経験を活かし、現在はインフルエンサーとしても活動。Amazon Primeの『バチェロレッテ3』出演を機に、自身の生き方や価値観を発信している。

role.en: Director, Asia Pacific Pillar Office in Tokyo
role.jp: Director, Asia Pacific Pillar Office in Tokyo

bio.en: Saul Guerrero Oteyza is the Director of UNICEF’s Asia-Pacific Pillar Office in Tokyo, where he leads the organization’s public partnerships with the governments of Japan, the Republic of Korea, Australia, and New Zealand. Prior to this role, he served as UNICEF’s Senior Adviser for Financing for Child Nutrition and Development and founded the Child Nutrition Fund (CNF). Over the past 25 years, Saul has worked extensively with UN agencies, NGOs, and national governments to expand effective services for children. He has led the design, implementation, and evaluation of life-saving programmes in more than 25 countries across Africa, Asia, and Latin America.
bio.jp: ソール・ゲレーロ・オテイサは、東京に所在するユニセフ（UNICEF）アジア太平洋ピラーオフィスのディレクターであり、日本、大韓民国、オーストラリア、ニュージーランド各国政府との公共パートナーシップを統括している。この職務に就く以前は、子どもの栄養および発達分野における資金調達を担当するユニセフの上級顧問を務め、Child Nutrition Fund（CNF）を創設した。過去25年以上にわたり、国連機関、NGO、ならびに各国政府と密接に連携し、子ども向けの効果的なサービスの拡充に取り組んできた。また、アフリカ、アジア、ラテンアメリカの25か国以上において、人命を救うプログラムの設計、実施、評価を主導してきた。

bio.en: Catherine Russell serves as UNICEF’s 8th Executive Director, overseeing the organization’s work for children in over 190 countries and territories. Ms. Russell brings to the role decades of experience in public service, with a focus on empowering underserved communities around the world and developing high-impact policies and programmes to support women and girls, including in humanitarian crises. She has extensive experience building and managing diverse workforces, as well as mobilizing resources and political support for a broad range of initiatives. From 2020 to 2022, Ms. Russell served Assistant to the President and Director of the White House Office of Presidential Personnel. She previously served from 2013 to 2017 as Ambassador-at-Large for Global Women’s Issues at the U.S. Department of State, where she integrated women’s issues across all elements of U.S. foreign policy, represented the United States in more than 45 countries, and worked in partnership with other governments, multilateral organizations, and civil society. She was the principal architect of the groundbreaking “U.S. Global Strategy to Empower Adolescent Girls.” Previously, Ms. Russell served as Deputy Assistant to the President in the White House, Senior Advisor on International Women’s Issues on the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, Associate Deputy Attorney General at the Department of Justice, and Staff Director of the Senate Judiciary Committee. Before re-entering government service in 2020, she taught at the Harvard Kennedy School as an Institute of Politics Fellow. She also served as the board co-chair of the Women’s Foreign Policy Group, and as a board member of Women for Women International, the Sesame Street Advisory Board, the KIVA Advisory Council, and the Thomson Reuters Foundation’s Trust Women initiative.
bio.jp: キャサリン・ラッセルは、ユニセフ（UNICEF）の第8代事務局長を務めており、190以上の国と地域における子どものための同機関の活動を統括している。ラッセル氏は、公的部門における数十年にわたる経験をこの職に持ち込み、世界中の十分な支援を受けられていないコミュニティのエンパワメント、人道危機を含む状況下で女性および女子を支援するための高い効果を持つ政策およびプログラムの開発に注力してきた。多様な人材で構成される組織の構築および運営、ならびに幅広い取り組みに対する資金や政治的支持の動員においても豊富な経験を有している。2020年から2022年まで、ラッセル氏は大統領補佐官およびホワイトハウス大統領人事局長を務めた。これに先立ち、2013年から2017年まで米国国務省においてグローバル女性問題担当無任所大使を務め、米国の外交政策のあらゆる要素に女性問題を統合するとともに、45か国以上で米国を代表し、他国政府、多国間機関、市民社会との協働に取り組んだ。彼女は、画期的な「U.S. Global Strategy to Empower Adolescent Girls（思春期女子のエンパワメントのための米国グローバル戦略）」の中心的な立案者でもあった。それ以前には、ホワイトハウスにおいて大統領次席補佐官を務めたほか、上院外交委員会において国際女性問題担当上級顧問、司法省において副次官補代理、上院司法委員会においてスタッフ・ディレクターを歴任した。2020年に政府職へ復帰する以前は、ハーバード・ケネディ・スクールにおいて、Institute of Politics Fellowとして教鞭を執っていた。また、Women’s Foreign Policy Groupの理事共同議長を務めたほか、Women for Women International、Sesame Street Advisory Board、KIVA Advisory Council、Thomson Reuters FoundationのTrust Womenイニシアチブの理事を務めた経験を有する。

bio.en: Kay joined Darwin Venture Management in November 2014, and became Managing Partner in 2023.She worked for IBM from 2002 to 2006 as a software engineer responsible for software design and development at the China Software Development Lab. After that she joined HTC and launched HTC's first operator-approved smartphone in Japan with SoftBank and Docomo.In 2009, Kay joined the startup Ubitus Inc., to develop a cloud gaming solution with the entrepreneur team. Ubitus' cloud gaming solution has been adopted by major operators in Taiwan, Japan, Korea, US, Germany, and China. It is recognized as the first fist pioneer player of GPU and GPU cloud since 2010.From design, development, product commercialization, customer service to entrepreneurship, Kay has substantial experience in software industry. She received her B.S. and M.S. degree from the Computer Science and Information Engineering Department at National Taiwan University in 2000 and 2002.
bio.jp: ケイは2014年11月に Darwin Venture Management に参画し、2023年にマネージング・パートナーに就任した。2002年から2006年まで IBM においてソフトウェアエンジニアとして勤務し、中国ソフトウェア開発ラボにてソフトウェアの設計および開発を担当した。その後 HTC に入社し、SoftBank および Docomo とともに、日本においてHTC初となる通信事業者認定スマートフォンの立ち上げを主導した。2009年にはスタートアップである Ubitus Inc. に参画し、起業家チームとともにクラウドゲーミングソリューションの開発に従事した。Ubitusのクラウドゲーミングソリューションは、台湾、日本、

bio.en: Naoko is Founder and CEO of Joconne Inc. and a Board Member of the NPO Women’s Clinic Network. She holds a Master of Engineering from Waseda University. She began her career in the medical device industry, and later gained over a decade of experience in marketing at global medical device companies, where she contributed to launching new products and treatments in Japan.Driven by a strong interest in women’s health, she started researching women’s health literacy in 2016. Through this work, she identified significant barriers preventing women from voicing and addressing their health concerns. To tackle these challenges, she founded Joconne Inc., a company for women’s health literacy.
bio.jp: ナオコは、Joconne Inc. の創業者兼CEOであり、NPO法人 Women’s Clinic Network の理事を務めている。早稲田大学にて工学修士号を取得した。医療機器業界でキャリアを開始し、その後、複数の外資系医療機器企業において10年以上にわたりマーケティング分野での経験を積み、日本市場における新製品および新治療法の立ち上げに貢献してきた。女性の健康に対する強い関心を背景に、2016年より女性のヘルスリテラシーに関する調査を開始した。その過程で、女性が自身の健康上の悩みを表明し、適切に対処することを妨げる重大な障壁が存在することを明らかにした。これらの課題に取り組むため、女性のヘルスリテラシー向上を目的とした企業として Joconne Inc. を設立した。

bio.en: Innovation Manager at  Sony, with a strong foundation in international business and a Master’s degree in International Strategic Management from Lund University, Sweden.In this role, I work across a wide range of innovation initiatives, including supporting sustainability-driven projects that contribute to value creation. A core aspect of my work is enabling collaboration - bringing together people, teams, and organizations within Sony to innovate more effectively and unlock new opportunities through joint efforts.With a strong belief in the power of collaboration and global insight, I aim to bridge ideas, people, and opportunities to accelerate innovation within complex, international environments.
bio.jp: Sony においてイノベーション・マネージャーを務めている。国際ビジネスにおける強固な基盤を有しており、スウェーデンのルンド大学にて国際戦略マネジメントの修士号を取得した。本職においては、価値創出に貢献するサステナビリティ主導のプロジェクト支援を含め、幅広いイノベーション施策に携わっている。業務の中核を成すのはコラボレーションの推進であり、Sony社内の人材、チーム、組織を結び付け、より効果的なイノベーションを実現し、共同の取り組みを通じて新たな機会を創出することに注力している。コラボレーションの力とグローバルな視座を強く信じ、複雑で国際的な環境において、アイデア、人、機会をつなぐ架け橋となることで、イノベーションの加速を目指している。

bio.en: Sonja is a Senior Advisor at Helsinki Partners, where she helps international companies seize the unique opportunities offered by Helsinki - the quirky capital of the world’s happiest country, Finland. With over 15 years of experience in international roles, she has built her career around connecting Finland with global markets. Today, Sonja leads Helsinki Partners’ foreign direct investment activities in Japan, working closely with colleagues and partners across borders to support companies entering and growing in Helsinki.Sonja holds a Master’s degree from the University of Helsinki, with additional academic experience from Humboldt University of Berlin and the Helsinki School of Economics.
bio.jp: ソンヤは Helsinki Partners のシニア・アドバイザーであり、世界で最も幸福な国フィンランドの首都であるヘルシンキが提供する独自の機会を、国際企業が最大限に活用できるよう支援している。15年以上にわたる国際的な職務経験を有し、フィンランドとグローバル市場を結び付けることを軸にキャリアを築いてきた。現在は、Helsinki Partnersにおいて日本における対内直接投資（FDI）活動を主導し、国境を越えた同僚およびパートナーと緊密に連携しながら、ヘルシンキへの進出および成長を目指す企業を支援している。ソンヤはヘルシンキ大学にて修士号を取得しており、あわせてベルリンのフンボルト大学およびヘルシンキ経済大学（Helsinki School of Economics）での学術経験を有している。

bio.en: Jun 2020 – Present: Letara Inc., Representative Director​Jun 2019 – Jul 2020: Uematsu Electric Co., Ltd. ​Oct 2019 – Apr 2020: Establishment of Company M and Company C​Apr 2017 – Oct 2017: TOTO Ltd., Research Engineer
bio.jp: 2020.06 – 現在：Letara株式会社 代表取締役​職務：小型人工衛星用ハイブリッド推進系の開発および提供、経営、事業計画策定など​2019.06 – 2020.07：株式会社植松電機 業務委託​職務：大型CAMUI型ハイブリッドロケットの設計および地上試験​2019.10 – 2020.04：M社、C社（宇宙開発関連会社）の立ち上げ​職務：守秘義務のため非公開​2017.04 – 2017.10：TOTO株式会社 セラミック・燃料電池事業部セラミック開発部セラミック開発第一グループ​職務：静電チャック（半導体製造装置の一部）の新規開発​

company.jp: ベンジャミンブランチ株式会社
国立研究開発法人宇宙航空研究開発機構（JAXA）
エヌビディア合同会社

role.jp: ロボティクス事業部 事業部長

bio.jp: カリフォルニア州立大学卒業後、ロボティクスおよびAIを活用した産業向けソリューションの実装に従事。ソフトウェアを軸に現場の課題を構造化し、社会実装可能なアプリケーションへと落とし込むアプローチを得意とする。現在はNVIDIAにて、日本市場におけるロボティクス事業の戦略策定とエコシステム形成を担っている。

role.en: Senior Engineer, Lead of Applied Robot Learning
role.jp: Senior Engineer, Lead of Applied Robot Learning

bio.en: Tom is a Senior Engineer at Woven by Toyota and leads the Applied Robot Learning team within the Woven City department. Tom is passionate about Robotics and AI as well as finding ways that those two can be used to enrich our lives.
bio.jp: トムは Woven by Toyota のシニアエンジニアであり、Woven City部門において Applied Robot Learning チームを率いている。ロボティクスおよびAIに強い情熱を持ち、これら二つの技術をどのように活用して人々の生活をより豊かにできるかを探求している。

company.en: The Minister of Justice and Digital Affairs of the Republic of Estonia
company.jp: The Minister of Justice and Digital Affairs of the Republic of Estonia

bio.en: Liisa-Ly Pakosta is the Minister of Justice and Digital Affairs of Estonia. With a strong background in history, law, and public service, she has played a key role in shaping Estonia’s digital and legal landscapes. Her previous roles include Member of Parliament, Gender Equality and Equal Treatment Commissioner, and Director General of the Estonian National Heritage Board.A passionate advocate for equal rights, digital innovation, and cultural preservation, she brings both policy expertise and a human-centered approach to leadership. Liisa holds degrees in history and law and is currently pursuing her PhD in law at the University of Tartu.Outside of her official duties, she is a mother of five, a devoted craft enthusiast, and an active promoter of sustainable living.
bio.jp: リーサ＝リュ・パコスタは、エストニアの法務・デジタル担当大臣である。歴史、法学、公的サービスにおける強固なバックグラウンドを有し、エストニアのデジタルおよび法制度の形成において重要な役割を果たしてきた。これまでに、国会議員、男女平等・均等待遇コミッショナー、ならびにエストニア国立文化遺産庁長官を歴任している。平等な権利、デジタル・イノベーション、文化遺産の保護を熱心に擁護する立場から、政策に関する専門性と人間中心のアプローチを併せ持つリーダーシップを発揮している。リーサ＝リュ・パコスタは、歴史および法学の学位を有しており、現在はタルトゥ大学にて法学の博士課程に在籍している。公務以外では、5人の子どもの母親であり、手工芸を愛好し、持続可能なライフスタイルの積極的な推進者でもある。

name.jp: グエン・ヴァン・ソン

company.jp: 株式会社ミラボの営業部

role.en: Sales Leader, Second Business Development Division
role.jp: 第二事業推進本部　営業リーダー

role.en: Group Leader, Group 1, Startup Growth Strategy Department, Open Innovation Division
role.jp: オープンイノベーション推進本部　ＳＵグロース戦略部　１グループ　グループリーダー

bio.en: Since joining KDDI in 2011, her career has been dedicated to driving new business development, investing in startups, and forging strategic alliances with them. Her journey includes a pivotal secondment to GREE, Inc. in 2016, where she contributed to the launch of new businesses. She returned to KDDI in 2018 to continue her impactful work in open innovation.From 2021, she was based in San Francisco, where she led investment and partnership efforts with international startups, focusing on the European and U.S. markets. After returning to Japan in October 2025, she assumed her current position, where she is responsible for steering collaborations with portfolio companies and leading open innovation initiatives like KDDI∞Labo.In 2025, she was selected as one of the Top 50 Emerging Leaders by Global Corporate Venturing.
bio.jp: 2011年、KDDIに入社。入社以降、一貫して新規事業開発やスタートアップへの投資、スタートアップとの事業連携検討に従事。2016年グリー株式会社へ出向し、新規事業立ち上げに従事。2018年に出向帰任し、再びオープンイノベーション業務を担当。2021年アメリカ・サンフランシスコへ渡米し、欧米を中心とする海外スタートアップへの出資、事業連携検討に従事。2025年10月より日本へ帰国し、現職。投資先スタートアップとの連携や、KDDI∞Laboなどのオープンイノベーション活動を管掌。2025年、The Global Corporate Venturingより、Emerging LeadersのTop50に選出。

bio.en: Founded a hospitality investment company in New York in 2006. Established ASTERISK in Japan in 2008, serving as exclusive fundraising consultant in Japan for some of Europe and North America's largest real estate fund managers with AUM exceeding $80B, while advising global institutional investors on cross-border real estate investments. Founded GOYOH in 2018, developing EaSyGo - a platform that bridges social impact creation and financial returns through the sustainability value of real estate. With implementation track records in urban developments including Haneda Innovation City, he drives urban competitiveness through real estate. Realized Japan's first social impact real estate investment and financing in collaboration with MUFG Bank. Participated as the only startup in the Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism's Social Impact Real Estate Working Group. Member of CRREM's Asia-Pacific Regional Advisory Committee. Winner of the Tokyo Financial Award 2025, Sustainability Division.
bio.jp: 高校中退後、70カ国以上をバックパッカーとして旅し、2006年23歳でニューヨークにてホスピタリティ投資会社を起業。2018年にGOYOHを創業し、不動産のサステナビリティ価値を通じた社会的インパクト創出と財務的リターンを両立するプラットフォーム「EaSyGo」を展開。羽田イノベーションシティ等、国内外の都市開発への実装実績を持つ。三菱UFJ銀行と連携した国内初の社会的インパクト不動産投融資を実現。国土交通省 社会的インパクト不動産 実務者WGに唯一のスタートアップとして参画。CRREMアジア太平洋地域諮問委員会メンバー。東京金融賞2025 サステナビリティ部門 本賞受賞。

company.jp: ニレミア・コレクティブ

role.jp: 創業者 兼 マネージング・パートナー

bio.en: Naoko Okumoto is an investor, board director, and technology executive bridging Silicon Valley and Japan. She focuses on AI-driven wellbeing, healthspan, and human potential.She is the Founder and Managing Partner of Niremia Collective, an early-stage venture capital firm investing in next-generation wellbeing and longevity technologies. She also serves as CEO of Amber Bridge Partners, advising companies and investors on cross-border strategy and partnerships.Previously, Naoko was Managing Director of Mistletoe USA, an impact investment fund founded by Taizo Son, and Executive Advisor to Z Corporation. Earlier, she served as Vice President of Strategic Partnerships at Yahoo Inc., where she led global joint ventures and scaled revenue from $16 million to over $525 million.She currently serves on the boards of Yappli (TSE Growth) and TNL Mediagene (NASDAQ), and is a co-host of Human Tech Week in San Francisco.Naoko works at the intersection of capital, technology, and human flourishing.
bio.jp: ボストン大学大学院修了後、米マイクロソフトに勤務。2000年、米TIBCO SoftwareのAPACディレクターとしてアジア各国の拠点展開を統括。2003年より米ヤフー本社にてジョイントベンチャー統括バイスプレジデントを務める。2017年に独立し、日米間の投資・事業開発アドバイザリーのアンバー・ブリッジ・パートナーズを創業。 孫泰蔵氏率いるMistletoeの米国代表、Zコーポレーション顧問、CoinDesk Japan副社長を歴任。2021年、シリコンバレーを拠点とするベンチャー・キャピタル、Niremia Collectiveを創業。米国を中心に投資活動を展開。

company.jp: インパクトサークル株式会社

bio.en: Founded Impact Circle, Inc. with the aim of building a society in which social impact is systematically integrated into investment, financing, and business decision-making.Prior to founding Impact Circle, he served as a founding member and Director of Global Mobility Service Inc., a financial inclusion-focused fintech startup (selected for the first cohort of J-Startup Impact). In this role, he was responsible for business development and fundraising across Japan and Southeast Asia.He has over ten years of professional experience in developing impact-driven businesses and engaging in impact finance-related initiatives.He currently serves as a Visiting Professor at Shizuoka University and as an Entrepreneurship Promotion Ambassador for the Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology (MEXT), Japan.
bio.jp: 投融資や事業活動の意思決定にソーシャルインパクトが組み込まれる社会の創造に向けて、インパクトサークル株式会社を創業。同社設立以前は、金融包摂型FinTechスタートアップであるGlobal Mobility Service株式会社（J-Startup Impact第一期）の創業メンバー/取締役として、日本および東南アジアにおける事業開発や資金調達を管掌。前職を含め、十年以上にわたり一貫してインパクト事業の新規開発およびインパクトファイナンス関連業務に従事。現在は、静岡大学客員教授、文部科学省アントレプレナーシップ推進大使も務める。

company.jp: 株式会社Leaflow,  一般社団法人ベンチャー・カフェ東京

role.jp: 代表取締役, パートナー

bio.en: Rui Nagamori is an international gateway to Tokyo’s startup ecosystem.As a Partner at Venture Café Tokyo and Community Lead at Tokyo Innovation Base, she connects global founders, investors, corporates, public leaders, and international delegations to Tokyo’s innovation community. She designs platforms that transform cross border dialogue into tangible collaboration, positioning Tokyo as an open and trusted destination for global partnership.A serial entrepreneur with a successful M&A exit, Rui brings firsthand founder experience to her ecosystem leadership. Today, she mentors the next generation of entrepreneurs and cultivates global networks that expand Tokyo’s influence in the world.
bio.jp: 東京のスタートアップエコシステムにおける国際的な接続点として、世界と東京をつなぐ役割を担う。Venture Café TokyoのパートナーおよびTokyo Innovation Baseのコミュニティリードとして、国内外の起業家、投資家、企業、行政、国際デリゲーションを結びつけ、越境対話を具体的な協業へと転換するプラットフォームを設計・推進している。M&AによるEXITを経験した連続起業家。子ども服リユースプラットフォームを創業・売却後、Leaflowを立ち上げ、日本におけるCBD市場黎明期のパイオニアとして事業を展開。現在は、東京を世界に開かれたイノベーション拠点として発信するとともに、次世代の起業家・エコシステムリーダーの育成にも力を注いでいる。

bio.en: I am Fumiko Kawamoto, President & CEO of First Brand, Inc. My mission is to bring the expertise, experience, and passion of Japan’s outstanding professionals—many of whom remain underrepresented online—into the digital space, helping revitalize local communities and Japan as a whole. I lead My Best Professional, Japan’s only trusted expert platform developed in partnership with major newspapers and broadcasters nationwide. With 17 years of experience in trust-based media platforms and over 20 years in branding and digital strategy, I am currently driving the transformation of My Best Professional into a trusted primary information platform for the AI era by combining AI with more than 700,000 accumulated interviews and insights, making the expertise, experience, and passion of Japan’s professionals visible to society.
bio.jp: I am Fumiko Kawamoto, President & CEO of First Brand, Inc. My mission is to bring the expertise, experience, and passion of Japan’s outstanding professionals—many of whom remain underrepresented online—into the digital space, helping revitalize local communities and Japan as a whole. I lead My Best Professional, Japan’s only trusted expert platform developed in partnership with major newspapers and broadcasters nationwide. With 17 years of experience in trust-based media platforms and over 20 years in branding and digital strategy, I am currently driving the transformation of My Best Professional into a trusted primary information platform for the AI era by combining AI with more than 700,000 accumulated interviews and insights, making the expertise, experience, and passion of Japan’s professionals visible to society.

bio.en: Rio Ozaki is the Founder and Representative Director of CORE Inc., a Tokyo-based startup on a mission to increase the number of women who can make their own decisions.CORE operates a community SNS and career support platform for working women, along with CORE Works, a recruitment placement service dedicated to supporting women's career transitions. The platform has grown to over 7,000 corporate reviews contributed by women, serving as a trusted resource for female job seekers across Japan.Prior to founding CORE in 2022, Rio gained experience in HR and PR at GIG Inc. Drawing on that background, she now leads initiatives spanning community building, recruitment services, and women's leadership events — including a series of career-focused forums connecting women with executives and decision-makers.Rio is also an APT Women 9th cohort member and actively advocates for creating environments where women can take ownership of their careers and lives.
bio.jp: Rio Ozaki is the Founder and Representative Director of CORE Inc., a Tokyo-based startup on a mission to increase the number of women who can make their own decisions.CORE operates a community SNS and career support platform for working women, along with CORE Works, a recruitment placement service dedicated to supporting women's career transitions. The platform has grown to over 7,000 corporate reviews contributed by women, serving as a trusted resource for female job seekers across Japan.Prior to founding CORE in 2022, Rio gained experience in HR and PR at GIG Inc. Drawing on that background, she now leads initiatives spanning community building, recruitment services, and women's leadership events — including a series of career-focused forums connecting women with executives and decision-makers.Rio is also an APT Women 9th cohort member and actively advocates for creating environments where women can take ownership of their careers and lives.

bio.en: Founder & CEO of Josan-she's | Midwife EntrepreneurA dedicated midwife with specialized experience in MFICU (High-risk pregnancy) and clinical maternity care. Driven by her own journey into motherhood and a vision to innovate Japan’s perinatal support system, she founded Josan-she's and successfully secured seed funding shortly after. Currently leading the expansion of comprehensive pre- and postnatal care services. Mother of two.
bio.jp: 助産師起業家。看護学校・助産師専門学校を卒業後、都内の大学病院の母体・胎児集中治療室（MFICU）でハイリスクな妊産婦のお産に携わり、産科クリニックでの勤務経験も持つ。助産師としてのキャリアに悩んだのち、自身の妊娠出産を機に、日本の医療現場での妊娠出産サポート体制への課題意識から起業。起業後数ヶ月で資金調達を行い、現在代表取締役CEOとして、産前産後ケアをテーマに幅広いビジネスを展開中。二児の母。

bio.en: Coming Soon
bio.jp: 京都出身で二児の母。新卒でブライダル会社に就職し営業職。その後株式会社リクルートでの営業を経験したのち、子育てにおける課題意識から株式会社iibaを創業。「子育てしやすい社会を目指し、新たな子育てインフラを構築する」をビジョンに掲げ、子育て特化のマッププラットフォーム「iiba」の開発・運営を行う。東洋経済「すごいベンチャー100」、日経クロストレンド「未来をつくる100社」に選出。EY Innovative Startup 2024、Forbes JAPAN「RISING STAR AWARD 2025」受賞。Incubate Camp17thにて女性として史上初の優勝。ICC2025スタートアップカタパルト3位。

bio.en: Hiromi Okuda received her Master degree in Social Welfare from the graduate school of University of Bombay (currently renamed as University of Mumbai). She started a conference business in 1991 that specializes in IT, and supports bringing a number of IT private events into Japan. Ms. Okuda established Wiz. Group, Inc. in 2001, and provides assistance for a large number of IT companies to hold conferences in Japan. Since 2008, she began support for start-ups development, and engages in ecosystem building of start-ups in order to form start-up communities in local areas both inside and outside of Tokyo. In 2013, Ms. Okuda began Takaranoyama Inc. in an underpopulated area, to research what IT can do to solve social problems in the region. Social issues are hardest to see from the actual site of development, and she is trying to connect these issues with the development of IT products.
bio.jp: ムンバイ大学（在学時：インド国立ボンベイ大学） 大学院社会福祉課程修了。1991年にIT特化のカンファレンス事業を起業。2001年に株式会社ウィズグループを設立。2008年よりスタートアップ育成支援に乗り出し、スタートアップエコシステムビルダーとしての活動を開始。2013年には「株式会社たからのやま」を創業し、地域の社会課題xITで検証する事業を開始。2020年に一般社団法人ヘルス・アンド・ウェルビーイング・アライアンスを設立し、ウェルビーイングのビジネスインキュベータープログラムのWOMBを展開。2024年よりグローバルイベントTechGALAのプロデューサに就任。委員：環境省「環境スタートアップ大賞」審査委員長、経産省「未踏IT人材発掘・育成事業」審査委員、厚労省「医療系ベンチャー振興推進会議」委員等 著書：会社を辞めないという選択（日経BP社）、人生は見切り発車でうまくいく（総合法令出版）、ワクワクすることだけ、やればいい!（PHP出版）

company.jp: 一般社団法人AIロボット協会

bio.en: Born and raised in the United States, lived there for 17 years before relocating to Japan. Graduated from Keio University, then joined Bain & Company, where involved in multiple consulting engagements across industries. Since December, has been serving on the strategy team at the AI Robot Association, focusing on AI and robotics-related initiatives.
bio.jp: 米国で生まれ育ち、17年間滞在後に日本へ移住。慶應義塾大学法学部を卒業後、コンサルティングファームにて主にテクノロジー領域における戦略立案、コスト分析、業務改善プロジェクトに従事。その後、AIロボット協会に参画し、Strategy Teamの一員として、ロボティクスおよびAIの社会実装に関する各種施策の企画・推進に携わっている。

company.jp: 合同会社デロイト トーマツ

role.jp: マネージングディレクター

bio.en: With over 10 years of experience in sustainability advisory services, this professional has led numerous projects to promote sustainability management for private sector companies.Key areas of expertise include enhancing sustainability management systems, sustainability impact management, and support for non-financial disclosures (in compliance with SEC, CSRD, and ISSB). Related service areas are extensive, covering corporate vision development, materiality assessments, setting mid- to long-term goals and KPIs, TCFD and climate-related risk management, creating new businesses to solve social issues, and impact investing.This individual has provided a wide range of advisory services that integrate sustainability with business strategy for clients across various industries.
bio.jp: サステナビリティ関連アドバイザリー業務に10年以上にわたり従事し、民間企業のサステナビリティ経営を推進するための多数のプロジェクト責任者を務める。担当する専門領域は、サステナビリティ経営管理高度化、サステナビリティ・インパクトマネジメント、非財務情報開示対応（SEC、CSRD、ISSB）。関連する業務領域としては、全社ビジョン策定、マテリアリティ特定、中長期目標・KPI策定、TCFD・気候関連リスクマネジメント、社会課題解決型事業立案、インパクト投資など多岐にわたる。幅広い業種のクライアントに対して、経営戦略と統合したサステナビリティ関連のアドバイザリー業務を多数提供している

bio.en: For 34 years, I have been engaged in research & development and new business development at an office product manufacturer. I designed and led new business creation through open innovation across three locations—Japan, the United States, and Singapore—contributing to the document communications business.After that, I joined a machine tool manufacturer, where I established a subsidiary to promote open innovation in AI and new fabrication technologies. I advanced the application of AI for skills transfer and the acquisition of 3D printing technologies.Currently, at Canon Marketing Japan Inc., I am leading AI business development while also formulating strategies for new business creation and designing and implementing organizational functions. As part of our strategic focus on the well-being domain, I am involved in establishing “WE AT,” a framework driven by industry, government, and academia, promoting collaboration among startups and corporations.
bio.jp: 34年間、某精密機械メーカにおいて、研究開発と新規事業開発に従事。日本ー米国ーシンガポールの3拠点でのオープンイノベーションでの新規事業開発を設計・推進。ドキュメント・コミュニケーション事業へ貢献した。その後、某工作機械メーカに転職。AIや新規加工技術のオープンイノベーションで進める子会社を設立。技能伝承のAI化、３Dプリンティング技術の獲得を進めた。現在、キャノンマーケティングジャパン株式会社において、新規事業開発する戦略の策定、組織機能の設計と実装を進めるとともにAI事業開発をリーディングしている。戦略の重点領域として注力しているWell-being領域の実現に向けて、産官学のフレームワークで進めるWE ATの設立に参画して、スタートアップ、事業会社同士での協業を訴求して、活動している。

bio.en: Serial entrepreneur. Completed graduate studies at the University of Tokyo. Founded a company while a student and sold it to mixi in 2011. Received various domestic and international awards, such as the World Economic Forum's Young Global Leaders (YGL) Class of 2022.Served as a member of the Government IT Strategic Headquarters, Cabinet Secretariat, and an expert member of the Council for New Form of Capitalism Realization, Cabinet Secretariat. Appointed to multiple government committees, including Chairperson of the Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI) Study Group for Industrial Policy toward a Resilient Society, and expert member of the "Japan Growth Strategy Council" under the Takaichi administration.Advisory Board for the Faculty of Engineering, the University of Tokyo. Mother of three children.
bio.jp: シリアル・アントレプレナー。東京大学大学院修了。在学中に創業し、2011年にmixiに売却。世界経済フォーラムが選出するヤング・グローバル・リーダーズ（YGL）の2022年度クラスなど、国内外の様々な賞を受賞。内閣官房IT戦略室本部員、内閣官房新しい資本主義実現会議有識者構成員をつとめ、経産省レジリエンス社会の実現に向けた産業政策研究会の座長、高市政権「日本成長戦略会議」有識者メンバーなど複数の行政会議に就任。東京大学工学部アドバイザリーボード。三児の母。

company.jp: 日本マイクロソフト株式会社

role.jp: 執行役員 常務 最高技術責任者

bio.en: Began a career as a systems engineer supporting financial institutions. After joining a global software company and gaining experience in product development, transferred to the company’s U.S. headquarters in 1998 as an internationalization engineer. Worked on both on‑premises and cloud product development, and in February 2020 joined a Silicon Valley startup, leading global teams as Vice President of Engineering.Returned to Japan in January 2023 and currently serves as Corporate Executive Vice President and Chief Technology Officer (CTO) of Microsoft Japan. Holds MBAs from the UCLA Anderson School of Management and the National University of Singapore.
bio.jp: 金融機関向けシステムエンジニア(SE)としてキャリアを開始する。外資系ソフトウェア会社に転職し開発業務を経験したのち、1998年に国際化エンジニアとして米国本社に転籍する。オンプレ・クラウドの製品開発に従事したのち、2020年2月にシリコンバレースタートアップ企業に移籍し開発VPとしてグローバルチームを指揮した。2023年1月に帰国し、日本マイクロソフトの執行役員常務 最高技術責任者(CTO)に着任し現在に至る。米国 UCLA Anderson School of Management MBA、シンガポール National University of Singapore MBA 修了。

bio.en: Yu is an entrepreneur passionate about diversity and inclusion to create collaborative and innovative society through embracing individual differences.She founded An-Nahal Inc. in 2019 and provides consulting and talent development within companies with the themes of Diversity, Equity, Inclusion, and Belonging, as well as international entrepreneur’s support through partnerships with industry, government, and academia.
bio.jp: Yu is an entrepreneur passionate about diversity and inclusion to create collaborative and innovative society through embracing individual differences.She founded An-Nahal Inc. in 2019 and provides consulting and talent development within companies with the themes of Diversity, Equity, Inclusion, and Belonging, as well as international entrepreneur’s support through partnerships with industry, government, and academia.

company.en: Keio University (Faculty of policy management 2nd year, Kotosaka seminar)
company.jp: Keio University (Faculty of policy management 2nd year, Kotosaka seminar)

bio.en: A member of the Kotosaka Seminar at Keio University SFC, Hinako specializes in the intersection of data science and technology governance. Following her structural analysis of the Israeli startup ecosystem at an Israeli university, she served as a Machine Learning Engineer at an AI startup. She is currently spearheading DX initiatives through the multi-dimensional statistical analysis of SME financial and non-financial datasets. Leveraging an empirical approach, she seeks to integrate rigorous data analysis with corporate strategy and the ethical implementation of emerging technologies.
bio.jp: A member of the Kotosaka Seminar at Keio University SFC, Hinako specializes in the intersection of data science and technology governance. Following her structural analysis of the Israeli startup ecosystem at an Israeli university, she served as a Machine Learning Engineer at an AI startup. She is currently spearheading DX initiatives through the multi-dimensional statistical analysis of SME financial and non-financial datasets. Leveraging an empirical approach, she seeks to integrate rigorous data analysis with corporate strategy and the ethical implementation of emerging technologies.

bio.en: Eishiro Koushi is a Marketing Manager at a global Danish medical device company, leading initiatives that challenge the status quo in current treatment practices to improve patient care.He drives strategic programs in Japan’s continence care and urology markets, collaborating with cross‑functional teams and healthcare professionals to advance evidence‑based, patient‑centric solutions.Eishiro holds a Master’s degree in Bioengineering (MS) from the University of North Carolina, specializing in human-centered design.
bio.jp: Eishiro Koushi is a Marketing Manager at a global Danish medical device company, leading initiatives that challenge the status quo in current treatment practices to improve patient care.He drives strategic programs in Japan’s continence care and urology markets, collaborating with cross‑functional teams and healthcare professionals to advance evidence‑based, patient‑centric solutions.Eishiro holds a Master’s degree in Bioengineering (MS) from the University of North Carolina, specializing in human-centered design.

bio.en: Yuki Okubo is a “Master Trainer” responsible for sales training at global Danish medical device company Coloplast.He fosters a culture of excellence within the salesforce by driving comprehensive training programs that develop the right mindset, competencies, and skills, enabling sales professionals to make life easier for people with intimate healthcare needs.With over 7 years of experience as a sales trainer in both the medtech and pharmaceutical fields, and holding an MBA from Globis University, Yuki leads initiatives that instill the industry's best standards within the salesforce.
bio.jp: Yuki Okubo is a “Master Trainer” responsible for sales training at global Danish medical device company Coloplast.He fosters a culture of excellence within the salesforce by driving comprehensive training programs that develop the right mindset, competencies, and skills, enabling sales professionals to make life easier for people with intimate healthcare needs.With over 7 years of experience as a sales trainer in both the medtech and pharmaceutical fields, and holding an MBA from Globis University, Yuki leads initiatives that instill the industry's best standards within the salesforce.

bio.en: Yuki Kishi is the Founder and CEO of YKBridge, a Netherlands-based advisory firm that supports global companies entering the Japanese market through its “Country Manager as a Service” model. With over a decade of experience across finance, venture capital, and startups, Yuki specializes in go-to-market strategy and execution for international expansion into Japan.He joined Deutsche Securities in Tokyo before joining Plug and Play Japan, where he led the Fintech and Retail divisions, driving partnerships between large corporations and startups. He later served as CFO and Head of Business Development at a fintech startup, where he was responsible for fundraising and strategic growth.Yuki is also actively involved in shaping Japan’s innovation ecosystem. He serves as a Global Advisor to the Fintech Association of Japan and has worked closely with regulators and industry stakeholders on fintech and digital asset initiatives. He holds an MBA from the University of Cambridge and brings a uniquely global perspective to bridging Japan and the world.
bio.jp: Yuki Kishi is the Founder and CEO of YKBridge, a Netherlands-based advisory firm that supports global companies entering the Japanese market through its “Country Manager as a Service” model. With over a decade of experience across finance, venture capital, and startups, Yuki specializes in go-to-market strategy and execution for international expansion into Japan.He joined Deutsche Securities in Tokyo before joining Plug and Play Japan, where he led the Fintech and Retail divisions, driving partnerships between large corporations and startups. He later served as CFO and Head of Business Development at a fintech startup, where he was responsible for fundraising and strategic growth.Yuki is also actively involved in shaping Japan’s innovation ecosystem. He serves as a Global Advisor to the Fintech Association of Japan and has worked closely with regulators and industry stakeholders on fintech and digital asset initiatives. He holds an MBA from the University of Cambridge and brings a uniquely global perspective to bridging Japan and the world.

company.en: Member of the House of Representatives

bio.en: Member of the House of Representatives (1st term, Liberal Democratic Party). After graduating from the University of Tokyo's Faculty of Law, joined the Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI). Served in the Agency for Natural Resources and Energy, and subsequently held positions at METI, including Director of the Strategic Policy Planning Office, the first Director of the Business and Human Rights Policy Office, and Executive Secretary of Special Advisor to the Prime Minister. First elected to the House of Representatives in February 2026 with 108,020 votes.Graduated from Columbia Law School with an LL.M. and is a member of the New York State Bar.
bio.jp: 衆議院議員（1期）。自由民主党所属。東京大学法学部卒業後、経済産業省入省。資源エネルギー庁を経て、同省の通商戦略室長、初代ビジネス・人権政策室長、内閣総理大臣補佐官秘書官などを歴任。2026年2月の衆議院にて108,020票を獲得し初当選。コロンビア大学ロースクール留学。米国ニューヨーク州弁護士。

company.en: General Incorporated Association WE AT (affiliated with Canon Marketing Japan Inc.)
company.jp: 一般社団法人WE AT（キヤノンマーケティングジャパン所属）

bio.en: Joined Canon Marketing Japan Inc. in 2016. Worked in the enterprise direct sales division, leading solution sales for central government agencies, covering the entire process from proposal development to project execution.Currently part of the R&B (Research & Business Development) Promotion Headquarters, leading new business development and open innovation initiatives rooted in addressing emerging social challenges. Engages in co-creation with startups to develop new businesses in the AI × Creative domain.Also involved in the launch and operation of General Incorporated Association WE AT, contributing to the development of a startup ecosystem through industry-academia-government collaboration aimed at achieving Well-being. Supports global expansion of domestic and international startups, while focusing on event planning and management, as well as community building.
bio.jp: 2016年キヤノンマーケティングジャパン入社。エンタープライズ向け直販部門にて、中央省庁へのソリューションセールスを担当し、企画提案からプロジェクト推進まで一貫して携わる。現在はR&B（Research & Business Development）推進本部にて、社会課題を起点とした新規事業開発およびオープンイノベーションをリード。スタートアップとの共創を通じ、AI×クリエイティブ領域における価値創出に取り組む。また、一般社団法人WE ATの立ち上げ・運営に参画し、Well-beingの実現に向けた産学官連携によるスタートアップエコシステム構築にも従事。国内外スタートアップのグローバル展開支援や、イベントの企画・運営、コミュニティ形成等に注力している。

role.en: Special Deputy Director, Global Issues Cooperation Division, International Cooperation Bureau
role.jp: 国際協力局地球規模課題総括課 上席専門官

bio.en: After joining the Ministry of Foreign Affairs in 1995, Takayuki Kawakami developed expertise as a senior specialist in Southwest Asia following extensive overseas assignments in Kolkata, Dhaka, Kathmandu, and Colombo, as well as various assignments in the International Cooperation Bureau at the headquarters. Assuming the current role in November 2024、he has been focusing on the trends of innovative finance as a new financial method, as the approach to development cooperation undergoes a major transformation under the SDGs.
bio.jp: 1995年に外務省入省後、南西アジアの地域スペシャリストとして専門性を醸成。コルカタ、ダッカ、カトマンズ、コロンボでの幅広い在外勤務での経験と国際協力局各課での国内勤務を経て、2024年11月より現職。現職では、SDGｓの下で開発協力のアプローチが大きな変貌を遂げる中、新たな金融手法としての革新的ファイナンスの動向に注目。

bio.en: Co-founder & CEO of Edda, I lead an AI-powered infrastructure platform for PE, CVC, and asset managers, providing an all-in-one solution to manage dealflow, portfolios, and contacts across private and public markets. Edda supports $300B+ in assets across 150 clients in 40 countries (including Bpifrance, Plug & Play, and FJ Labs). Previously, I contributed to the development of FJ Labs (1,000+ investments including Airbnb, Uber, SpaceX) and worked on advanced technology projects at CERN.
bio.jp: Co-founder & CEO of Edda, I lead an AI-powered infrastructure platform for PE, CVC, and asset managers, providing an all-in-one solution to manage dealflow, portfolios, and contacts across private and public markets. Edda supports $300B+ in assets across 150 clients in 40 countries (including Bpifrance, Plug & Play, and FJ Labs). Previously, I contributed to the development of FJ Labs (1,000+ investments including Airbnb, Uber, SpaceX) and worked on advanced technology projects at CERN.

bio.en: Tim Romero is host of the Disrupting Japan podcast and is deeply involved in Japan's startup community as an investor, founder, author and educator.  Tim has founded several startups in Japan over the past 30 years, taught entrepreneurship and corporate innovation at New York University's Tokyo campus, led Google for Startups Japan, and worked with JERA, TEPCO, and other Japanese enterprises on startup investment and innovation strategy.
bio.jp: Tim Romero is host of the Disrupting Japan podcast and is deeply involved in Japan's startup community as an investor, founder, author and educator.  Tim has founded several startups in Japan over the past 30 years, taught entrepreneurship and corporate innovation at New York University's Tokyo campus, led Google for Startups Japan, and worked with JERA, TEPCO, and other Japanese enterprises on startup investment and innovation strategy.

bio.en: Tove is Director & Co-Founder of Yokohama-based organisational change consultancy Global Perspectives KK, which works across Asia and Europe with major global corporations to change the way leaders and organisations think, work, and impact the world.She and her team bring a systems-thinking and behavioural science-based approach to transform company culture and grow leadership capability to embed responsible, future-fit behaviours around people, planet & tech.Tove holds certifications in Business Sustainability Management, Organizational Change Consulting, & a BSc in Biological Science.
bio.jp: Tove is Director & Co-Founder of Yokohama-based organisational change consultancy Global Perspectives KK, which works across Asia and Europe with major global corporations to change the way leaders and organisations think, work, and impact the world.She and her team bring a systems-thinking and behavioural science-based approach to transform company culture and grow leadership capability to embed responsible, future-fit behaviours around people, planet & tech.Tove holds certifications in Business Sustainability Management, Organizational Change Consulting, & a BSc in Biological Science.

role.en: Asia Head of Business Development, Lead Logistics
role.jp: Asia Head of Business Development, Lead Logistics

bio.en: Kyra is part of the Asia Regional Lead Logistics product organization within Maersk. Her team identifies channels for new business growth in Asia and globally by understanding customers' existing and potential supply chain challenges, then matching this with value-adding and sustainable solutions.Kyra holds an Executive Masters in Maritime Economics. She was born South African, holds Dutch nationality and has been living in Japan for nearly 3 years. She is passionate about the benefits of diverse working teams and making a difference for women in the workplace.
bio.jp: Kyra is part of the Asia Regional Lead Logistics product organization within Maersk. Her team identifies channels for new business growth in Asia and globally by understanding customers' existing and potential supply chain challenges, then matching this with value-adding and sustainable solutions.Kyra holds an Executive Masters in Maritime Economics. She was born South African, holds Dutch nationality and has been living in Japan for nearly 3 years. She is passionate about the benefits of diverse working teams and making a difference for women in the workplace.

bio.en: Dr. Chi-Ming Peng has been deeply involved in climate change efforts for many years and has participated in United Nations Climate Change Conferences for 12 times. His innovative contributions through private sector participation have helped Taiwan and the world move toward net-zero emissions.He is also a scientist and entrepreneur, holding a Ph.D. in Atmospheric Sciences from National Central University, specializing in atmospheric chemistry, air pollution, and global cooling. He founded Taiwan’s first private weather company, which transformed the weather forecasting landscape that was once completely dominated by the government, contributing to climate technology-related services.He has also been active in various private sector associations and environmental organizations, playing a key role in promoting open data and big data as a private sector advocate connecting Taiwan and Asia to the global community. Dr. Peng has served as a TV and radio weather broadcaster for 17 years and hosted an online live show discussing climate, health, and environmental issues.Dr. Peng is a vegetarian, passionately advocating for plant-based diets as a way to mitigate global warming and protect the planet.In 2024, he joined the cabinet as the Minister of Environment.
bio.jp: 彭啓明（Chi-Ming Peng）博士は、長年にわたり気候変動対策に深く関わってきており、国連気候変動会議（UN Climate Change Conference）にはこれまでに12回参加してきました。民間セクターの参画を通じた革新的な取り組みにより、台湾のみならず世界全体のネットゼロ排出への移行に貢献しています。また、同氏は科学者であり起業家でもあり、国立中央大学（National Central University）にて大気科学の博士号を取得しています。大気化学、大気汚染、地球寒冷化を専門とし、台湾初の民間気象会社を創業しました。これにより、長年政府が独占してきた気象予報の分野に変革をもたらし、気候テック関連サービスの発展に寄与しました。さらに、さまざまな民間セクターの業界団体や環境系組織でも活発に活動し、オープンデータやビッグデータの推進において重要な役割を果たしてきました。民間セクターの立場から、台湾およびアジアとグローバルコミュニティをつなぐ架け橋としても活躍しています。17年間にわたりテレビ・ラジオの気象キャスターを務めたほか、気候、健康、環境問題をテーマとしたオンラインのライブ番組のホストも務めています。また、彭博士はベジタリアンでもあり、地球温暖化の緩和と地球環境保全の手段として、プラントベースの食生活を情熱的に提唱しています。2024年には、環境部長（環境大臣）として内閣に入閣しました。

company.jp: モデレーター・総合司会　GSEプロデューサー

bio.en: After graduating from university, he worked at a manufacturer-affiliated IT company, where he was primarily engaged in account management for clients in the mass media industry as well as in the launch of cloud services related to video transmission.After completing an MBA at Babson College in the United States, he joined Globis Corporation, where he became a member of the Human Capital Development and Organizational Development Consulting division. He worked on next-generation leadership development programs for large corporations and organizational development for startups, while also contributing to the development of content and educational materials in the field of entrepreneurship.Since 2018, he has been involved in the establishment of the Japan hub of Venture Café, an organization dedicated to creating global innovation ecosystems. He assumed his current position in 2024.He is also a founding member of Binnovative, a Boston-based NPO, a visiting lecturer at Hosei Business School, and a Coordinator for the Cabinet Secretariat’s Startup City Project Network (SCPN).
bio.jp: 大学卒業後はメーカー系IT企業にて、主にマスコミ業界におけるアカウント営業業務や映像伝送に関わるクラウドサービスの立ち上げプロジェクト等に従事。米国バブソン大学でのMBA留学を経た後、グロービスにて人材育成・ 組織開発コンサルティング部門に参画。大企業の次世代経営者育成やスタートアップの組織開発等を手掛けつつ、起業分野のコンテンツ・教材開発も行う。2018年よりグローバルイノベーションエコシステム創出機構Venture Caféの日本拠点の立ち上げに従事。2024年より現職。ボストンに拠点を置くNPO 「Binnovative」立ち上げメンバー。法政大学ビジネススクール兼任講師。内閣府Startup City Project Network (SCPN) コーディネーター。

company.jp: 東京消防庁　消防技術研究開発センター

bio.en: After Masaya Sakai joined the Tokyo Fire Department, he served as a member of fire engines at a fire station. He subsequently engaged in research training at an external research institution, and then headquarters duties including disaster prevention planning and new project planning. Since April 2026, he manages the Tokyo Fire Department’s industry-academia-government collaborations at the newly established Fire Technology Research and Development Center.
bio.jp: 東京消防庁入庁後、消防署においてポンプ隊員を経験した後、外部研究機関への委託研修、防災計画業務、新規事業計画業務等、本庁部門における業務に従事してきた。2026年4月からは新たに設置された「消防技術研究開発センター」において東京消防庁における産官学連携事業を総括する業務に就いている。

company.jp: 東京消防庁　消防技術研究開発センター

bio.en: After Sao Sekiguchi joined the Tokyo Fire Department, she gained experiences in disaster response operations, disaster prevention activities, and fire investigation at fire stations. Currently, making use of her knowledge of chemistry she studied at university, she works as a member of Experiment Branch of the Fire Technology Research and Development Center. Her roles include identification and analysis to determine the presence of accelerants in fires, as well as analytical measurements to identify the causes of hazardous material leaks.
bio.jp: 東京消防庁入庁後、消防署において災害対応業務、防災業務及び火災調査業務等を経験した。現在は大学時代に専攻していた化学等の知識を活かし、消防技術研究開発センターの試験鑑定係として、火災に係る助燃剤の有無等に関する鑑定業務や危険物が漏えいした原因を究明する分析測定業務等に従事している。

company.jp: 株式会社ゼロワンブースター

role.en: Manager of Business Creation Solution Division
role.jp: 事業創造ソリューション部 マネージャー

bio.en: After working at a startup company, I joined a major developer in 2021, where I was involved in new business development and open innovation promotion. I was involved in the development and deployment of new logistics businesses, the establishment of a corporate venture capital fund, and the planning and management of open innovation programs and ideathons, contributing to the creation of a promotion system and culture from the early stages of the innovation department's establishment. From 2024, I joined 01Booster, where I am working to support innovation creation in business companies and the creation of regional industries.
bio.jp: スタートアップ企業を経て大手ディベロッパーにて2021年より新規事業開発、オープンイノベーション推進に従事。物流の新規事業の開発及び展開、コーポレートベンチャーキャピタルの立ち上げ、オープンイノベーションプログラム、アイデアソン等の企画運営に従事し、イノベーション部門立ち上げ初期より推進体制作り、風土醸成に寄与。2024年より01Boosterへ参画し、事業会社のイノベーション創出、地域の産業創出に向けて支援に取り組む。

bio.en: After joining the Sendai City Government as a new graduate, I worked as a caseworker at awelfare office for three years. I then moved to the Startup Support Division, where I wasinvolved in initiatives such as a matching program connecting startups with businessprofessionals and entrepreneurship programs for students and young people. Last year, I ledthe launch of DATERISE!, Sendai City’s first global startup event.
bio.jp: 新卒で仙台市入庁。福祉事務所でケースワーカーとして3年間従事し、その後スタートアップ支援課に。スタートアップとビジネス人材とのマッチング支援プログラムや、学生・若者向けアントレプレナーシッププログラム等の担当を経て、昨年仙台市初のグローバルスタートアップイベント「DATERISE！」の立ち上げを担当。

bio.jp: 慶應義塾大学法学部卒。文部科学省アントレプレナーシップ推進大使。2020年より新潟に移住し、大都市以外の都市における地域の資源と融合したイノベーションエコシステムモデルを推進。新潟最大級イノベーション施設NINNO（ニーノ）開発。大学発ベンチャー支援、地域企業のイノベーション支援、事業創出・共創の仕組みづくりを通じ、地域産業とイノベーション融合の新たなモデルを提唱している。

bio.en: *   Until Dec 2011: Competed as an athlete with the goal of becoming a professional snowboarder.*   Apr 2011: Joined the Minamiuonuma Forest Owners' Cooperative.*   Dec 2023: Resigned from the Minamiuonuma Forest Owners' Cooperative.*   May 2023: Established ForestFolks Inc. and assumed the position of CEO.
bio.jp: ～2011年12月：プロスノーボーダーを目指し競技者として活動2011年4月：南魚沼森林組合入社2023年12月：南魚沼森林組合退社2023年5月：株式会社ForestFolks設立、代表取締役就任

bio.jp: 長野県出身。「ビジネスを通じた社会課題への取り組み」をテーマに、新卒で外資系コンサルティング会社に入社し、戦略コンサルタントとして従事。2011年に独立し、東日本大震災の被災地での産業創出（椿を活用した商品開発など）、日本企業の海外でのSDGs事業開発支援、女性起業家支援などに幅広く携わる。2022年より長野県立大学大学院に専任教員として着任し、実践者であり研究者として、地域イノベーションや起業家支援、DE&Iなどのテーマに携わる。その他、株式会社ラポールヘア・グループに取締役・Chief Impact Officerとして参画し、インパクト設計および海外事業展開を推進。また、国際機関や援助機関からの要請により海外での起業家支援や国際会議への参加なども多数。（一社）アジア女性社会起業家ネットワーク代表理事、NPO法人ミラツク理事など複数の役職を兼務し、ビジネスと社会変革の接点で活動を続けている。

bio.en: Haruka began programming in her first year of junior high school. In high school, she became the world champion in a robotics competition that drew 30,000 teams. She entered the College of Engineering Systems at the University of Tsukuba and completed an accelerated program, graduating in three years. During her graduate studies at the university, she studied abroad in Silicon Valley.  That experience underscored the challenges facing women’s participation in the science in Japan, prompting her to found Griteen Inc. to broaden access to programming education for girls and women.
bio.jp: 中学1年からプログラミングに触れ、高校時代に3万チームが参加するロボットコンテストの世界チャンピオンに。筑波大学工学システム学類へ進学し、3年間での早期卒業（飛び級）を達成。同大学院での研究活動中にシリコンバレーへ留学。その経験から日本の理系分野における女性進出の課題を痛感し、プログラミング教育を女性に広めるべく株式会社Griteenを設立。

company.en: Tokyo Metropolitan Industrial Technology Research Institute
company.jp: 東京都⽴産業技術研究センター

bio.en: He received his Ph.D. in solid-state physics in 2016 and subsequently joined the Tokyo Metropolitan Industrial Technology Research Institute, where he is currently a Senior Researcher.He provides technical support to small and medium-sized enterprises, helping them address practical challenges.His current research focuses on thermoelectric materials, which can directly convert temperature differences into electricity. He is particularly engaged in the development of high-performance thermoelectric materials and devices.
bio.jp: 2016年に 博⼠後期課程を 修了後、東京都⽴産業技術研究センターに⼊所し、現在主任研究員。主な職務は、中⼩企業の課題解決を技術的な観点から⽀援。研究開発では、温度差を電⼒に直接変換できる熱電材料を対象として、熱電材料の⾼性能化やデバイス化に向けた材料開発に従事。専⾨分野は固体物理学。博⼠（理学）

company.en: Department of Chemistry, Graduate School of Science, Tokyo Metropolitan University
company.jp: 東京都立大学　大学院　理学研究科　化学専攻

bio.en: After completing his Ph.D. in Engineering  in 2008 from the Department of Molecular Engineering at Kyoto University’s Graduate School of Engineering, he served as an Assistant Professor at Ryukoku University (2008–2012) and later at the University of Tokyo (2012–2017). He has been a Professor at Tokyo Metropolitan University since October 2017.His research focuses on catalysis, synchrotron radiation spectroscopy, and cluster science. During the development of catalytic reactions for carbon dioxide conversion, he discovered a rapid CO₂ capture method from ambient air using liquid–solid phase separation.He currently leads the development of innovative Direct Air Capture (DAC) technologies as the Program Manager for Goal 4, “Research and Development of Passive DAC Technologies,” within the Cabinet Office’s Moonshot Research and Development Program.
bio.jp: 2008年京都大学大学院工学研究科分子工学専攻で博士（工学）を修了後、龍谷大学助教（2008-2012年）、東京大学助教（2012-2017年）を経て2017年10月より東京都立大学（旧首都大学東京）で教授。専門は触媒化学、放射光分光、クラスター科学。触媒を用いた二酸化炭素変換反応の研究開発の過程で液固相分離による空気からの二酸化炭素高速回収技術を発見。現在は内閣府のムーンショット型研究開発事業目標４の「パッシブDAC技術の研究開発」のプログラムマネージャーとして革新的DAC技術の開発に従事。

company.en: Research Center for Genome & Medical Sciences Tokyo Metropolitan Institute of Medical Science
company.jp: 東京都医学総合研究所　ゲノム医学研究センター

role.jp: ゲノム医学研究センター長

bio.en: After earning his Ph.D. at Osaka University’s Graduate School of Information Science and Technology through research on protein sequence information analysis, he engaged in researches at RIKEN on genomics and the mechanisms of gene expression regulation. He currently serves as Center Director of Research Center for Genome & Medical Sciences at the Tokyo Metropolitan Institute of Medical Science.He is involved in the development of technologies for measuring gene expression and regulatory regions, development of data analysis methods, and the construction of data infrastructures. Building on these foundations, he advances both life science research and clinical research.
bio.jp: 大阪大学情報科学研究科において、タンパク質配列の情報解析により博士号を取得後、理化学研究所にてゲノミクスおよび遺伝子発現制御機構の解明に関する研究に従事し、現在は東京都医学総合研究所ゲノム医学研究センターのセンター長を務める。遺伝子発現およびその調節領域の測定技術の開発、データ解析手法の開発、データ基盤の構築等に取り組むとともに、これらを基盤とした生命科学研究および臨床研究を展開。

company.en: Research Center for Genome & Medical Sciences Tokyo Metropolitan Institute of Medical Science
company.jp: 東京都医学総合研究所　ゲノム医学研究センター

bio.en: Senior Researcher at Research Center for Genome & Medical Sciences, Tokyo Metropolitan Institute of Medical Science. Ph.D. Her field of expertise is molecular biology.For many years, she has studied the molecular mechanisms of the nuclear receptor PXR (pregnane X receptor), a protein that functions as a “drug sensor” in the human body. By identifying a novel molecular mechanism through which PXR senses drugs and induces drug-metabolizing enzymes, she has elucidated genetic factors underlying individual differences in drug efficacy and adverse effects.She is currently advancing functional analyses of newly identified target molecules regulated by PXR, aiming to further uncover fundamental biological mechanisms.
bio.jp: 東京都医学総合研究所ゲノム医学研究センター主任研究員、博士 (学術)。専門は分子生物学。長年、体内の「薬物センサー」として機能するタンパク質（核内受容体PXR）の作用機序を研究。PXRが薬を感知し、代謝酵素を誘導する新たな分子メカニズムを特定することで、薬の効果や副作用に個人差が生じる要因を遺伝子レベルで解明した。現在は、PXRが制御する新たな標的分子の機能解析を進めており、さらなる生命現象の解明に挑戦。

role.en: Director for Public Relations SectionBurea of WaterworksTOKYO METROPOLITAN GOVERNMENT
role.jp: 水道局サービス推進部サービス推進課

bio.en: Joining Tokyo Metropolitan Government in 1998.After working in Bureau of General Affairs ,Bureau of Welfare and Public Health, Bureau of Environment , etc.,Worked in the Waterworks Bureau for approximately 10 years.
bio.jp: １９９８年　東京都入都　総務局、福祉保健局、環境局などを経て水道局の業務への従事　約１０年間

company.en: General Manager, Corporate Planning Department, JVR Co., Ltd. / The 3rd ITAMAE planning member
company.jp: JVR株式会社 経営企画部 部長 / ITAMAE 3期

bio.en: Joined the founding of JVR Co., Ltd. in 2024 as a co-founder of the "Vacation Rental Business," which transforms vacant houses and villas in regional areas into short-term rental properties. In addition to property development, leads corporate planning functions, including strategic alliances and strategy formulation.
bio.jp: 2024年からJVR株式会社の立ち上げに参画。地方の空き家・空き別荘を民泊へとプロデュースする「別荘民泊事業」を共同創業し、物件開発に加えてアライアンスや戦略策定等の経営企画業務を担う。
