company.jp: 愛媛県東京事務所　産業振興部長

company.en: Faculty of Social Data Science, Hitotsubashi University
company.jp: 一橋大学 ソーシャル・データサイエンス学部・研究科

role.en: Dean of Social Data Science, Professor

bio.en: Naohiro Shichijo received his PhD in Engineering from the University of Tokyo. He has held positions at the University of Tokyo's Graduate School of Interdisciplinary Information Studies, the National Institute of Science and Technology Policy (NISTEP) under MEXT, and Tokyo University of Technology before joining Hitotsubashi University as Professor in 2020. He played a central role in designing the new School of Social Data Science, established in 2023, and has served as its Dean since April 2026. His research focuses on science, technology and innovation policy, startups, and the integration of data science with social sciences. He is the founder of GCSC (Global Challenge for Social Innovation), a Japan-Korea student startup program.
bio.jp: 東京大学理学部数学科卒業、同大学院工学系研究科博士課程修了。博士（工学）。東京大学大学院情報学環准教授、文部科学省科学技術・学術政策研究所上席研究官、東京工科大学教授等を経て、2020年より一橋大学教授。2023年に新設されたソーシャル・データサイエンス学部の設計に中心的に携わり、2026年4月より同学部長。科学技術・イノベーション政策、スタートアップ、データサイエンスと社会科学の融合を研究テーマとし、日韓学生スタートアップ・プログラム「GCSC」の主催者でもある。

company.en: Faculty of Commerce and Management, Hitotsubashi University

bio.en: Wenzhen Xu graduated from Nanjing University's School of Foreign Studies in 2011 and moved to Japan. He completed his doctoral program at Nagoya University's Graduate School of Education and Human Development, earning a PhD in Psychology. During his doctoral studies, he conducted research at the University of California, Santa Barbara's Department of Communication, where he acquired computational social science methodologies. In 2019, he joined KDDI Research, Inc. and KDDI Corporation, serving in the Data Intelligence Division, AI Division, and as Senior Researcher at the Human-centered AI Research Institute before assuming his current position in 2022. His research aims to integrate data science and social science, focusing on persuasive communication for human decision-making and behavioral change, and AI for behavioral change. Recently, he has been exploring the social acceptance and diffusion of AI from a psychological perspective.
bio.jp: 2011年に中国南京大学外国語学院を卒業した後、渡日。名古屋大学大学院教育発達科学研究科心理発達科学専攻博士前期課程・後期課程を修了し、博士（心理学）となる。博士後期課程在学中に、カリフォルニア大学サンタ・バーバラ校コミュニケーション研究科に研究留学し、計算社会科学の研究法を習得。2019年に（株）KDDI総合研究所、（株）KDDIに入社し、データ・インテリジェンス部門、AI部門、Human-centered AI研究所研究主査を経て、2022年より現職に至る。データサイエンスと社会科学の融合を目指し、人間の意思決定、行動変容を促すための説得的コミュニケーション、行動変容のためのAIの研究を行っている。最近は、AIの社会的受容、AIの社会的普及も心理学的な観点で探究している。

company.jp: 嘉泉大学 スタートアップ学部

bio.en: Heesun Kang is a business leader with over 20 years of experience across Korea, Japan, Singapore, and the United States, working at the intersection of technology and learning. At Microsoft, she served as Chief Learning Officer for Japan and Korea, engaging deeply with both countries' educational cultures and organizational capability development. She also led advertising and partnership operations at both Microsoft and Meta (Facebook) Japan, where she managed and strengthened the advertising business while gaining firsthand insight into the unique characteristics in digital environments across the two markets. Currently, she is a Visiting Professor at Gachon University's College of StartUp in Korea, where she focuses on nurturing the next generation of entrepreneurs. She holds a degree from Columbia University's School of Engineering.
bio.jp: 韓国・日本・シンガポール・米国で20年以上にわたり、テクノロジーと学習の融合の分野でキャリアを築いたビジネスリーダー。Microsoftで日韓のChief Learning Officerを務め、両国の教育文化や組織能力開発に深く携わる。Microsoft JapanとMeta（Facebook）Japanで広告・パートナー事業を統括し、広告ビジネスを強化するとともに、日韓市場のデジタル環境での経験から両市場の固有の特徴に精通。現在は韓国・嘉泉大学スタートアップ学部の客員教授として次世代起業家の育成に従事。コロンビア大学工学部卒。

company.jp: 嘉泉大学 スタートアップ学部

bio.en: Jina Kim is a researcher and educator with an interdisciplinary background in anthropology and landscape architecture from Seoul National University. After serving as a research associate professor at the university, she is currently a visiting professor at Gachon University's Startup College (Cocone School). Specializing in urban culture, cultural policy, and public space, she has authored an award-winning book and writes the column series “Decoding the City through Culture." She is also developing an AI-powered mobile healing app, “Map of Life," and produces multifaceted content across social media platforms. An active equestrian athlete, she brings a unique perspective that spans academia, culture, technology, and sport.
bio.jp: ソウル大学校で人類学・ランドスケープアーキテクチャの学際的背景を持つ研究者・教育者。同大学の研究准教授を経て、現在は嘉泉大学スタートアップ学部（ココネスクール）の客員教授。都市文化・文化政策・公共空間を専門とし、受賞歴のある著書や「都市を読む文化」コラム連載など幅広い執筆活動を展開。AIを活用したモバイルヒーリングアプリ「人生の地図」の開発に取り組み、SNSを通じた多角的なコンテンツ発信も行う。馬術競技のアスリートとしても活動し、学術・文化・テクノロジー・スポーツを横断する独自の視座を持つ。

company.en: Senior Fellow. Cross-Sector Innovation, Mitsui sumitomo insurance co
company.jp: 三井住友海上火災保険株式会社 シニアクロスセクター･イノベーションフェロー

role.jp: イノベーターズ・プラットフォーム協会　代表理事

bio.en: After participating in a Group Business Process Reengineering Project, he worked in the Sales Promotion Division and the Corporate Sales Division, and has been engaged in his current role since 2016.Through collaborations with VCs and accelerators, he has developed new risk solutions and supported the growth of startups by leveraging advanced insurance technologies.He also serves concurrently as a Partner at Mitsui Sumitomo Insurance Capital, where he is involved in investment development, business matching, and enhancing the value of portfolio companies through open innovation.
bio.jp: グループ業務プロセス改革プロジェクトに参画後、営業推進部門・企業営業部門を経て、2016年より現業。VCやアクセラレーターとの協業を通じ、新たなリスクソリューションを展開し、最新の保険技術を活用してスタートアップ企業の成長を支援。また、三井住友海上キャピタルのパートナーを兼務し、投資開発、ビジネスマッチング、オープンイノベーションを活用した投資先のバリューアップにも取り組む。

bio.en: Rie Yano is a serial entrepreneur and investor with deep expertise in the U.S. and Japanese startup ecosystems. She began her career at Mitsubishi Corporation, working in both Tokyo and New York, before founding Material World in New York, a pioneering fashion trade-in platform that redefined luxury resale. As CEO, she led product development, fundraising, global team building, and business development, culminating in the company’s exit. After serving as GM of MIXI’s U.S. entity post-acquisition, Rie returned to building and advising startups focused on longevity, AI, and robotics, while supporting cross-border expansion and early-stage innovation. Based in San Francisco, she is now a Partner at Coral Capital, investing in U.S. startups and doubling down on U.S.-Japan cross-border investing.She holds an MBA from Harvard Business School and a BA from Sophia University.
bio.jp: 上智大学比較文学部卒業後、三菱商事に入社。米国三菱商事NY駐在後、ハーバードビジネススクールにてMBA取得。米COACH社で日米デジタルマーケティング・Eコマース担当後、2012年にファッションの二次流通事業Material WorldをNYで創業し、ファッション業界の先駆けとしてトレードイン事業を牽引。プロダクト開発、資金調達、グローバル組織構築、事業開発を担い、同社売却後はMIXI社にて米国法人GMを務める。日米のスタートアップシーンに精通する連続起業家・投資家として主にロンジェビティ・AI・ロボティクス領域で活動の後、Coral Capitalに参画。現在は同社のPartnerとしてサンフランシスコを拠点とし、主に米国スタートアップへ投資を行う。

company.jp: EY新日本有限責任監査法人

bio.en: Extensive experience in multiple IPO audit engagements. In 2018, established the EY Women Entrepreneurs Accelerator and has since led approximately 20 accelerator programs.Serves as a member of the recommendation committee for the Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry’s J-Startup initiative and has organized and delivered numerous events supporting women entrepreneurs.Has significant experience in IPO readiness support, including IFRS implementation, internal control design and implementation for pre-IPO companies, as well as statutory financial audits
bio.jp: 公認会計士。IPO監査エンゲージメント複数担当実績あり。2018年にEY女性起業家アクセラを構築し、20本程度ののアクセラを実施。 経済産業省のJstartupの推薦委員を務め、女性起業家のイベントを過去多数企画実施。IFRS導入支援等、上場準備会社の内部統制構築等に関する上場支援業務並びに会計監査等に従事実績あり。

bio.en: After graduating from the Faculty of Policy Management at Keio University, I joined Mars Japan Limited, a global consumer goods manufacturer, where I was in charge of brand marketing for the pet care division. Subsequently, I supported multiple companies-ranging from startups to major corporations-in formulating marketing strategies, developing TV commercials, and building brands. In March 2020, I founded SISI Inc.
bio.jp: After graduating from the Faculty of Policy Management at Keio University, I joined Mars Japan Limited, a global consumer goods manufacturer, where I was in charge of brand marketing for the pet care division. Subsequently, I supported multiple companies-ranging from startups to major corporations-in formulating marketing strategies, developing TV commercials, and building brands. In March 2020, I founded SISI Inc.

bio.en: Gen is the founder of Sony Ventures, which he established in 2016 to build Sony’s global corporate venture capital platform from the ground up. Under his leadership, Sony Ventures became one of Japan’s leading CVC organizations, investing across early- and growth-stage technology companies worldwide and fostering collaboration between startups and large enterprises.Prior to founding Sony Ventures, Gen held senior roles at Sony Group Corporation in investor relations, M&A, and corporate strategy. His earlier career includes experience in global banking and investment banking, giving him a cross-border perspective on capital, innovation, and corporate transformation.In 2024, Gen stepped down from Sony Ventures and continues to support the venture ecosystem as an advisor, board member, and mentor. He is actively involved in initiatives that promote global collaboration and the development of diverse entrepreneurial talent.Gen holds an MBA from Stanford Graduate School of Business, and a BA from Hitotsubashi University. Throughout his career, he has emphasized the importance of diversity—not only in demographics, but in perspectives and experiences—as a key driver of innovation and long-term value creation.
bio.jp: coming soon

company.en: Tokyo University of Agriculture and Technology

bio.en: Dr. Atobe is an expert in urban development and innovation, holding a Ph.D. in Engineering and a license as a First-Class Registered Architect. Her career spans from practical urban planning to fostering R&D startups at prestigious institutions like Nagoya University and AIST. Currently at Tokyo University of Agriculture and Technology, she focuses on empowering the next generation through entrepreneurship education. Her passion for social impact was sparked while backpacking through Southeast Asia. Driven by this experience, she dreams of opening a business school for children in developing nations to help them build their own futures.

bio.en: Haruna Suzuki is a certified hair diagnostic specialist with over 10 years of experience in hair and skincare development. Driven by her struggle with alopecia, she founded ViewBE Inc. in 2021. She developed "Faview," an AI-driven platform for hair and scalp analysis. Her solution is implemented by cosmetic brands and retailers to enhance customer experiences and drive data-driven product planning and marketing strategies. Selected for METI’s J-starX program and winner of the MIT-VFJ Award, Haruna is dedicated to making data-driven hair health accessible to women worldwide.https://viewbe.jp/

role.en: 執行役員　グループDEI推進部長
role.jp: 執行役員　グループDEI推進部長

bio.en: Coming soon
bio.jp: 1991年に全日本空輸（ANA）に入社。客室乗務員としてキャリアをスタートし、インフライトマネジャーとして機内オペレーションの指揮を執る。その後、人財育成の拠点である「ANA人財大学」にてANAグループブランドを体現する人財戦略を牽引したほか、客室センターオペレーション品質推進部副部長として、機内の安全とサービス品質の向上を担った。2019年からはマーケティング室宣伝部長としてANAブランドの戦略的プロモーションを統括。2021年には名古屋支店長として地域創生や航空セールスの最前線を担うなど、カスタマーフロントから経営戦略までを一気通貫で歩み、「現場の心と経営を繋ぐ視点」を確立。2025年4月より現職にて、ANAグループ全体のダイバーシティ・エクイティ＆インクルージョン（DEI）推進を牽引。「凛とした強さと、潤いある優しさ」を信条に、誰もが美しくしなやかに活躍できる組織づくりと、豊かなライフ＆ワークの実現を目指している。

bio.en: Alisaun is a founding member of tonari and a nimble operator, overseeing various customer relations, research, and business development efforts.She is also community builder and co-founder of Straylight, a Tokyo-based makers collective, and Moshimo, a Hayama-based co-op and event space.Born and raised in Tokyo, she flits between being Japanese and American (whenever it's convenient). She led past lives as an equity broker and techno party organizer, and is now exploring and building a new life and community outside of the city.
bio.jp: Alisaun is a founding member of tonari and a nimble operator, overseeing various customer relations, research, and business development efforts.She is also community builder and co-founder of Straylight, a Tokyo-based makers collective, and Moshimo, a Hayama-based co-op and event space.Born and raised in Tokyo, she flits between being Japanese and American (whenever it's convenient). She led past lives as an equity broker and techno party organizer, and is now exploring and building a new life and community outside of the city.

company.jp: NEC /ビジネスイノベーション統括部

bio.en: Naohisa Matsuda joined NEC in 2000, beginning his career as a systems engineer in business development for telecommunications operators. In 2008, he was seconded to Netcracker Technology, a U.S.-based company acquired by NEC, where he worked on post-merger integration (PMI) and business synergy creation. After returning to Japan, he spent more than a decade driving new businesses in the telecommunications domain, including IoT initiatives, ID-based digital ecosystems, and the global expansion of 5G-related businesses. In 2023, he joined NEC’s Global Innovation Unit, contributing to the development of the company-wide technology strategy. He assumed his current position in 2024.
bio.jp: 2000年NECに入社し、SEとして通信事業者向けビジネスを担当。2008年にはNECが買収した米国Netcracker社でPMIやシナジー創出に従事。帰国後10年以上にわたりIoTやID経済圏生成、5Gのグローバル展開など数々の通信系新規事業を推進。2023年グローバルイノベーションユニットで全社の技術戦略策定等に携わり、2024年より現職。

bio.en: Shu Oikawa is the Co-founder and CEO of Glidely, Inc., an AI-powered procurement platform based in San Francisco. Prior to founding Glidely, Shu worked at Keyence Corporation and holds an MBA from Babson College. Glidely's AI agent "Sunny" automates the end-to-end procurement workflow — from RFP creation and vendor discovery to stakeholder interviews, comparison analysis, and contract renewal management — helping mid-market companies transform how they buy. Backed by Alchemist Accelerator, Shu bridges the U.S. and Japan business ecosystems, bringing a cross-cultural perspective to enterprise technology and procurement innovation.
bio.jp: Glidely, Inc. 共同創業者 兼 CEO。キーエンス出身。Babson College MBA修了。AI調達プラットフォーム「Glidely」を開発し、AIエージェント「Sunny」を通じてRFP作成・ベンダー発掘・比較分析・契約更新管理を自動化。米国ミッドマーケット企業の調達業務を変革する。サンフランシスコ拠点。Alchemist Accelerator採択。日米のビジネスコミュニティに精通し、テクノロジーを活用した調達DXを推進している。

bio.en: Aiko Katoh serves as a strategic advisor to startups and large corporations, specializing ingo-to-market strategies, operational scaling, and leadership development. She is deeplycommitted to advancing workplace diversity and inclusion, and regularly designs and deliversseminars and training programs focused on leadership development and women’sempowerment.In 2026, she founded coichigo, a life design platform that supports working parents and theiremployers to achieve a more sustainable balance between career and personal life, whileenabling individuals to pursue more intentional and fulfilling ways of living and working.Aiko began her career at Goldman Sachs, working across the Tokyo and London offices. Shesubsequently launched GLOSSYBOX, a premium beauty subscription service, in the Japanesemarket as Representative Director. She later joined Houzz, where she held several seniorleadership roles, including Managing Director of Japan (2014), Managing Director of Asia(2019), and Executive Advisor (2023).A certified coach and mother of three, Aiko holds a BA in Economics from the University ofChicago and an MBA from INSEAD.
bio.jp: coming soon

bio.en: After working in FMCG marketing strategy and execution, I joined iStyle (ISDC). Leveraging data-driven approaches, I generate consumer insights and lead initiatives from customer experience design through to execution. I focus on creating value by fostering meaningful relationships between brands and consumers.I hold a degree from Ochanomizu University.

bio.jp: Business Head of Shiseido Beauty ParkProject Leader of Shiseido’s R&D Open Innovation Program “fibona”

role.jp: プロジェクトマネージャー

bio.en: Project Manager
bio.jp: JETROイノベーション部スタートアップ課プロジェクトマネジャー。Alchemistをはじめとする米国トップアクセラレーターと連携したプログラムの主担当として、日系スタートアップのグローバル進出を支援している。

bio.en: After engaging in the deployment and application of 3D printing technologies for the manufacturing sector at a Japanese IT firm, Haruya Kojima joined Enterprise Singapore in 2021.Currently, he is actively involved in fostering the innovation ecosystem between Japan and Singapore, driving numerous projects such as inbound programs for startups and business matching. In addition to facilitating collaboration in strategic sectors—including offshore wind, semiconductors, Green Transformation (GX), and Digital Transformation (DX)—he also provides extensive support for government-to-government cooperation. Leveraging his technical expertise and global governmental network, he is dedicated to building new models of co-creation across Asia.
bio.jp: 国内IT企業にて製造業向けに3Dプリンティング技術の導入・活用支援に従事した後、2021年よりシンガポール企業庁（Enterprise Singapore）に参画。現在は、日本とシンガポール間のイノベーション・エコシステム形成に携わり、スタートアップの招聘事業やビジネスマッチングを数多く推進。洋上風力、半導体、GX、DXなど戦略的産業分野における両国の協業促進に加え、政府間協力のサポートも広く担う。現場視点の技術知見と政府機関としてのグローバルなネットワークを活かし、アジアにおける新たな共創モデルの構築に注力している。

bio.en: She began her career at Future Architect in 2008 as an IT consultant. Following a tenure as a beauty editor for WWD, a leading fashion industry journal, from 2011, she joined PERFECT Corp. in 2017. Leveraging a unique background in both technology and beauty media, she has built an extensive track record of driving business development and digital transformation for numerous domestic and international beauty brands, retailers, and media outlets. At the forefront of the Beauty Tech industry, she bridges the gap between innovative technology and the fashion/beauty ecosystem.
bio.jp: She began her career at Future Architect in 2008 as an IT consultant. Following a tenure as a beauty editor for WWD, a leading fashion industry journal, from 2011, she joined PERFECT Corp. in 2017. Leveraging a unique background in both technology and beauty media, she has built an extensive track record of driving business development and digital transformation for numerous domestic and international beauty brands, retailers, and media outlets. At the forefront of the Beauty Tech industry, she bridges the gap between innovative technology and the fashion/beauty ecosystem.

bio.en: Marlene is the co-founder of Acsiryo, a health-tech company developing a decentralized clinical testing and digital healthcare platform. Acsiryo combines point-of-care testing automation with a software platform that enables clinical review, follow-up, and continuity of care beyond traditional clinical settings. The solution is designed for deployment in accessible public and satellite locations, bringing healthcare closer to where people live and work. Marlene has a background in biomedical engineering, with a PhD in the field of surgical robotics from Imperial College London, and experience in clinical research and medical device development. Prior to Acsiryo, she worked with multiple startups across the UK and Europe.
bio.jp: Marlene is the co-founder of Acsiryo, a health-tech company developing a decentralized clinical testing and digital healthcare platform. Prior to Acsiryo, she worked with multiple startups across the UK and Europe.

bio.en: Alexandra Dublanche is Vice President in charge of Economic Development, Attractiveness and Innovation for Paris Region under Valérie Pécresse. She is also a community advisor and deputy mayor of Sartrouville (Yvelines), where she is in charge of commercial attractiveness, institutional partnerships and transportation. In 2021, she was elected chairwoman of Choose Paris Region, Paris Region's international attractiveness agency.
bio.jp: coming soon

bio.en: Cristina leads Urban Innovation and Business Engagement at the World Economic Forum, helping cities accelerate ventures that strengthen local economies and attract investment. She coordinates the global expansion of Yes/Cities, a cross-city platform inspired by YesSF that helps cities activate innovation ecosystems, attract global investment, grow emerging industries, and position themselves as leading hubs for sustainable urban transformation.
bio.jp: coming soon

bio.en: Brittany Arthur is the Co-Founder & CEO of DTJ (Design Thinking Japan), a Tokyo-based AI product studio working across 14 countries. DTJ builds custom AI software and trains the leaders deploying it, with a human-centered philosophy that earned them a place as an official AI Literacy and Cybersecurity provider to the Japanese Government through the Microsoft Elevate Initiative. Her clients include Microsoft, Nissan, Starbucks, and Dell Technologies. An Australian who made Tokyo home via Germany and Mexico, Brittany also founded and hosts Japan's leading bilingual (English & Japanese) business podcast. She lives in Tokyo with her husband and young son.
bio.jp: Brittany Arthur is the Co-Founder & CEO of DTJ (Design Thinking Japan), a Tokyo-based AI product studio working across 14 countries. She lives in Tokyo with her husband and young son.

bio.en: Anna Kreshchenko graduated from the Faculty of International Relations, Odessa National University of Ukraine. In 2017, she came to Japan as a MEXT scholar and enrolled in Kyoto University, Faculty of Law. Anna founded Flora in December 2020 to improve women's physical and mental wellbeing with cutting-edge technology. She received the Special Award at EY Entrepreneur of the Year Japan 2023, and was selected as Forbes Japan Next 100 and Forbes Asia & Japan 30 Under 30 in 2024.

company.jp: 株式会社エヌイーアイジャパン

bio.en: Coming soon
bio.jp: フリス マイヤーは、NEI（グローバル企業向け研修会社）の創業者です。NEIは独自のパーソナライズ技術とハイブリッド型の学習アプローチにより、短期間での学習成果の創出を実現しています。アラスカで生まれ育ち、これまでに複数の事業を立ち上げてきた連続起業家であり、SaaS分野でのエグジット経験も有しています。現在は主に日本を拠点に活動しており、テクノロジーと言語学習を融合させることで、人々の可能性を広げることに情熱を注いでいます。

bio.en: Jaana Tuomi is passionate about building ecosystems where companies can grow and ideas turn into impact. Since 2015, she has led Enter Espoo, working closely with companies and investors to help them establish and scale in one of Europe’s leading innovation environments.She is also actively developing Kvanttinova and Defence Tech Hub in Espoo, bringing together players in the semiconductor, quantum, defence and space industries to build a strong, future-oriented hubs.With a background in marketing consulting and collaboration platform building, Tuomi has spent her career connecting people, organizations, and opportunities. She has served in several board and chair roles and is currently a board member of Kvanttinova. She holds an Executive MBA and a Master’s degree in Marketing.
bio.jp: Jaana Tuomi is passionate about building ecosystems where companies can grow and ideas turn into impact. Since 2015, she has led Enter Espoo, working closely with companies and investors to help them establish and scale in one of Europe’s leading innovation environments.She is also actively developing Kvanttinova and Defence Tech Hub in Espoo, bringing together players in the semiconductor, quantum, defence and space industries to build a strong, future-oriented hubs.With a background in marketing consulting and collaboration platform building, Tuomi has spent her career connecting people, organizations, and opportunities. company.en: Startup Strategy Promotion Headquarters,Tokyo Metropolitan Government
company.jp: 東京都スタートアップ戦略推進本部

role.en: Senior Director for Startup Strategy Promotion
role.jp: スタートアップ戦略推進担当部長

bio.en: She joined the Tokyo Metropolitan Government after graduating from university.As a manager, she has supported small and medium-sized enterprises and start-ups.Since April 2025, she has been responsible for promoting open innovation and fostering collaboration with local governments at the Startup Strategy Promotion Headquarters, which oversees SusHi Tech Tokyo and the Tokyo Innovation Base.
bio.jp: 大学卒業後、東京都に入都し、管理職としては主に産業労働局で創業を含む中小企業への各種支援等に従事。2025年4月からSusHi Tech Tokyo やTokyo Innovation Baseを所管するスタートアップ戦略推進本部で、全国自治体との連携や大企業のオープンイノベーション促進などを担当。

bio.en: Liisa-Ly Pakosta is the Minister of Justice and Digital Affairs of Estonia. With a strong background in history, law, and public service, she has played a key role in shaping Estonia’s digital and legal landscapes. Her previous roles include Member of Parliament, Gender Equality and Equal Treatment Commissioner, and Director General of the Estonian National Heritage Board.A passionate advocate for equal rights, digital innovation, and cultural preservation, she brings both policy expertise and a human-centered approach to leadership. Liisa holds degrees in history and law and is currently pursuing her PhD in law at the University of Tartu.Outside of her official duties, she is a mother of five, a devoted craft enthusiast, and an active promoter of sustainable living.
bio.jp: Liisa-Ly Pakosta is the Minister of Justice and Digital Affairs of Estonia. With a strong background in history, law, and public service, she has played a key role in shaping Estonia’s digital and legal landscapes. Her previous roles include Member of Parliament, Gender Equality and Equal Treatment Commissioner, and Director General of the Estonian National Heritage Board.A passionate advocate for equal rights, digital innovation, and cultural preservation, she brings both policy expertise and a human-centered approach to leadership. Liisa holds degrees in history and law and is currently pursuing her PhD in law at the University of Tartu.Outside of her official duties, she is a mother of five, a devoted craft enthusiast, and an active promoter of sustainable living.

bio.en: Sivan Nakamura was born and raised in Israel and moved to Tokyo in 2001. She spent her last 20 years in the advertising industry in Japan, establishing her own company- SivanS Group- in 2011, a bespoke marketing communication agency in Tokyo. With diverse clients from luxury to FMCG and a strong focus on the automotive industry, she built the company around a core belief: Because We Are Different.“Never Give Up” has always been her motto since she was a child. Her mother taught her that it's important to work hard to achieve our goals in life. That's why from an early age she studied hard, aimed high and always challenged herself. The harder the challenge the more passionate she becomes.She likes to define herself as a very ‘hands on‘ President who embraces every new challenge and feels privileged to work with our distinguished Clients.
bio.jp: Sivan Nakamura was born and raised in Israel and moved to Tokyo in 2001. She spent her last 20 years in the advertising industry in Japan, establishing her own company- SivanS Group- in 2011, a bespoke marketing communication agency in Tokyo. With diverse clients from luxury to FMCG and a strong focus on the automotive industry, she built the company around a core belief: Because We Are Different.“Never Give Up” has always been her motto since she was a child. Her mother taught her that it's important to work hard to achieve our goals in life. That's why from an early age she studied hard, aimed high and always challenged herself. The harder the challenge the more passionate she becomes.She likes to define herself as a very ‘hands on‘ President who embraces every new challenge and feels privileged to work with our distinguished Clients.

bio.en: Oya Koc is the Founder and CEO of Oyraa, a global platform connecting users with professional interpreters on demand. Based in Tokyo, she has been building businesses in Japan for over a decade. Oyraa operates in more than 100 countries, supporting individuals and companies in overcoming language barriers in real time. In addition to her role as a founder, Oya is also an active investor, focusing on opportunities that bridge global markets and enable cross-border growth.
bio.jp: Oya Koc is the Founder and CEO of Oyraa, a global platform connecting users with professional interpreters on demand. Based in Tokyo, she has been building businesses in Japan for over a decade. Oyraa operates in more than 100 countries, supporting individuals and companies in overcoming language barriers in real time. In addition to her role as a founder, Oya is also an active investor, focusing on opportunities that bridge global markets and enable cross-border growth.

role.jp: マネージングディレクター

bio.en:
After co-founding and exiting a startup, joined Dentsu and worked across new business development, cybersecurity-related initiatives at the Cabinet Office, corporate strategy, and venture investment, with a focus on startup sourcing, growth support, and IPO-related initiatives in Japan and overseas.

Later took on roles in Silicon Valley, supported the Japan expansion of global portfolio companies, served as a board director, and held a manager position at Dentsu Group before joining DG Daiwa Ventures in September 2020. Investment experience spans AI, enterprise software, privacy tech, education, and other frontier technology sectors across Japan and overseas, with continued engagement with leading global startup ecosystems including Y Combinator.

Also a semifinalist in the 6th JAXA Astronaut Selection Program, and currently serves as Representative Director of the J-GIC, leading the Global Founders Summit.
bio.jp:
大学在学中に共同創業した会社を売却後、電通入社。メディア関連の新規事業開発や、内閣府のサイバーセキュリティ関連業務に従事。以後、経営企画局にて経営戦略やCVC・電通ベンチャーズでの投資業務を担当。国内外のスタートアップのソーシングや成長戦略、IPOに関わる。 
シリコンバレー駐在、海外投資先の日本進出支援、投資先取締役、㈱電通グループ・マネージャーを経て、2020年9月よりDGDVに参画。過去の投資先に、Robloxに買収されたLoomAI、TripleLiftに買収された1plusX、Paypalに買収されたCurv、プライバシーテックのAcompany、Edtechのコノセル、フィジカルAIのSkild AIなど。 Y Combinatorに22年以降全バッチ参加。
第6期JAXA宇宙飛行士選抜試験 セミファイナリスト。グローバルスタートアップ投資推進協議会の代表理事として、「Global Founders Summit」を主宰。

bio.en: Takayuki Hirayama founded ARUM Works in 2006, later renamed ARUM Inc. in 2017. He has consistently led automation, robotics, and AI initiatives for manufacturing processes. In 2021, ARUM launched ARUMCODE1, described as the world’s first manufacturing AI. By combining AI software for CNC programming with automation systems around machine tools, he is driving Physical AI adoption to address labor shortages and skill transfer in manufacturing.
bio.jp: 2006年に前身となるアルムワークスを創業し、2017年にアルム株式会社へ改称。製造工程の自動化・ロボット化・AI化を一貫して推進し、2021年には世界初の製造AI「ARUMCODE1」をリリース。工作機械周辺の自動化システムと製造AIソフトウェアを両輪で展開し、製造業の人手不足と技能継承を解くフィジカルAI領域を牽引。東京都事業“SusHi Tech Global Startups”に選出。

bio.en: Masato Fujino founded Fairy Devices after studying bioinformatics and medical science at the University of Tokyo. As CEO, he has led the development of wearable and AI-driven products such as THINKLET, which captures first-person video, audio, and other field data to digitize tacit knowledge from skilled workers. His Connected Worker Solution with Daikin received the Minister for Internal Affairs and Communications Award. In March this year, the company received both the top award, First Prize, and the special AI Agent Award at GENIAC-PRIZE, hosted by Japan’s Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry and NEDO.
bio.jp: 東京大学に入学、生物情報工学研究室を経て、同大学院医学系研究科医科学専攻を中退、フェアリーデバイセズを創業。CEOとして、首掛け型ウェアラブル「THINKLET」をはじめ、現場作業の一人称映像・音声・位置情報を取得し、熟練者の暗黙知をデータ化するプロダクトを展開。ダイキン工業との協業で、総務大臣賞を受賞し、本年3月には経済産業省とNEDO主催の「GENIAC-PRIZE」で最高賞「第1位」と特別賞「AIエージェント賞」をダブル受賞。

bio.en: Yuki Ishikawa graduated from the University of Tokyo and built products at Nintendo, Moi, and the Mercari Group. He served as VP of Product at Merpay, CEO of Souzoh, and VP of Generative AI / LLM at Mercari before founding Jizai in 2024. He is now leading the intersection of generative AI and robotics, including the development of the general-purpose AI robot Mi-Mo and a software-driven approach to Physical AI. Mi-Mo gained international attention as a general-purpose AI robot after being selected for the CES 2025 Japan Pavilion, featured at official media events including LaunchIT, CES Unveiled, and ShowStoppers, and covered by overseas media as a “walking side table lamp.”
bio.jp: 東京大学卒業後、任天堂、モイ、メルカリグループで新規事業開発を歴任。メルペイ執行役員VP of Product、ソウゾウ代表取締役CEO、メルカリ執行役員 VP of Generative AI / LLMを経て、2024年にJizaiを創業。生成AIとロボティクスを融合し、汎用AIロボット「Mi-Mo」などの開発を進める。 Mi-MoはCES 2025のJapan Pavilionに選出され、会期中の公式メディアイベント「LaunchIT」「CES Unveiled」「ShowStoppers」にも登場し、海外メディアでも“walking side table lamp”として紹介されるなど、汎用AIロボットとして国際的な注目を集めた。

role.en: Vice President, Global Strategy and M&A
role.jp: 海外戦略本部兼海外M&A本部 本部長

bio.en: Ryo Umezawa is a Vice President of Vector, leading Global Strategy and M&A initiatives.   Previously, he was CEO of Antler Japan and a Principal at East Ventures, a global early-stage venture capital firm. A serial entrepreneur, he co-founded two startups, including AllCoupon Japan (acquired), and served as Japan Country Manager for Tinder, HomeAway (Expedia Group), and Hailo.
bio.jp: 10年間のフィリピン滞在を経て、2007年上智大学・比較文化学部卒業。在学中の2005年からインターンとしてジェイ・シード株式会社で事業立ち上げやマーケティング業務に携わる。2008年から株式会社トラフィックゲート（現リンクシェア・ジャパン株式会社）にてアドネットワーク事業やアプリプロデュースを経験後に起業。タクシー配車アプリのHAILO株式会社代表取締役社長、バケーションレンタル事業HomeAway日本支社長、マッチングアプリTinder日本支社長、投資ファンドEast VenturesのPrincipal、グローバル投資ファンドAntlerの代表取締役を経てベクトルの海外戦略本部兼海外M&A本部の本部長に就任。

company.jp: 株式会社AIメンタルサポート

bio.en: Serial entrepreneur. After graduating from Tokyo Woman’s Christian University with a degree in psychology, she joined DeNA as a new graduate. In 2016, she founded a media business, which was acquired by Vector Group within a year, after which she became president of the subsidiary. She is currently the founder of AI Mental Support Co., Ltd., which provides stress assessment and occupational physician services tailored for entrepreneurs.
bio.jp: シリアルアントレプレナー。東京女子大学心理学部卒業後、新卒でDeNAに入社。2016年にメディア事業で起業し、その後1年でベクトルグループにM＆A、子会社社長に就任。現在は起業向けのストレスチェック及び産業医サービスを展開する株式会社AIメンタルサポートを創業。

company.en: Institute for Open and Transdisciplinary Research Initiatives, The University of Osaka / Musashino Valley Co.,Ltd
company.jp: 大阪大学　共創機構/ 株式会社Musashino Valley

role.en: Specially Appointed Academic Policy ResearcherDirector / CFO

bio.en: A After graduating from Rikkyo University’s Faculty of Letters, he worked in overseas sales at Matsushita Electric Industrial (now Panasonic), including an assignment in Indonesia. After that, he worked for an IT company to set up offices in Hong Kong and Singapore. He has been engaged in university education since 2008, and after studying at Rikkyo University and Kyoto Institute of Technology, he assumed his current position in 2021. Graduated from Globis Graduate School of Management (MBA).
bio.jp: 立教大学文学部卒業後、松下電器産業（現パナソニック）で海外営業、インドネシア駐在を経験。その後IT企業で香港・シンガポール拠点立上げに従事。2008年より大学教育に携わり、立教大学、京都工芸繊維大学を経て2021年より現職。グロービス経営大学院（MBA）卒業。

company.en: UC Berkeley Sutardja Center for Entrepreneurship & Technology
company.jp: UC Berkeley Sutardja Center for Entrepreneurship & Technology

bio.en: He serves as the Chief Marketing Officer for the UC Berkeley Sutardja Center for Entrepreneurship & Technology. He is a full-stack marketer who believes in openness, collaboration, and the importance of design, UX, and research in building exceptional brand experiences. He is the founder of Berkeley Startup Studio, Berkeley BEGIN and the SCET Design Lab, which support entrepreneurs, innovators, and builders in Berkeley’s innovation ecosystem.
bio.jp: UC Berkeley Sutardja Center for Entrepreneurship & Technologyチーフマーケティングオフィサー。フルスタックマーケターとして、開放性、コラボレーションと優れたブランド体験を構築するデザイン、UX、リサーチの重要性を説く。バークレーのイノベーションエコシステムにおける起業家、イノベーター、ビルダーを支援するBerkeley Startup Studio、Berkeley BEGIN、SCET Design Labの創設者。

company.jp: インキュベイトファンド株式会社

bio.en: She joined Deloitte Tohmatsu Consulting LLC in 2017 and engaged in consulting work in the public sector.  Joined Incubate Fund in 2023, where she is responsible for sourcing new investments and driving value creation at portfolio companies.
bio.jp: 2017年デロイトトーマツコンサルティング合同会社に入社し、パブリックセクター部門にてコンサルティング業務に従事。2023年にインキュベイトファンドに参画し、新規投資先の発掘、投資先企業のバリューアップ業務等を担当。

company.jp: アント・イノベーションズ株式会社

role.jp: 代表取締役パートナー

bio.en: ith 14 years of startup investing experience, he has backed companies across sectors ranging from IT services to space, with numerous exits—including IPOs and M&A—particularly in AI, space, and robotics. Previously, he joined a University of Tokyo–affiliated venture capital firm as a founding team member and served as Head of Investments. He also founded “1stRound,” a cross-university entrepreneurship support program, helping many teams launch startups. In recent years, he has focused on expanding strategic growth pathways for startups, including corporate carve-outs and management buyouts (MBOs).
bio.jp: スタートアップ投資において14年の実績を持ち、ITサービスから宇宙まで幅広い領域に投資。特にAI・宇宙・ロボティクス分野では、IPOおよびM&Aを含む多数のエグジット実績を有する。前職では東京大学系ベンチャーキャピタルに創業メンバーとして参画し、投資責任者を務める。あわせて、アカデミア横断型の起業支援プログラム「1stRound」を設立し、スタートアップ創業を多数支援。近年は、スタートアップの新たな成長手段として、経営統合や大企業からのカーブアウトやMBOの普及にも注力している。

company.jp: SMBCベンチャーキャピタル株式会社

bio.en: Joined Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation in 2020, working in corporate sales for small, medium and listed companies. He has joined SMBC Venture Capital since 2023.
bio.jp: 2020年三井住友銀行入行。中小中堅～上場企業の法人営業に従事。2023年よりSMBCベンチャーキャピタルに参画。

role.en: English Content Creator, English Conversation Instructor, Interpreter
role.jp: 英語系クリエイター、英会話講師、通訳

bio.en: Graduated from International Christian University (ICU). Holds Eiken Grade 1, a TOEIC score of 990, and a TESOL certification. Studied in the United States for one year each during her third year of high school and third year of university. At university, she double-majored in Language Education and Media, Communication, and Culture. Currently, she shares information about English learning and studying abroad on social media (@Mayu E Room), while primarily working as an English instructor, as well as an interpreter and translator.
bio.jp: 国際基督教大学（ICU）卒。英検1級、TOEIC990点、TESOL（英語教授法）取得。高校3年時、大学3年時にそれぞれ1年間アメリカに留学。大学では、言語教育とメディア・コミュニケーション・文化を二重専攻。現在は英語や留学についての情報をSNS（@Mayu E Room）で発信する傍ら、英語講師をメインに通訳や翻訳家としても活動。

role.jp: マーケティング部 シニアリーダー

bio.en: Graduated from Waseda University. With an international background, having spent a total of 10 years in Chicago, the Netherlands, and Singapore during her childhood. After working as an actress for two years following graduation, she now serves as Senior Leader of the Marketing Department. Drawing on her diverse background, she leads the company’s marketing strategies.
bio.jp: 早稲田大学卒業。幼少期からシカゴ、オランダ、シンガポールで計10年間過ごした国際派。卒業後は2年間の役者活動を経て、現在はマーケティング部シニアリーダーを担当。多彩なバックグラウンドを活かし、同社のマーケティング戦略を牽引している。

bio.en: Graduated from Kansei Gakuin University. After leading the Study Abroad AX Division and driving its business, he established the New Business Development Department and rapidly expanded the company’s overseas video media. In 2021, he was appointed Head of the Video Media Division. Currently, he oversees a wide range of operations as the head of the social media marketing sector.
bio.jp: 関西学院大学卒業。留学AX事業部リーダーとして事業を牽引後、新規事業開発部を立ち上げ海外動画メディアを急成長させる。2021年より動画メディア本部長に就任。現在はSNSマーケティング領域の責任者として、幅広く管掌している。

company.jp: 株式会社さすがコミュニケーションズ

role.jp: 日英バイリンガル・リーダーシップ＆コミュニケーションコーチ

bio.en:
Helen Iwata is a UK-born bilingual leadership and communication coach with 35 years of experience in Japan.
During her 10 years at McKinsey & Company, she served as Manager of Client Communications, coaching consultants and clients in leadership, communication, and high-stakes presentations.
As the founder of Sasuga Communications K.K., Helen partners with multinational organizations to design and deliver leadership and communication development programs for professionals ranging from emerging leaders to senior executives.
She is a TEDx coach and speaker, a Nikkei Online columnist, and the author of Eigo no Shigoto-jutsu (Shogakukan).
She also hosts the Sasuga! Podcast.
bio.jp: 英国出身、日本在住35年。マッキンゼー日本支社でコンサルタントや顧客へのリーダーシップやプレゼンの指導を経て、2013年起業。現在は多数のグローバル企業に向けて研修、女性人材育成、エグゼクティブ・コーチングを提供しています。TEDxスピーカー兼コーチ、日経オンラインコラムニスト、『英語の仕事術』（小学館）著者、Sasuga! Podcastのホストも務めています。

bio.en: Invested in 23 startups through the Fujita Fund at CyberAgent. In 2023, founded Sworkers with the mission of “increasing the number of people who take on the challenge of building startups.” Also leads “Project:F,” an initiative focused on supporting women’s career development.
bio.jp: 株式会社サイバーエージェントの藤田ファンドで23社に投資をし、2023年に「スタートアップに挑む人を、ふやす。」を掲げSworkersを創業。また、女性キャリア支援の「Project:F」を主宰する。

bio.en: Joined Nitori as a new graduate and spent 14 years taking on roles including store manager, logistics, business transformation, organizational development, and head of new graduate recruitment. In 2023, moved to Panasonic, where he now leads group-wide employer branding for recruitment.
bio.jp: 新卒で株式会社ニトリへ入社。14年間で店長・物流・業務改革・組織開発・新卒採用責任者等を経験。2023年にパナソニックへ転職し、現在はグループ全体の採用ブランディング責任者を務めている。

bio.en: Graduated from Yokohama City University (School of International Liberal Arts). Joined Yahoo Japan in 2020, working in sales and business development for “PayPay Gourmet” for approximately four and a half years. Founded Curio Inc. in September 2024, and is currently developing and operating the fan-support advertising service “#OshiAd.”
bio.jp: 横浜市立大学国際総合科学部卒業。2020年にヤフー株式会社に入社。「PayPayグルメ」の営業と事業開発に約4年半従事。2024年9月に株式会社Curioを設立。現在は応援広告サービス「#推しアド」を開発・運営。

company.jp: 東京大学　大学院工学系研究科　電気系工学専攻

role.en: Project Professor, Department of Electrical Engineering and Information Systems, Graduate School of Engineering, The University of Tokyo, Japan

bio.en: Received Ph.D. in Engineering from Waseda University in 2010. After serving as assistant professor at Waseda University, he assumed his current position in 2023. JST PRESTO Researcher in 2017.  Research interests include human-coexisting robots, smart devices using functional materials, AI-based human sensing, and robots for construction, disaster response, and infrastructure inspection.   Recipient of the 2022 MEXT Young Scientists’ Prize.
bio.jp: 2010年早稲田大学にて博士（工学）を取得。同大学助手等を経て、2023年より現職。2017年JSTさきがけ研究者。人共存ロボット、機能性材料を用いたスマートデバイス、AIを活用したヒューマンセンシング、建設・災害対応・インフラ点検ロボット等に関する研究に従事。2022年文部科学大臣表彰（若手科学者賞）を受賞。

company.jp: ソフトバンク株式会社

bio.en: Graduated in 2025 from the AI Strategy Course, Department of Information Engineering, Faculty of Engineering, at International Professional University of Technology in Osaka.Worked as an AI Engineer and Product Manager across multiple organizations, she conducted research on Large Language Models (LLM) and knowledge graphs, with a paper accepted to IEEE Access.Selected as a member of SoftBank Academia, a program founded by Masayoshi Son to develop future leaders.Currently engaged in company-wide AI strategy at SoftBank Corp., while also making appearances in numerous media outlets and events.
bio.jp: 2025年大阪国際工科専門職大学AI戦略コース卒。AIエンジニア・PM等を経て、LLM×知識グラフ研究でIEEE Access採択。ソフトバンクアカデミア選出。現在はソフトバンク株式会社で全社的なAI関連の戦略に従事し、メディア・イベントにも多数出演。

bio.en: Tokyo-based visionary entrepreneur who has engaged to shape Japan's startup ecosystem. He founded and led Takeoff Tokyo, one of Asia's leading startup events. He also launched Angry Birds in Japan and was the founding CEO of Slush Tokyo. Since 2015, more than 2,000 students have volunteered for the event.
bio.jp: 東京を拠点とする先見性のある起業家で、日本のスタートアップ・エコシステムの形成に貢献。アジア有数のスタートアップイベントである「Takeoff Tokyo」を創設し、主導。さらに、「Angry Birds」を日本で展開し、「Slush Tokyo」の創設CEOも務めた。2015年以降、主催のイベントには2,000人以上の学生がボランティアとして参加している。

company.jp: シータ・タイムズ・ベンチャーズ

role.jp: 共同代表・ジェネラルパートナー

bio.en: Founded a company in Mexico while at Osaka University. Spent about 10 years in venture capital at CyberAgent Capital, leading investments in roughly 50 early-stage startups, including Timee. In July 2025, he founded Theta Times Ventures.
bio.jp: 大阪大学在学中にメキシコで起業後、サイバーエージェント・キャピタルで約10年間VC投資に従事。タイミーはじめ、創業期スタートアップ約50社にリード投資。2025年7月、シータ・タイムズ・ベンチャーズを創業。

bio.en: After founding and managing businesses both in Japan and abroad, he joined GO in 2024.  As an Executive Officer, works toward the mission “Happiness through mobility.” Driven by “unlocking every possibility,” maximizes the potential of both business and people to drive growth.
bio.jp: 国内外での起業と経営を経て、2024年GO参画。執行役員として「移動で人を幸せに。」というミッションに挑む。また「あらゆる可能性の解放」を原動力に、事業と人のポテンシャルを最大化し、成長へと導く。

company.jp: 合同会社ソウルジャパンメディア

bio.en: Entrepreneur developing diverse businesses across Japan and South Korea since 2012, including advertising, real estate, travel, and cross-border e-commerce. Leveraging strengths in influencer and NAVER marketing, he provides comprehensive support for Japanese companies entering the Korean market and expanding their customer base.
bio.jp: 2012年から日韓両国において広告代理店事業、不動産、旅行事業、越境ECなど、多角的な事業を展開する起業家。インフルエンサー活用やNAVERマーケティングを強みに、日本企業の韓国進出や集客支援を幅広く手掛けている。

bio.en: Acquired insolvent OWNDAYS in 2008 and became President, returning the company to profitability the following year and driving aggressive overseas expansion. The company now has sales of 55 billion yen and over 630 stores in 13 countries and regions. Stepped down as President last year to become Chairperson.
bio.jp: 2008年に債務超過のOWNDAYSを買収し社長に就任。翌年黒字化、積極的に海外展開を推進。現在は売上550億、13カ国・地域に630店以上を出店。昨年、代表を退任し会長に。

role.en: CEO of Midtown Inc. / Project Professor at Tokyo University of Science
role.jp: 株式会社Midtown代表取締役 CEO / 東京科学大学　特任教授

bio.en: Graduated from the Graduate School of Science at the University of Tokyo. Joined Accenture as a new graduate, where he engaged in management consulting for manufacturing and retail companies. He then moved to Recruit Co., Ltd., where he was involved in launching several new businesses that he planned and proposed himself in the New Business Development Office.At ispace, Inc., he served as a founding shareholder and Director/COO, overseeing all aspects of business operations and leading the company’s growth from 2 to 200 employees.He later founded Midtown Inc. Currently, he serves as a CXO or advisor for multiple major corporations and startups, and is a Project Professor at Tokyo University of Science.
bio.jp: 東京大学大学院理学系研究科修了。新卒でアクセンチュア(株)に入社し製造小売業の経営コンサルティングに従事。その後(株)リクルートに転じ、新規事業開発室にて自ら企画・立案した事業の立ち上げを複数経験。(株)ispaceにて、創業株主＆取締役COOとしてビジネス全般を統括。社員2名から200名へのスケールアップを経験。株式会社Midtownを創業。複数の大手企業、スタートアップ企業のCXOやアドバイザー、東京科学大学特任教授。

company.jp: 株式会社The Bedrock Space Group

bio.en: At 15 (3rd year of junior high),  decided to devote himself to space. Founded a company with no initial business plan. Through trips to the U.S. and engagement with stakeholders, reached research and demonstration of SSPS (space solar power systems). Currently raising a funding round on the order of 1 billion yen.
bio.jp: 15歳中学3年生の時に人生を振り返り、本当にやりたいことを考えた結果宇宙に命を賭けることを決意。事業プランゼロで起業。その後アメリカ出張や関係者との交流を重ね、SSPSの研究及び実証に辿り着き、現在10億円規模の資金調達を実施中。

name.jp: ハムザウィ カリーム

role.jp: グローバルビジネス開発担当部長

bio.en: Karim began his career at IBM Japan’s R&D Lab, transitioning from software engineering to strategy planning, before moving to the business side at Taiwanese startup Ubitus. Driven by a consistent passion for creating business value through deep-tech innovation, Karim joined Preferred Networks in 2015. Since then, he has led a broad portfolio of cutting-edge initiatives—from early-stage R&D to commercialization—across domains such as cancer diagnostics, autonomous driving, petroleum refinery automation, materials discovery, and generative AI foundation model development. Appointed to his current role in 2025, he now leads the company’s global expansion and fosters strategic partnerships with international enterprises.
bio.jp: 日本IBM大和ソフトウェア開発研究所にてソフトウェアエンジニアおよび企画担当を務めた後、台湾発のベンチャー企業Ubitusにてビジネスサイドを経験。一貫してディープテックを通じたビジネス価値創造を志し、2015年に株式会社Preferred Networksへ参画。がん診断、自動運転、石油精製プラントの自動運転、新材料探索、さらには生成AI基盤モデル開発に至るまで、最先端技術の研究開発・インキュベーションから社会実装（実用化）まで多岐にわたるプロジェクトに従事。2025年よりグローバルビジネス開発担当部長に就任し、海外企業との戦略的パートナーシップ構築をはじめとするグローバル展開を推進している

bio.en: In April 2010, she flew aboard Space Shuttle Discovery as a mission specialist on STS-131, an assembly and resupply mission to the International Space Station (ISS). In 2018, she co-founded the Space Port Japan Association and has since served as its representative director, working to promote the space industry in Japan. Since 2021, she has been dedicated to educating the next generation as president of the Young Astronaut Club Japan. She has served in roles such as General Manager of Vast Japan, which is involved in the development of commercial space stations since 2025.
bio.jp: 2010年 国際宇宙ステーション(ISS)組立補給ミッションに従事。内閣府宇宙政策委員会委員及び部会委員、一般社団法人スペースポートジャパン代表理事、公益財団法人日本宇宙少年団(YAC)理事長、民間宇宙ステーション開発のVast Japanゼネラルマネージャーなどを歴任する。

role.jp: イノベーション部　次長（スタートアップ担当）

bio.en: Noriya Tarutani is the Deputy Director General of the Innovation Department at JETRO, overseeing its startup programs. With over 20 years of experience in startups and international business, he has supported more than 500 Japanese companies in expanding globally. In San Francisco and Silicon Valley, he collaborated with various global accelerators such as Berkeley SkyDeck on PMF validation and fundraising programs, while promoting J-Startup internationally. After returning to Japan, he helped connect global accelerators, VCs, and corporations with the Japanese ecosystem, contributing to the launch of Techstars Tokyo and Alchemist Japan.
bio.jp: ジェトロ入構後、20年以上にわたり、東京、トロント、サンフランシスコ、シリコンバレー等において、日系スタートアップの海外展開や海外企業の日本進出業務に従事。Techstars、Berkeley SkyDeck、Alchemistなど著名アクセラレーターやVCと連携し、PMF検証や資金調達支援・パートナー発掘を目的としたアクセラレーションプログラムを立ち上げ・運営に従事。2023年4月から現職。ジェトロのスタートアップ・プログラムを統括している。

company.jp: 株式会社ニューラルポート

bio.en: Graduated from the School of Human Sciences, Osaka University, and completed a Master's degree at the Graduate School of Human Sciences, Osaka University. During her studies, she served as a Visiting Researcher at the International Research Center for Neurointelligence (IRCN) at the University of Tokyo, conducting research on the differentiation of neurodevelopmental disorders through eye-tracking. She subsequently worked as a Research Engineer at the Advanced Telecommunications Research Institute International (ATR) while on leave from her doctoral program, engaging in brain information research. In 2020, she co-founded NeuralPort Inc., and in 2022 launched the company's core business focused on the social implementation of VR-based eye-tracking technology for measuring brain fatigue. In 2024, she was selected for Forbes JAPAN Women In Tech 30. She is currently also enrolled in the Entrepreneur Course of the Doctoral Program at the Graduate School of Engineering, Osaka University.
bio.jp: 大阪大学人間科学部卒業。大阪大学大学院人間科学研究科修士課程修了。在学中に東京大学ニューロインテリジェンス国際研究機構の客員研究員を務め、視線計測による発達神経障害の鑑別をテーマに研究に従事。その後大学院休学中に国際電気通信基礎技術研究所の専任研究技術員として脳情報研究に従事。2020年株式会社ニューラルポート設立、2022年に視線計測型VRを用いた脳疲労測定技術の社会実装を目指し、事業化をスタート。2024年にForbes JAPAN Women In Tech 30に選出。現在は大阪大学大学院工学研究科博士課程アントレプレナーコース所属。

bio.en: Graduated from the Faculty of Environmental and Urban Engineering at Kansai University. After founding and exiting several IT companies, he established AstroX in 2022 with the vision of “Regaining ‘Japan as No. 1’ in Space Development.” and is advancing the development of small launch vehicles using the Rockoon method.
bio.jp: 関西大学環境都市工学部卒。複数のIT企業を創業・売却後、『宇宙開発で“Japan as No. 1”を取り戻す』を掲げ、2022年にAstroXを設立しロックーン方式の小型ロケット開発を推進。

company.en: Mitsubishi UFJ Morgan Stanley Securities Co., Ltd.
company.jp: 三菱UFJモルガン・スタンレー証券株式会社

role.jp: スタートアップ・アクセラレーション部 部長 / マネージング・ディレクター

bio.en: Established “SAT” in 2019 and have 25 years of investment banking experience. Joined Morgan Stanley IBD (FIG) in 2007, engaged in M&A and finance including IPOs towards insurance companies, banks and other financial institutions. Before joining Morgan Stanley, via Dai-Ichi Life, joined Nikko Salomon Smith Barney in 2000, engaged in M&A and finance.
bio.jp: 2019年SAT創設。2007年よりモルガン・スタンレー、投資銀行本部のFIGにて保険会社及び銀行を始めとする金融機関のM&A / ファイナンス案件に従事。モルガン・スタンレー入社以前は、第一生命保険にて法人営業を担当した後、2000年より日興ソロモン・スミス・バーニーの投資銀行本部にて、金融機関及び事業会社のM&A / ファイナンス案件を担当

company.en: Mitsubishi UFJ Morgan Stanley Securities Co., Ltd.
company.jp: 三菱UFJモルガン・スタンレー証券株式会社

role.jp: チーフ・サステナビリティ・オフィサー

bio.en: Joined The Mitsubishi Bank, Ltd. (now MUFG Bank, Ltd.) in 1992. She has held senior roles across Corporate Banking, Human Resources, and Corporate Communications, including Head of the Seijo Branch and General Manager of Human Resources Division, and Executive Officer and Head of the Corporate Communications Division, followed by Executive Officer and Head of Financial Institutions & Public Sector Division.She became Corporate Officer and Head of Corporate Communications at Mitsubishi UFJ Morgan Stanley Securities Co., Ltd. (“MUMSS”) in April 2022, and was appointed Managing Executive Officer of both MUMSS and Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group, Inc. in April 2024. She has served in her current position since April 2025.She was a founding member of MUFG Bank’s Women’s Empowerment Promotion Working Group and has been engaged in diversity initiatives through an NPO since 2007.She is married with two daughters.
bio.jp: 1992年    三菱銀行（現三菱UFJ銀行）入行。 法人営業、人事部、広報部などを担当し、成城支社長、人事部部長、執行役員コーポレート・コミュニケーション部長、同金融法人部長を経て、2022年4月より三菱UFJモルガン・スタンレー証券　執行役員広報部長、2024年4月三菱UFJモルガン・スタンレー証券及び三菱UFJフィナンシャル・グループの常務執行役員、2025年4月より現職。三菱UFJ銀行の女性活躍推進ワーキンググループ初代メンバー（2006年）、NPO法人でダイバーシティ推進活動にも従事(2007年～）。家族は夫・娘2人。

role.jp: セキュリティサイエンス研究所 所長

bio.en: Since joining Fujitsu Laboratories in 2004, he has been engaged in research and development of next-generation networks. In 2020, at Uvance Core Technology Unit, he was responsible for developing commercial services utilizing blockchain and Web3 technologies. In 2023, he was appointed Head of the Data & Security Laboratory, and from 2026, as Head of the Security Science Laboratory, he has been involved in emerging security fields in cyber-physical domains, including countermeasures against disinformation, AI trust/security, and digital twins. He holds a Ph.D. in Information Science and serves as a visiting professor at Shizuoka University.
bio.jp: 2004年富士通研究所へ入社以来、次世代ネットワークの研究開発に従事。2020年Uvance Core Technology本部にてブロックチェーンやWeb3技術を活用した商用サービス開発を担務。2023年データ＆セキュリティ研究所所長に就任し、2026年よりセキュリティサイエンス研究所所長として、偽情報対策やAIトラスト/セキュリティ、デジタルツインなど、サイバーフィジカルの新領域セキュリティの研究開発に従事。博士（情報科学）、静岡大学客員教授。

role.jp: シニアリサーチマネージャー

bio.en: Since joining Fujitsu Laboratories in 2014, he has been engaged in research and development of wireless network control and advanced network operations. Building on his expertise as a network specialist, he has been responsible for R&D in data distribution and data trust, as well as business incubation activities. Since 2020, he has been developing commercial trust data platform services that enable secure data distribution and utilization across different systems and services. From 2025, he has been involved in research and development of disinformation countermeasure technologies as part of the Social Trust Core Project.
bio.jp: 2014年富士通研究所へ入社以来、無線ネットワーク制御およびネットワーク運用高度化の研究開発に従事。ネットワークスペシャリストとしての知見を元にデータ流通やデータトラストの研究開発およびビジネスインキュベーション活動を担務。2020年より異なるシステムやサービス間での安全なデータ流通と活用を実現するトラストデータ基盤の商用サービスを開発。2025年よりソーシャルトラストコアプロジェクトにて偽情報対策技術の研究開発に従事。

bio.jp: 早稲田大学 博士2年

bio.en: Joined The Asahi Shimbun in 2003. PhD in Information Science. After working in the Systems Department and Media Lab, among others, he assumed his current position. From July 2015 to June 2016, he was a Visiting Fellow at Stanford University's Walter H. Shorenstein Asia-Pacific Research Center.
bio.jp: 2003年、朝日新聞社入社。博士（情報科学）。システム部、メディアラボなどを経て現職。2015年7月～2016年6月スタンフォード大学アジア太平洋研究所客員研究員。

bio.en: After graduating with a degree in Psychology from Doshisha University, Momikura held key roles in business planning, marketing, and advertising at Fujitsu and Recruit. Following a tenure as COO of "Dream Gate"—an entrepreneur support project by the Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI)—he gained independence by founding Nexgate (currently Retribe Co., Ltd.) in 2007.He received the 2024 Tokyo Venture Technology Encouragement Award, and was consecutively selected as one of the "100 Companies Creating Future Markets" by Nikkei Shimbun and Nikkei Trendy in 2021 and 2022. Momikura is actively forging alliances with numerous corporations by leveraging AI-driven avatar technology and blockchain.Most recently, he acquired a patent for "Token Marketing," a system utilizing blockchain technology. He is currently spearheading the blockchain awareness phase with deep knowledge and robust solutions for the approaching stablecoin era.
bio.jp: 同志社大学心理学卒業後、富士通、リクルートにて事業企画・マーケティング・広告宣伝領域を歴任。経済産業省 起業家創造事業ドリームゲートCOOを経て、2007年にネクスゲート社（現リトライブ社）を創業し独立。令和6年東京都ベンチャー技術奨励賞受賞。2021年、2022年日経新聞・日経トレンディ「未来の市場をつくる100社」に連続選出。AIを駆使したアバター技術とブロックチェーンにて、多くの企業とアライアンスを展開。直近はブロックチェーン技術を駆使する「トークンマーケティング」の特許を取得。来るステーブルコイン時代にナレッジとソリューション力にて、ブロックチェーン啓発期を牽引。

bio.jp: 法政大学国際高等学校

bio.en: He graduated from the Faculty of Law at the University of Tokyo. In April 2002, he was appointed as manager at the IT & Systems Planning Division of Mizuho Corporate Bank (stationed in the Americas). After serving as Deputy General Manager of the European Business Division at Mizuho Bank, Branch Manager of the Ho Chi Minh Branch, Branch Manager of the Hanoi Branch, and General Manager of the Third Corporate Banking Division, he became Deputy President and Executive Officer in charge of Overseas and Eastern Japan areas as of April 2025. He is a native of Osaka City.
bio.jp: 東京大法学部卒。2002年4月、みずほコーポレート銀行IT・システム統括部調査役（米州駐在）。みずほ銀行欧州業務部次長、ホーチミン支店長、ハノイ支店長、営業第三部長などを経て、25年4月から副頭取執行役員海外・東日本地区担当。大阪市出身。

bio.en: Joined Venture Online Co., Ltd. in 2002, then joined Shanghai Tuosai Advertising Co., Ltd. in 2012. Founded TOHOKI Co., Ltd. in 2016 and established tenshabi Co., Ltd. in 2021.
bio.jp: 2002年に株式会社ベンチャー・オンラインへ入社後、2012年に上海拓賽広告有限公司へ入社。2016年に株式会社TOHOKIを設立し、2021年に株式会社tenshabiを設立。

bio.en: Joined Obayashi Corporation in 2010, working in construction management for large-scale civil engineering projects in Japan. He earned an MBA from Macquarie University in 2018 and subsequently conducted research and development on digital twins at the University of Tokyo. In 2023, his team won the Grand Prix in the Co-Creation category at CEATEC.In 2025, he left Obayashi and co-founded Common Ground Co., Ltd. with Keisuke Toyota, who had led this research centred on “Common Ground” technology. Building on this, the company develops this  for the real-time sharing of human body movements and has opened an experience space at Shibuya SOIL, an open innovation space, in collaboration with Tokyu Corporation. Currently, he is also working to establish the Common Ground Consortium for further expanding the new communication infrastructure.
bio.jp: 2010年に大林組入社、国内大規模土木現場の施工管理に従事。2018年マッコーリー大学MBA取得。帰国後、東京大学にてデジタルツイン等の研究開発に従事。2023年にCEATEC コ・クリエイション（共創）部門でグランプリ受賞等。2025年に大林組を退職、人の身体動作をリアルタイムに共有する「コモングラウンド」技術を軸に、本研究をリードしてきた東京大学豊田啓介特任教授（顧問）と株式会社COMMONGROUNDを創業。2025年11月、東急㈱の渋谷SOILに体験施設を設置。現在は、この新しいコミュニケーションインフラの拡張を目指す、コモングラウンド・コンソーシアムの設立に向けて尽力している。

role.en: Rikkyo University College of Economics 4th year

bio.jp: 立教大学経営学部4年

bio.en: Following a career at a major audit firm and a startup consultancy, established pilot boat LLC in 2017. Focuses on bridging the startup ecosystem through owned media, event production, and strategic research for CVCs and acceleration programs.
bio.jp: 1987年生まれ。明治大学経営学部卒、早稲田大学大学院会計研究科修了。在学中公認会計士試験合格。大手監査法人・スタートアップ支援会社を経て、2017年に合同会社pilot boatを設立。CVCやアクセラレーションプログラムのオウンドメディアコンテンツ制作・イベント運営・リサーチ等を手掛ける。

role.en: ManagerValue Creation GroupReal Estate Operations Division
role.jp: 不動産運用事業部　渋谷・沿線価値創造グループ　参事

bio.en: Joined Tokyu Corporation in 2008. Worked on electronic payment initiatives using PASMO as well as Wi-Fi services within railway stations. Leveraging the company’s entrepreneurship program, launched “Furusato Palette,” a Japan’s “Furusato Nozei” hometown tax donation platform operated by Tokyu. Based on insights from an internal ideathon, proposed a digital twin Shibuya project utilizing the popular game Fortnite. In collaboration with tenshabi Co., Ltd., developed an original game map precisely replicating the area around Shibuya Station, which was launched at SusHi Tech Tokyo 2025.
bio.jp: 2008年、東京急行電鉄（現：東急）入社。PASMOによる電子マネー事業や、駅構内でのWi-Fi事業などを担当。社内起業家制度を利用し、東急が運営するふるさと納税のプラットフォーム「ふるさとパレット」を立ち上げ。社内アイデアソンから得た着想をもとに、人気ゲーム「Fortnite」を活用したデジタルツイン渋谷の取組を立案し、株式会社tenshabiとの共創のもと、渋谷駅周辺を精密に再現したオリジナルゲームマップをSusHi Tech Tokyo 2025でローンチ。

name.jp: Business Contest KING 実行委員会

role.jp: フューチャー・デザイン・ラボ　参事

bio.en: Joined Tokyu Corporation in 2005. Worked in the building business, including leasing spaces beneath elevated railway structures and in station buildings. In 2008, took a leave of absence to enroll in the Graduate School of Media Design at Keio University, conducting research on digital media and spatial utilization. After returning to Tokyu, applied insights gained in graduate school across a wide range of roles, including urban redevelopment, event development, area management, and feasibility studies and implementation planning for autonomous driving technologies. Currently serving as project manager at Tokyu, leading a co-creation project with COMMONGROUND Co., Ltd.
bio.jp: 2005年、東京急行電鉄（現：東急）入社。高架下や駅ビルの賃貸など、ビル事業を担当。2008年、休職して慶應義塾大学大学院メディアデザイン研究科に入学し、デジタルメディアと空間活用を研究。復職後は大学院での知見を活かし、再開発やイベント誘致、エリアマネジメント、自動運転の実装検討など、幅広い職務を歴任。株式会社COMMONGROUNDが知見を有する「空間重畳技術」の社会実装に向け、東急側のマネージャーとしてプロジェクトを推進中。

role.en: Keio University Faculty of Economics 2nd year
role.jp: 慶應義塾大学経済学部2年

role.en: Senior Director for International Collaboration Planning,Bureau of Digital Services
role.jp: デジタルサービス局 国際連携企画担当部長

bio.en: Joined the Tokyo Metropolitan Government in 2001, he began his career at the Bureau of Construction, where he was engaged in budgeting, management, and public relations for infrastructure facilities, including roads, rivers, and parks.He was seconded to the organizing committees of major international sporting events, such as the Tokyo 2020 Olympic and Paralympic Games and the World Athletics Championships Tokyo 25 (hereinafter “WCH Tokyo 25”) held in 2025, engaging in marketing and branding. For WCH Tokyo 25, he served as the person responsible for brand development and management— covering elements such as medals, mascots, and venue dressing— and made a significant contribution to the successful delivery of the event.Since April 2026, he has served as Senior Director for International Collaboration Planning at the Bureau of Digital Services, Tokyo Metropolitan Government, where he is leading initiatives to promote international collaboration in the digital field.
bio.jp: 2001年、東京都に入都。建設局で道路、河川、公園といったインフラ施設の予算、管理及び広報業務に従事。また、東京2020オリンピック・パラリンピック競技大会や東京2025世界陸上競技選手権大会（以下「東京2025世界陸上」）といった国際スポーツイベントにおいて、組織委員会に派遣され、マーケティング及びブランド部門の業務に携わる。特に、東京2025世界陸上においては、メダル、マスコットや会場装飾をはじめとするブランド構築及び管理の責任者として、大会の成功に貢献した。2026年4月から、東京都デジタルサービス局国際連携企画担当部長として、デジタル分野における国際連携に取り組んでいる。

bio.en: Graduated from the University of Tokyo in 2016 and joined SmartNews, Inc. the same year, where he was responsible for media business development. After becoming independent in 2019, he supported the growth of numerous web media outlets—primarily for television stations, publishers, and newspapers—through consulting centered on data analysis, and subsequently co-founded StoryHub, Inc. in 2022.
bio.jp: 2016年東京大学卒業。同年スマートニュース株式会社に入社し、メディア事業開発を担当。 2019年に独立し、データ分析を軸としたコンサルティングにより、テレビ局・出版社・新聞社を中心に多数のWebメディアの成長を支援。2022年にStoryHub株式会社を共同創業。
