bio.en: Developed a foundation in vocal performance through her junior high broadcasting club and professional experience at a voice acting agency. Currently a student newscaster at TV Asahi.
bio.jp: 学時代から放送部にて声の表現に親しむ。声優事務所への所属を経て、現在はテレビ朝日にて学生キャスターを務める。

role.jp: Headline Asia プリンシパル/ IVS 代表

bio.en: Conducted molecular biology and neuroscience research at RIKEN while in graduate school at Osaka University. Joined Headline Asia in 2017; in addition to investing, manages IVS, a community of about 700 IT executives. Helped found 17LIVE, which became Japan’s top revenue live streaming service within two years. Became Representative Director in 2020; IVS2025 KYOTO—evolved from invite only to open—drew 13,000 participants. Working to create a new IVS for entrepreneurs.
bio.jp: 大阪大学大学院在学中、理化学研究所で分子生物学/神経学を研究。2017年にHeadline Asia入社後、投資活動に加え、約700名のIT経営者が集う「IVS」を運営。17LIVE創業にも携わり、2年で国内ライブ配信業界の売上1位を達成。2020年より代表取締役に就任し、招待制からオープンへ進化させた「IVS2025 KYOTO」では1.3万人が参加。起業家のため新たなIVSを創るべく奔走中。

company.jp: 株式会社taliki / talikiファンド

role.en: Representative Director and CEO of taliki Co., Ltd./Representative Partner of taliki Fund
role.jp: 株式会社taliki代表取締役CEO / talikiファンド代表パートナー

bio.en: Born in 1995, graduated from Kyoto University.  As leader of a student international cooperation organization, oversaw the construction of two schools in Cambodia. Studied at a New York business school and worked at a local news bureau as an assistant producer, covering the 2016 U.S. presidential election and the UN General Assembly. After returning to Japan, founded taliki to support players tackling social issues. Has incubated 400+ social entrepreneurs and promoted business development and open innovation at listed companies. In 2020, founded an impact VC as Japan’s youngest female representative and has since been active in investing. She was selected as one of Forbes JAPAN2023's "Under 30 Change the World."
bio.jp: 1995年生まれ、京都大学卒。大学在学中に国際協力団体の代表としてカンボジアに2校の学校建設を行う。その後、ニューヨークのビジネススクールへ留学。現地報道局に勤務し、アシスタントプロデューサーとして2016年大統領選や国連総会の取材に携わる。様々な経験を通して「社会課題を解決するプレイヤーの支援」の必要性を感じ、帰国後に株式会社talikiを設立。400以上の社会起業家のインキュベーションや上場企業の事業開発・オープンイノベーション推進を行いながら、2020年には国内最年少の女性代表として社会課題解決VCを設立し投資活動にも従事。Forbes JAPAN2023「世界を変える30歳未満」選出。

company.en: Ren Miyake（4th year at Gifu University）

bio.en: Joined Hakuhodo in 2007, working across marketing, PR, and creative; after TBWA HAKUHODO, founded The Breakthrough Company GO in 2017 with a mission to support social change and bold challenges through creativity. Works broadly from national‑brand marketing (major convenience chains, megabanks, etc.) to startup and municipal projects. Winner of numerous awards including Cannes Lions, PR Award Grand Prix, and ACC TOKYO CREATIVITY AWARDS Grand Prix / Minister of Internal Affairs and Communications Award. Author of five books, including “Gengokaryoku (If You Can Put It into Words, You Can Change Your Life)” (No. 1 on Amazon’s business rankings) and “Super Creative: Moving Reality with Ideation × Implementation.” Host of THE CREATIVE ACADEMY.
bio.jp: HAKUHODOを経て2017年にThe Breakthrough Company GOを設立。クリエイティブの力で社会の変化と挑戦を支援することをミッションに掲げる。コンビニ大手からメガバンクといったナショナルクライアントのマーケティングから、スタートアップや自治体のプロジェクトまで幅広く手掛ける。Cannes Lions、PRアワードグランプリ、ACC TOKYO CREATIVITY AWORDS グランプリ/総務大臣賞など受賞多数。著書『言語化力（言葉にできれば人生は変わる）』（SBクリエイティブ）がAmazonのビジネス書ランキングで１位に。『超クリエイティブ 発想 × 実装で現実を動かす』（文藝春秋）ほか著書は5冊。THE CREATIVE ACADEMY主催。

bio.en: Born in Tokyo in 2001.  Moved to Canada after junior high and lived there until age 19. Became interested in education through experiences such as interning at a local elementary school. Won Japan and placed 4th globally in Google’s Youth Verification Challenge, an international fact‑checking competition, in 2022. Co‑founded Classroom Adventure with three classmates from the same university lab. Also founded and operates YOMY Inc., an online early‑childhood education company.
bio.jp: 2001年、東京生まれ。中学卒業後カナダへ渡り19歳まで暮らす。現地小学校でのインターン経験などから教育に興味を持ち活動する。2022年にGoogleが主催するファクトチェックの世界大会”Youth Verification　Challenge”で日本優勝、世界4位。同じ大学の研究室から一緒に大会に出場した3人でClassroom Adventureを立ち上げる。またオンラインでの幼児教育を行う株式会社YOMYも立ち上げ運営。

company.jp: 株式会社ロフトワーク

role.jp: QWSコミュニティーマネージャー

bio.en: Works across education, management, and community, with design as a starting point. Interested in creating spaces that connect people, she continues to take on new challenges guided by curiosity. Hobbies include swimming and making things.
bio.jp: デザインを起点に、教育やマネジメント、コミュニティ領域で活動。人と人がつながる場づくりに関心を持ち、好奇心の赴くまま新しい挑戦を続けている。趣味は水泳とものづくり。

role.jp: コンテンツクリエイター

bio.en: An american creator learning Japanese through street interviews. By speaking daily with people from various professions and age groups, he shares his journey of learning the language and discovering Japanese culture.
bio.jp: ストリートインタビューを通して日本語習得を目指すアメリカ出身のクリエイター。さまざまな職や年代の方に日々インタビューをすることで日本語習得や日本の文化に触れることで日本を知っていく様子を発信。

role.jp: Compassly Co-founder・ミネルバ大学（休学中）

bio.en: Began studying in the United States in 9th grade and graduated from a local high school. While in school, helped run an education‑focused NPO and supported extracurricular programs for middle and high school students. In 11th grade, launched the YouTube channel “Riko Yoshiura” to share insights and information about studying abroad and global experiences (still active).
bio.jp: 純ジャパから中学3年でアメリカ留学を開始し、現地で高校を卒業。在学中は教育系NPO運営や中高生向け課外活動支援事業に取り組む。高校2年時には教育の文脈でYouTubeチャンネル「Riko Yoshiura」を開設し、海外情報を発信（現在も継続中）。高校卒業後は、世界を移動しながら学ぶミネルバ大学に進学。在学中にソフトウェア開発を始めてから事業「Compassly」を立ち上げ、エンジェル投資を調達。2年次修了と同時に休学。キャリアを考える学生が、リアル体験を楽しみながら本当の「やりたい」を見つけられるデジタル職場体験ゲームを開発。人生理念は「新しいときめきを創造し、提供し続けること」。

company.en: A part-time lecturer at the University of Tokyo

role.en: the second head of the Takafuji-ryu school of Japanese dance
role.jp: 日本舞踊孝藤流二代目

bio.en: Manages, supervises, and choreographs numerous high‑profile Bon Odori events. His portfolio includes the Anisong Bon Odori at the Kanda Myojin Noryo Festival—one of Tokyo’s largest summer festivals, attracting tens of thousands of participants—as well as the Super Niconico Bon Odori at Niconico Chokaigi, Japan’s premier online‑to‑offline convention. With a global vision, he co‑founded the World Bon Odori Association (WORLD BON BON) with JICA, blending diverse international cultures with Japanese tradition. As an international dancer, he is dedicated to “peace through the circle of dance.” Notable achievements include an “African Bon Odori” at a pre‑conference festival and leading the Osaka–Kansai Expo finale with traditional dance.
bio.jp: 毎年数万人以上が参加する都内最大級の神田明神納涼祭のアニソン盆踊りや日本最大級のネット発リアルイベントであるニコニコ超会議内、超ニコニコ盆踊りの監修・出演・振付など多くの盆踊りイベントを手がける。世界へ向け、JICA(国際協力機構)と連携し、各国の文化をMIXさせた世界盆踊り(WORLD BON BON)協会立ち上げ、国際会議前夜祭でのアフリカ盆踊りや大阪・関西万博のフィナーレを盆踊りで飾るなど｢踊りの輪で世界に平和を｣をテーマに国際舞踊家として活躍する。

name.jp: 東京大学盆踊りサークル

bio.en: Dr. Anas Bataw is a seasoned ConTech leader, investor, and ecosystem builder. Playing a pivotal role in propelling Sustainability, Advanced Technology and Modern Methods within the MENA construction industry. His significant impact has contributed to the development and deployment of disruptive ventures and businesses across MENA, the UK, and Singapore.Demonstrates exceptional leadership in establishing and managing impactful open innovation programs and venture funds at both corporate and national levels. His unique ability to build robust business cases, develop ecosystems, and value realization has set him apart in the industry.Dr. Anas has been recognised through numerous prestigious accolades that underscore his influence and expertise. His notable awards and recognitions include Global Innovations Leader (2022), Technology Strategist of the Year (2020), and Best Contribution to Global Innovations by the Singapore Government (2019).Beyond his corporate endeavors, Dr. Anas actively participates in non-profit task groups such as the United Nations and World Economic Forum driving innovations, technology, and sustainability. His commitment to these causes is complemented by his academic contributions at esteemed universities, where he engages in research and publications that further the field of technology and innovation in the built environment.
bio.jp: Anas博士は、ConTech分野におけるリーダー、投資家、エコシステムビルダー。MENA地域の建設業界において、サステナビリティ、先端技術、モダンメソッドの推進を主導。MENA、英国、シンガポールにおいて、イノベーションをもたらすベンチャーおよび事業の創出・展開に大きく貢献。また、企業レベルおよび国家レベルでのオープンイノベーションプログラムやベンチャーファンドの設立・運営において卓越したリーダーシップを発揮してきた。事業計画の構築、エコシステム形成、価値創出について業界内で高い評価を確立している。Global Innovations Leader（2022）、Technology Strategist of the Year（2020）、シンガポール政府のBest Contribution to Global Innovations（2019）など、国際的に権威ある表彰を受賞。さらに、国連や世界経済フォーラム（WEF）などの非営利タスクフォースに参画し、技術革新およびサステナビリティの推進に取り組んでいる。加えて、複数の大学において研究・出版活動を行い、建築・都市分野におけるテクノロジーおよびイノベーションの発展に寄与。

bio.en: Anshu is an impact investment and sustainability professional dedicated to advancing inclusive, climate resilient growth across Africa. With over 12 years of experience, her work has focused on deploying catalytic capital into entrepreneurs, projects, and blended finance structures that generate measurable social impact alongside sustainable financial returns.At Shell Foundation, she leads strategic partnerships, enterprise growth initiatives, and new market expansion across the region, while providing hands on business and strategic support to a portfolio of pioneering ventures and investment partners.
bio.jp: Anshu氏は、アフリカにおけるインクルーシビティ、気候レジリエンスの推進に取り組む、インパクト投資およびサステナビリティの専門家。12年以上にわたり、起業家、事業プロジェクト等に対し、社会的インパクトと持続可能な財務リターンの双方を実現する資本の提供に従事してきた。Shell Foundationにおいては、地域全体を対象とした戦略的パートナーシップ、企業成長支援、新市場展開を主導。あわせて、先進的なベンチャー企業や投資パートナーに対し、実践的な事業支援および戦略的サポートを提供している。

bio.en: Cameron Teitelman, founded StartX and served as its CEO for nine years, concurrently leading the Stanford-StartX Fund. His expertise extends beyond Stanford, having significantly contributed to entrepreneurship initiatives at over 20 universities, including prominent roles with Berkeley SkyDeck and Harvard Innovation Labs.As CEO of Nexus Events, he developed a community platform integral to institutions like Harvard and Stanford for over eight years. His career demonstrates an unwavering commitment to fostering innovation and entrepreneurship, making him an ideal leader for the GSC initiative.
bio.jp: Cameron氏は、StartXの創設者として9年間にわたりCEOを務め、Stanford-StartX Fundを同時に率いてきた。スタンフォードにとどまらず、Berkeley SkyDeckやHarvard Innovation Labsをはじめ、20以上の大学における起業家育成およびイノベーション推進の取り組みに深く関与している。また、Nexus EventsのCEOとして8年以上にわたり、ハーバード大学やスタンフォード大学などを中核とする機関に不可欠なコミュニティプラットフォームを構築・運営。イノベーションと起業家精神の醸成に一貫して取り組んできた経験を基に、GSCイニシアチブを率いる。

bio.en: Dr. Mahmoud AlBurai is currently serving as Senior Advisor at Dubai Municipality. Prior to this role, Dr. AlBurai served as the CEO of the Dubai Real Estate Institute for 10 years, during which time the institute graduated 80,000 real estate professionals from the region. He is currently the Chairman of the UNDRR Arise network in the UAE working on making businesses more resilient, in alignment with the Sendai Framework. He is also the Vice President of the International Real Estate Federation, FIABCI Arab Countries since 2016 and sits on the board of the International Real Estate Federation, the world’s largest global real estate network with more than 1.5 million associate members. Prior to this role, he served on the Board of the International Real Estate Society (IRES) for 5 years and the Board of the National Association of Realtors (NAR), a 1.3-million-member real estate network based in Chicago, from 2019-2020. Dr. AlBurai served as the Chairman of the UN Global Compact UAE from 2015-2020 and represented the MENA region on the UN Global Compact Advisory Board from 2016-2018. In his role as UN Global Compact MENA representative, Dr. AlBurai led many SDG driven initiatives. He started youth ambassador programs at seven UAE universities, recruiting over 150 youth and training them to help businesses become more sustainable. He also led the establishment of the Women Empowerment Principles Platform in the UAE with 60 companies signing on to the initiative. To promote SDGs among businesses, Dr. AlBurai launched SDGs Pioneers UAE celebrating SDG success stories of private and governmental organizations. Dr. AlBurai has been selected to be the FIABCI representative at the United Nations Economic Commission for West Asia (UNESCWA) and UNECE (Geneva). Recently, he established a Think Tank in Geneva under the name of the Middle East Sustainable Development Institute(MESDI) to lobby governments, businesses and communities to action on SDGs in the Middle East. He has actively lobbied the private sector in the region to be involved in SDGs. During his presidency of the MESDI, the UAE local network became the fastest growing network internationally. Moreover, Dr. AlBurai leads the affordable housing working-group at the World Economic Forum, and also serves as an advisor-MENA region at Happy City Lab, headquartered in Canada, that works on integrating happiness into urban design.
bio.jp: Mahmoud氏は、ドバイ自治体（Dubai Municipality）のシニア・アドバイザーを務める。これまで10年間にわたりDubai Real Estate InstituteのCEOとして同機関を率い、地域全体で8万人の不動産プロフェッショナルを輩出してきた。現在は、仙台防災枠組に基づき企業のレジリエンス強化を推進するUNDRR ARISEネットワーク（UAE）の議長を務めるほか、2016年より国際不動産連盟 (FIABCI)においてアラブ諸国の副会長を務め、150万人超の会員を擁する世界最大級の不動産ネットワークであるFIABCI本部の理事も兼任している。加えて、International Real Estate Society（IRES）の理事、米国シカゴに本部を置くNational Association of Realtors（NAR）の理事も歴任してきた。また、2015年から2020年にかけてUN Global CompactにてUAEの議長を務め、2016年から2018年にはUN Global Compact Advisory BoardにおいてMENA地域代表としてSDGs主導の各種イニシアチブを推進。UAEの7大学でユース・アンバサダープログラムを立ち上げ、150人超の若者を育成したほか、60社が参画するWomen Empowerment Principlesプラットフォームの設立を主導している。さらに、官民組織のSDGs成功事例を表彰するSDGs Pioneers UAEを創設。近年は、国連西アジア経済社会委員会（UNESCWA）およびUNECE（ジュネーブ）におけるFIABCI代表を務めるとともに、ジュネーブにMiddle East Sustainable Development Institute（MESDI）を設立。中東地域におけるSDGs推進に向け、政府・企業・コミュニティへの政策提言と民間セクターの関与拡大を主導してきた。さらに、世界経済フォーラム（WEF）にてアフォーダブル・ハウジング分野のワーキンググループを主導するほか、カナダに本拠を置くHappy City LabのMENA地域アドバイザーとして、都市デザインへのウェルビーイング統合にも取り組んでいる。

role.en: Group Chief Corporate Affairs Officer, Executive Officer
role.jp: Group Chief Corporate Affairs Officer, Executive Officer

bio.en: Drahomíra Mandíková is the Group Chief Corporate Affairs Officer at Asahi Group Holdings, based in Tokyo. Her career in the brewing industry began 26 years ago in her native Slovakia. Since then, she has held roles at the company’s European headquarters in the Czech Republic, as well as in India, and now in Japan. In her current role, Drahomíra is responsible for sustainability and corporate communications. She has long focused on sustainability and brings a valuable perspective on how companies can achieve business success while making a positive social impact. She is also actively involved in transforming Asahi Group into a global organization. As the only foreign national in the holding company’s top management in Tokyo, she connects cultures, aligns leadership across regions, and supports company-wide change.
bio.jp: Drahomíra氏は、アサヒグループホールディングスのGroup Chief Corporate Affairs Officerを務める。スロバキアで26年前にビール業界でのキャリアを開始し、チェコ共和国の欧州本社、インドを経て、現在は日本にてグローバルに活動している。現職では、サステナビリティおよびコーポレートコミュニケーションを統括。企業が事業成長と社会的価値創出を両立するための取り組みに長年注力してきた。あわせて、アサヒグループのグローバル企業としての変革を推進している。持株会社の経営陣において唯一の外国籍メンバーとして、異なる文化をつなぎ、地域を越えた経営の整合を図るとともに、全社的な変革を支えている。

bio.en: Ian Bergman is a techno-optimist who has spent more than twenty years building bridges between people and technology – and between startups and the enterprises they reshape. As CEO of Alchemist, he leads a global platform and community for distinctive, deeply technical founders solving the hardest problems in enterprise. These builders lead companies that have collectively raised over $5B and include LaunchDarkly, Rigetti, and OneBrief.Previously Global Managing Director of Microsoft for Startups, Ian is also a two-time startup founder, active early-stage investor and LP, and host of the award-winning Innovators Inside podcast. He holds an MBA from UW Foster and a BA from Oberlin College.
bio.jp: Ian氏は、20年以上にわたり、人とテクノロジー、そしてスタートアップとそれによって変革されるエンタープライズをつなぐ取り組みに従事。AlchemistのCEOとして、エンタープライズ領域の最も困難な課題に挑む、深い技術力を有する起業家を支援するグローバルなプラットフォームとコミュニティを率いる。Alchemistから生まれた企業群は、これまでに総額50億ドル超の資金調達を行い、LaunchDarkly、Rigetti、OneBriefなどを含む。これまでにMicrosoft for Startupsのグローバル統括責任者を務めたほか、2度の起業経験を持つシリアルアントレプレナー。アーリーステージ投資家およびLPとしても活動している。あわせて、受賞歴を持つポッドキャスト「Innovators Inside」のホストを務め、イノベーションと起業家精神の発信を続けている。

bio.en: I am a General Partner at Atinum Capital Partners (ACP), a Singapore MAS-licensed fund manager focused on bridging Northeast Asian VC opportunities with global capital. At ACP, I lead our dual strategy across fund-of-funds and direct co-investments, partnering with founders and top-tier GPs to deliver differentiated returns. Previously, I spent over a decade at Atinum Partners, South Korea’s first independent institutional single family office, where I most recently served as Head of Private Markets. During this time, I developed experience across direct investments, company building, and global VC allocations, ultimately leading the firm’s private markets platform.
bio.jp: Atinum Capital Partners（ACP）のゼネラルパートナーを務めており、シンガポール金融管理局（MAS）のライセンスを有するファンドマネージャーとして、北東アジアのVC機会とグローバル資本をつなぐことに注力。ACPでは、ファンド・オブ・ファンズとダイレクト共同投資の二本柱の戦略を統括し、起業家やトップティアのGPと連携しながら、差別化されたリターンの創出に取り組んでいる。以前は、韓国初の独立系機関投資家型シングルファミリーオフィスである Atinum Partners に10年以上在籍し、直近ではプライベートマーケット部門の責任者を務める。在任中は、ダイレクト投資、事業創出、グローバルVC投資配分など幅広い経験を積み、最終的には同社のプライベートマーケット事業全体をリード。

bio.en: Keiko is Co-Founder & CEO of LUCA Japan, the first digital platform for alternativeinvestments in Japan. With over 20 years of experience in alternative investment, she　consulted and raised capital from institutional investors for diverse private investment strategies, including private equity, real estate, infrastructure, private credit, and venture capital. She served as Head of Alternative Investment Strategy at JPMorgan AM and as Managing Director at Blackstone. Keiko holds a Master’s from Johns Hopkins SAIS.
bio.jp: LUCA Japanの共同創設者兼CEOであり、日本初のオルタナティブ投資向けデジタルプラットフォームを運営。20年以上のオルタナティブ投資の経験を持ち、プライベートエクイティ、不動産、インフラ、プライベートクレジット、ベンチャーキャピタルを含む多様なプライベート投資戦略について機関投資家にコンサルティングを行い、資金を調達。JPMorgan AMでオルタナティブ投資戦略部門の責任者、Blackstoneでマネージングディレクターを務めた。ジョンズ・ホプキンス大学SAISで修士号を取得。

bio.en: After graduating from a U.S. boarding school, he earned his degree from the University of Tsukuba. He began his career in investment banking at Morgan Stanley’s Capital Markets Division.He later worked in the private equity investment arm of an international organization led by former UK Prime Minister Tony Blair, based in the Israel/Palestine office, where he was responsible for investments in renewable energy and financial institutions across the Middle East.In 2017, he relocated to Rwanda and launched a consulting and venture investment practice focused on innovation across Africa. Through his advisory work, he has supported more than 100 local startups and over 30 Japanese companies expanding into emerging markets. As a venture investor, he has invested in startups across multiple countries, including Kenya, Uganda, Egypt, and South Africa. He is committed to advancing a sustainable startup ecosystem while pursuing a double bottom line—delivering both social impact and financial returns.
bio.jp: 米ボーディングスクール卒業後、筑波大学卒業。モルガン・スタンレーの資本市場統括本部にて投資銀行業務に従事。元英国首相トニー・ブレア氏率いる国際機関のプライベート・エクイティー投資部門（イスラエル/パレスチナオフィス）にて中東における再生可能エネルギー・金融機関への投資を担当。2017年よりルワンダに移住し、アフリカ地域におけるイノベーション分野に特化したコンサルティング事業とベンチャー投資を開始。これまでに100社を超える現地スタートアップ、30社以上の日系企業の新興国市場進出をコンサルティング事業を通じてサポート。ベンチャー投資では、ケニア、ウガンダ、エジプト、南アフリカなど複数国のスタートアップに出資。社会課題の解決と財務的リターンの両立（ダブルボトムライン）を追求しつつ、持続可能なスタートアップ・エコシステムの構築に尽力している。

bio.en: Natalie Shiori Fleming is GM Japan for Banking Circle, a next-generation technology-led payments bank which enables fintechs and banks of any scale to seize opportunities in the new economy.She previously helped lead the expansion of the fintech ecosystem in Japan as a Founding Director & Vice-Chairperson of the Fintech Association of Japan and has experience launching and expanding the Japan & APAC offices of multiple fintech startups including Wise, Payoneer and Infcurion.Natalie obtained her MBA from INSEAD and BComm from the University of British Columbia.
bio.jp: Coming soon

bio.en: Nathan serves as the Programme Director for New Energy Vehicles (NEV) at the Just Energy Transition (JET) Programme Management Office (PMO), based at the Industrial Development Corporation of South Africa (IDC). He oversees the execution of the JET Investment Plan (2023–2027) for the NEV portfolio. Additionally, he leads the IDC Automotive & NEV Value Chain Strategy and projects related to the Battery Value Chain. Ultimately, focused on scaling an ecosystem through investments to achieve development outcomes for ordinary South Africans. With nearly 14 years of investment experience at the IDC across various roles, he possesses extensive knowledge of sectors such as Automotive and Transport Equipment, Forestry and Wood Products, Chemicals, and the Medical Devices and Pharmaceutical Value Chain, having led deal teams in investing in SMEs and large-scale transactions.He is an experienced global speaker, often invited as a subject-matter expert to present on numerous international platforms, including the World Economic Forum, UNEP mobility workshops, and Smarter Mobility Africa. He has also published and contributed to several thought leadership articles and online posts. Academically, he holds degrees in Chemical Engineering and Economics.
bio.jp: Nathan氏は、南アフリカ産業開発公社（IDC）に設置されたJust Energy Transition（JET）プログラム管理オフィスにおいて、新エネルギー車（NEV）分野のプログラム・ディレクターを務める。JET投資計画（2023–2027）におけるNEVポートフォリオの実行を統括するとともに、IDCの自動車およびNEVバリューチェーン戦略、ならびにバッテリーバリューチェーン関連プロジェクトを主導している。IDCにおいて約14年にわたる投資経験を有し、自動車・輸送機器、林業・木材製品、化学、医療機器および医薬品バリューチェーンなど幅広い分野に精通。中小企業投資から大型案件まで、複数の投資案件でディールチームを率いてきた。また、World Economic Forum、UNEPのモビリティ関連ワークショップ、Smarter Mobility Africaなど、国際的な場で専門家として登壇。加えて、複数の思想的リーダーシップ記事やオンライン寄稿を行っている。学術的には、化学工学および経済学の学位を修めている。

bio.en: Nurshaffira Izzad leads the ASEAN & Global portfolio at Cradle Fund, an agency under Malaysia’s Ministry of Science, Technology and Innovation (MOSTI), where she spearheads cross‑border initiatives that enable Malaysian and ASEAN startups to access international markets, strategic partners, and growth opportunities. Cradle Fund supports startups through both grant funding and equity investments, playing a catalytic role from early validation to scale‑up stages. With over eight years of experience across the startup and innovation ecosystem, Nurshaffira focuses on building high‑impact programmes, international partnerships, and founder communities that drive sustainable economic growth and meaningful societal outcomes.Prior to joining Cradle Fund, Nurshaffira headed Strategy and Marketing Communications at Endeavor, the New York‑based global entrepreneurship organization dedicated to supporting high‑growth companies that transform economies. In this role, she worked closely with founders and ecosystem leaders across markets, supporting globally recognised scaleups such as Careem, Carsome, Farm Fresh, and Bukalapak, while leading strategic planning, partnerships, stakeholder engagement, and communications initiatives.She holds a Bachelor’s degree in Economics and Politics from the University of Manchester.
bio.jp: Nurshaffira氏は、マレーシア科学・技術・イノベーション省（MOSTI）傘下のCradle Fundにおいて、ASEANおよびグローバル領域のポートフォリオを統括する。マレーシアおよびASEANのスタートアップが国際市場、戦略的パートナー、成長機会へアクセスするためのイニシアチブを主導している。Cradle Fundは、助成金およびエクイティ投資の双方を通じ、初期の検証段階からスケールアップまでスタートアップを支援する。スタートアップおよびイノベーション・エコシステムにおいて8年以上の経験を有し、高いインパクトを生むプログラムの設計、国際パートナーシップの構築、創業者コミュニティの形成を通じて、持続可能な経済成長と社会的成果の創出に注力してきた。Cradle Fund参画以前には、ニューヨークを拠点とするグローバル起業家支援団体Endeavorにおいて、戦略およびマーケティング・コミュニケーション責任者を務めた。複数市場における起業家やエコシステムリーダーと密接に連携し、Careem、Carsome、Farm Fresh、Bukalapakなど国際的に評価の高いスケールアップ企業を支援するとともに、戦略立案、パートナーシップ、ステークホルダー・エンゲージメント、対外発信を主導している。英国マンチェスター大学にて経済学および政治学の学位を取得。

bio.en: Tin Chan has managed private investments for his firm for over 15 years, focusing on both fund commitments and direct deals. His investment experience spans the technology ecosystem, including biotech, artificial intelligence, robotics, semiconductors, and cleantech, with a primary focus on China and the United States under a global mandate. He actively evaluates venture and growth-stage opportunities, constructs concentrated portfolios, and partners with specialist managers to capture long-term structural trends across innovation-driven sectors.
bio.jp: チャン氏は、15年以上にわたり自社のプライベート投資を担当し、ファンド出資とダイレクト投資の双方に注力。彼の投資経験は、バイオテック、人工知能、ロボティクス、半導体、クリーンテックなど、テクノロジー領域全般に及び、グローバルな投資方針のもと、中国と米国を主な対象としている。ベンチャーおよびグロースステージの投資機会を積極的に評価し、集中型ポートフォリオを構築するとともに、専門性の高い運用者と協働し、イノベーション主導型セクターにおける長期的な構造的トレンドを捉えることに取り組む。

bio.en: Tshepo is the Managing Director of International Coverage at Absa Corporate and Investment Bank (CIB), focusing on Multinational Corporates from the United States, Europe, Middle East and Asia as well as China. Her role emphasizes global connectivity and delivering pan-African banking solutions to a global client base. The International Coverage business significantly boosts Absa Group’s financial performance, and her portfolio contributes a significant amount to Absa’s revenue. Tshepo has over 20 years accumulated experience in the Financial Services industry, where she has developed a keen specialization that spans diverse array of sectors such as Services, Hospitality, Diversification, Manufacturing, Retail, and Power Utilities in both Internationally within the Pan African region.Tshepo is passionate about banking and the development of others. She mentors junior staff and supports Banking on Women Absa CIB, empowering women within CIB. Additionally, she was also involved with Columba Leadership, an NGO that has positively impacted over 6,500 graduates across 160 schools in six provinces.From a leadership perspective, Tshepo exhibits unwavering decisiveness, upholding the highest standards of integrity and achievement for herself and her teams. Beyond her professional achievements, Tshepo is a testament to the belief that women can indeed excel in multiple roles. She is a devoted family woman who defies the notion that one must choose between career and family.
bio.jp: Tshepo氏は、Absa Corporate and Investment Bank（CIB）において、インターナショナル・カバレッジ部門のマネージング・ディレクターを務める。米国、欧州、中東、アジアおよび中国に拠点を持つ多国籍企業を担当し、グローバルな接続性を軸に、アフリカ全域に対応したクロスボーダー型銀行サービスを顧客に提供している。同部門はAbsaグループの業績に大きく貢献しており、Tshepo氏のポートフォリオも同社の主要な収益源の一つとなっている。金融サービス業界で20年以上の経験を有し、サービス業、ホスピタリティ、多角化事業、製造業、小売、電力・公益事業など幅広い分野に精通。アフリカ全域における金融に強みを持つ。人材育成にも注力しており、若手行員のメンタリングを行うほか、Absaにおける「Banking on Women」プログラムを支援し、組織内での女性のエンパワーメントを推進している。また、6州160校で6,500人超の卒業生に影響を与えてきた非営利団体Columba Leadershipの取り組みにも関与してきた。

name.en: Bureau of Digital Services, Tokyo Metropolitan Government
name.jp: 東京都 デジタルサービス局

name.en: Digital City Bureau, Seoul Metropolitan Government
name.jp: ソウル特別市 デジタル都市局

role.en: Regional Director of Innovation and Product Strategy
role.jp: Regional Director of Innovation and Product Strategy

bio.en: Sudeepto Roy is Vice President of Engineering in Qualcomm’s Government Affairs group, where he builds global innovation ecosystems at the intersection of deep tech and intellectual property. Over a three-decade career, he has helped scale hundreds of startups, trained thousands of inventors, and seeded a cross-border patent pipeline spanning on-device AI and advanced wireless systems. A patent-holding engineer and active public voice, he connects technology, policy, and developer platforms to translate frontier innovation into real-world impact.
bio.jp: Sudeepto Roy is Vice President of Engineering in Qualcomm’s Government Affairs group, where he builds global innovation ecosystems at the intersection of deep tech and intellectual property. Over a three-decade career, he has helped scale hundreds of startups, trained thousands of inventors, and seeded a cross-border patent pipeline spanning on-device AI and advanced wireless systems. A patent-holding engineer and active public voice, he connects technology, policy, and developer platforms to translate frontier innovation into real-world impact.

bio.en: Aveek Kumar Das is currently founder and CTO of Guide Robotics in Tokyo, Japan. A Ph.D. graduate from the University of Pennsylvania, Aveek is well known for his pioneering work in vision-based control of multi-robot formations. With a 12-year tenure at SRI International, he has worked on developing vision based automotive driver assist technologies leading up to the DARPA Urban Challenge, automation of bomb disposal robots, search and retrieval robots, multi-robot mapping and exploration, leading up to fully autonomous field robotic systems. In 2015, Aveek moved to the SRI Headquarters in Menlo Park as Associate Director at the Robotics Program, where he worked on developing the next generation of human robot collaboration for factory automation. Between 2016-2019, Aveek was a co-founder and CTO at area17, an SRI robotics venture developing vision-based navigation for autonomous machines operating without GPS.
bio.jp: Aveek Kumar Das is currently founder and CTO of Guide Robotics in Tokyo, Japan. A Ph.D. graduate from the University of Pennsylvania, Aveek is well known for his pioneering work in vision-based control of multi-robot formations. With a 12-year tenure at SRI International, he has worked on developing vision based automotive driver assist technologies leading up to the DARPA Urban Challenge, automation of bomb disposal robots, search and retrieval robots, multi-robot mapping and exploration, leading up to fully autonomous field robotic systems. In 2015, Aveek moved to the SRI Headquarters in Menlo Park as Associate Director at the Robotics Program, where he worked on developing the next generation of human robot collaboration for factory automation. Between 2016-2019, Aveek was a co-founder and CTO at area17, an SRI robotics venture developing vision-based navigation for autonomous machines operating without GPS.

bio.en: Yosuke Hiroki is the COO of Cear, Inc., a technology company that combines advanced acoustic technologies — including spatial audio processing and noise cancellation — with AI to optimize sound based on the environment and enhance "spatial value."At SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026, we will present Cear's demo based on the Qualcomm Dragonwing™ RB3 Gen 2, integrating spatial audio, noise cancellation, Vision AI, and original Cear products to deliver immersive, environment-responsive acoustic experiences. Cear was selected for Qualcomm's QAIPI 2025 program.
bio.jp: Yosuke Hiroki is the COO of Cear, Inc., a technology company that combines advanced acoustic technologies — including spatial audio processing and noise cancellation — with AI to optimize sound based on the environment and enhance "spatial value."At SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026, we will present Cear's demo based on the Qualcomm Dragonwing™ RB3 Gen 2, integrating spatial audio, noise cancellation, Vision AI, and original Cear products to deliver immersive, environment-responsive acoustic experiences. Cear was selected for Qualcomm's QAIPI 2025 program.

bio.en: Joshua Owoyemi is Co-founder & CEO of ModAstera, a Tokyo-based MedTech AI company building the Medical AI Engineering Agent (MAEA), a platform that automates data annotation, model training, deployment, and regulatory documentation for medical applications. He earned a PhD in Information Science from Tohoku University and spent 4+ years as an AI research engineer in biotech, where he created SmilesFormer, a language model for molecular design and optimization. At ModAstera, Joshua partners with medical researchers and device makers to compress AI development timelines from months to days while meeting healthcare compliance requirements. He focuses on turning clinical needs into deployable, compliant AI systems, fast.
bio.jp: Joshua Owoyemi is Co-founder & CEO of ModAstera, a Tokyo-based MedTech AI company building the Medical AI Engineering Agent (MAEA), a platform that automates data annotation, model training, deployment, and regulatory documentation for medical applications. He earned a PhD in Information Science from Tohoku University and spent 4+ years as an AI research engineer in biotech, where he created SmilesFormer, a language model for molecular design and optimization. At ModAstera, Joshua partners with medical researchers and device makers to compress AI development timelines from months to days while meeting healthcare compliance requirements. He focuses on turning clinical needs into deployable, compliant AI systems, fast.

bio.en: In 2023, he founded Solve AI, a subsidiary of the AI startup MoBagel. He has been involved in expanding an agentic AI builder platform in Japan, acquiring Tric Trac, a company providing affiliate marketing services, and operating the cross-border open innovation program “Solve AI Challenge.”Until 2022, he was with Orange Japan, where he launched and managed Orange Fab Asia, an accelerator program that supports Asian startups in expanding internationally by leveraging the global network of the French telecom group Orange. The program began in Tokyo in 2013 and expanded to Taipei and Seoul in 2014, supporting 239 startups across various fields including AI, IoT, and XR. In 2012, he served as a Venture Partner at Iris Capital, which Orange has shares, investing in Japanese startups.From 2002 to 2010, he worked at SunBridge Solutions, where he was engaged in IT service marketing consulting and supporting overseas startups in launching their businesses in Japan. Prior to that, he worked as an e-business consultant at Mitsui & Co. and as a consultant at Japan Management Systems.He holds an MBA from the Rotterdam School of Management in the Netherlands and graduated from the Faculty of Science and Engineering at Waseda University.
bio.jp: In 2023, he founded Solve AI, a subsidiary of the AI startup MoBagel. He has been involved in expanding an agentic AI builder platform in Japan, acquiring Tric Trac, a company providing affiliate marketing services, and operating the cross-border open innovation program “Solve AI Challenge.”Until 2022, he was with Orange Japan, where he launched and managed Orange Fab Asia, an accelerator program that supports Asian startups in expanding internationally by leveraging the global network of the French telecom group Orange. The program began in Tokyo in 2013 and expanded to Taipei and Seoul in 2014, supporting 239 startups across various fields including AI, IoT, and XR. In 2012, he served as a Venture Partner at Iris Capital, which Orange has shares, investing in Japanese startups.From 2002 to 2010, he worked at SunBridge Solutions, where he was engaged in IT service marketing consulting and supporting overseas startups in launching their businesses in Japan. Prior to that, he worked as an e-business consultant at Mitsui & Co. and as a consultant at Japan Management Systems.He holds an MBA from the Rotterdam School of Management in the Netherlands and graduated from the Faculty of Science and Engineering at Waseda University.

bio.en: Over 18 years of experience in the electronics and semiconductor industry.  Joined Qualcomm in 2025, where he focuses on driving growth in IoT and AI through customer engagement, technical business development, and go-to-market activities.
bio.jp: Over 18 years of experience in the electronics and semiconductor industry.  Joined Qualcomm in 2025, where he focuses on driving growth in IoT and AI through customer engagement, technical business development, and go-to-market activities.

role.jp: Incubation and Startup Ecosystem Support Executive Manager

bio.en: Incubation and Startup Ecosystem Support Executive Manager
bio.jp: Incubation and Startup Ecosystem Support Executive Manager

bio.en: Born in Kanagawa Prefecture in 1992. Graduated from the Department of Civil Engineering (Social Infrastructure), Faculty of Engineering, The University of Tokyo. At the University’s Institute of Industrial Science (IIS), developed new materials utilizing food waste. Having spent childhood in the Netherlands, developed an interest in solving societal challenges facing humankind, including environmental issues. Has traveled to about 70 countries worldwide; favorite city is Venice. In October 2021, co-founded Fabula Inc. with Takuma Oishi and Daiki Matsuda and became Representative Director and CEO, pursuing the valorization of underutilized resources under the vision of “Creating inspiration from waste.”​
bio.jp: 1992年神奈川県生まれ。東京大学工学部社会基盤学科卒業。同大学生産技術研究所にて食品廃棄物を活用した新素材を開発。幼少期をオランダで過ごし、環境問題をはじめ、人類社会が直面している社会課題の解決に興味を持つ。これまでに世界約70か国を旅行。最も好きな都市はヴェネツィア。2021年10月、大石琢馬氏、松田大希氏と共にfabula株式会社を設立し、代表取締役に就任。「ゴミから感動をつくる」をヴィジョンに未利用資源の価値化に取り組む。

company.jp: 株式会社 フードリボン

bio.en: As Chief Global Officer at Food Reborn, they drive cross-border partnerships and strategic growth. They have deep expertise in international business development and brand building in the lifestyle sector. After starting their career by supporting overseas brands entering the Japanese market, they went on to lead the planning and execution of global strategies. They later founded a company in the United States and established offices in Tokyo, Seoul, Hong Kong, Singapore, Manila, and Dublin. They have led cross-cultural projects and advanced multi-regional businesses. Their experience includes building international brands across food and beverage, beauty, health, and fashion, as well as developing solutions in biomedical fields and digital marketing.
bio.jp: Food RebornのChief Global Officerとして海外連携と戦略的成長を推進している。ライフスタイル領域の国際事業・ブランド開発に精通。海外ブランドの日本進出支援でキャリア開始後、国際戦略立案と展開を牽引。米国で起業し、東京・ソウル・香港・シンガポール・マニラ・ダブリンに拠点を構築。異文化プロジェクトを主導し多地域事業を推進。飲食、ビューティ、ヘルス、ファッションの国際ブランド構築、バイオメディカルやデジタルマーケのソリューション開発を担う。

bio.en: The 104th and 105th Prime Minister of Japan (Incumbent). Served as Minister of State for Innovation, Minister for Internal Affairs and Communications, and Minister in charge of Economic Security etc. At the Liberal Democratic Party, where currently serving as the 29th President, served as Chairperson of the Policy Research Council and Chairperson of the Research Commission on Public Security, Counterterrorism , and Cybercrime etc. Under the slogan “Make the Japanese Archipelago Stronger and more Prosperous ”  advancing “responsible and proactive public finances ”to strengthen comprehensive national power, and moving forward with initiatives to reinforce six pillars: diplomacy, defense, economy, technology, information, and human resources.
bio.jp: 第104代、105代内閣総理大臣（現職）。内閣府特命担当大臣（イノベーション担当他）、総務大臣、経済安全保障担当大臣などを歴任。現在、第29代総裁を務める自民党では、政務調査会長、治安・テロ・サイバー犯罪対策調査会長等を務めた。「日本列島を、強く豊かに」を掲げ、「総合的な国力」を強化するため、「責任ある積極財政」を進め、「外交力」「防衛力」「経済力」「技術力」「情報力」「人材力」の６つの力を強くしていく取組を進めている。

bio.en: At Ibex Korea, Elliott leads a corporate–startup open innovation platform that connects the Korean, Japanese, and global startup ecosystems, driving PoCs and venture creation together with leading global corporations. He brings 20 years of cross-border M&A and CVC experience at KPMG, Nissan Motor, SK Telecom, and Hyundai Motor Group, with 10+ cross-border M&A closings and 20+ equity investments to his name. He holds Distinguished Professor positions at GIST and Seoul University of Foreign Studies (SUFS) in the fields of NLP and AI, has published 10 papers in AI/NLP including in SCI-E indexed journals, and serves as a reviewer for SCI-E journals. His external engagements include membership in the World Economic Forum (WEF) Metaverse Working Group and speaking appearances at AWS re:Invent and VIVA Tech France. He also serves as a policy advisor to Korean government bodies including K-MTIE (Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy), KISED, GSVA, and Gwacheon City.
bio.jp: Ibex Koreaにて、韓国・日本そしてグローバルのスタートアップエコシステムをつなぐ大企業・スタートアップ・オープンイノベーションプラットフォームを率い、世界有数の大企業とのPoCおよびベンチャー創出を主導。KPMG、日産自動車、SK Telecom、現代自動車グループにおいて20年にわたりクロスボーダーM&AおよびCVC領域に従事し、10件以上のクロスボーダーM&A成約および20件以上のエクイティ投資を実行。GIST およびソウル外国語大学校（SUFS）において、NLP・AI分野の特任教授を務めるほか、AI/NLP分野でSCI-E収録誌を含む10本の論文を発表し、SCI-E ジャーナルのレビュアーとしても活動。対外活動としては、World Economic Forum（WEF）Metaverse Working Group メンバー、AWS re:Inventおよび VIVA Tech France の登壇実績を有する。また、韓国産業通商資源部（K-MTIE）、KISED、GSVA、果川市などの政府機関において政策アドバイザーを務める。

role.en: Head of Web3 Innovation Platform, Senior Manager
role.jp: Head of Web3 Innovation Platform, Senior Manager

bio.en: At Ibex, Tomoko leads venture creation and PoC initiatives in the AI and Web3 domains. At Antler, she led the scouting and selection of over 3,000 founders and early-stage startups, contributing to a 3× increase in applications and a 2× increase in investments in Japan. She began her career in the entertainment industry, where she spent nearly 18 years driving projects and new business development. Her background provides deep insight into the IP business, as well as the challenges faced by creators. She currently serves as an adjunct researcher at the Research Institute for Science and Engineering and Entrepreneurship at Waseda University. She holds a BA in English Language and Literature from Waseda University and an MBA from Waseda Business School.
bio.jp: IbexにてAI・Web3領域のプロジェクトにおけるベンチャー創出およびPoC支援を推進。Antlerでは、国内外3,000名以上の起業家・アーリーステージスタートアップのスカウトおよび選考を担当し、日本におけるプログラム応募件数を約3倍、投資件数を約2倍に拡大。エンタテインメント業界でキャリアをスタートし、約18年間にわたり数々のプロジェクト推進および新規事業開発に従事し、IPビジネスの知見を有する。 早稲田大学 科学技術とアントレプレナーシップ研究所 招聘研究員。早稲田大学教育学部英語英文学科卒（BA）、早稲田大学大学院経営管理研究科修了（MBA）。

bio.en: Sebastian is CTO of Midnight, where he leads the development of the world’s first fourth-generation blockchain, building next-generation infrastructure that enables both privacy and compliance. He is also Co-Founder and CTO of DCSpark, one of the leading builders in the global crypto ecosystem and Co-Founder of Paima Studios. He has led the development of products such as Flint Wallet and Milkomeda, building systems used by hundreds of thousands of users, and is driving Paima Engine as a foundational technology for Web3. He previously worked at Microsoft, contributing to AI and machine learning R&D, and has a strong track record of building and scaling global products.
bio.jp: MidnightのCTOとして、世界初の第4世代ブロックチェーンの開発を主導し、プライバシー保護とコンプライアンス対応を両立する次世代インフラの構築を推進。世界有数の暗号資産エコシステム構築企業であるDCSparkの共同創業者兼CTO、およびPaima Studiosの共同創業者として、Flint WalletやMilkomedaなどのプロダクト開発を主導し、数十万規模のユーザーに利用されるシステムを構築。Paima Studiosでは、Web3領域の基盤技術としてPaima Engineの開発を牽引。また、MicrosoftにおいてAI・機械学習分野の研究開発に従事するなど、グローバルにプロダクト開発をリードしてきた実績を持つ。

bio.en: Taro serves as Country Manager for Midnight Japan, leading go-to-market, enterprise engagement, and ecosystem growth. He brings experience across startups and global enterprises, including as co-founder of Mycel, where he led global GTM, partnerships, and operations for an interoperability protocol. Previously, he was a Global Enterprise Sales Director at LinkedIn, managing strategic relationships with major Japanese multinationals and driving complex SaaS deployments. He has also supported ecosystem growth for projects such as dYdX, SEI, EclipseFi, and Umi Network. Born in Japan and raised in Indonesia, Taro is trilingual (English, Japanese, Indonesian) and a graduate of Sophia University.
bio.jp: Midnight Japanのカントリーマネージャーとして、日本市場におけるGo-to-Market戦略、エンタープライズ対応、エコシステムの拡大を統括。スタートアップおよびグローバル企業での経験を有し、Mycelの共同創業者としては、相互運用性プロトコルにおけるグローバルGTM、パートナーシップ、オペレーションをリード。LinkedInではグローバルエンタープライズセールスディレクターとして、日本の大手企業との戦略的関係構築および複雑なSaaS導入を推進。また、dYdX、SEI、EclipseFi、Umi Networkといったプロジェクトにおいて、エコシステムの成長支援にも携わっている。日本生まれ・インドネシア育ち、英語・日本語・インドネシア語のトリリンガル。上智大学卒業。

role.en: Deputy Mayor for Sustainable Mobility and Transport
role.jp: Deputy Mayor for Sustainable Mobility and Transport

bio.en: John Gauntt is the Creative Director and Co-Founder of the Seattle AI Film Festival and Seattle Chapter President of the Applied AI Association.John’s analysis of technology’s impact on media and marketing have been featured by The Economist Intelligence Unit and eMarketer, while his public speaking on AI and strategy were featured at SXSW, Infinity Festival Hollywood, the Monaco Media Forum, and the MIT AI Film Hack.John's audio stories and AI short films have won numerous awards including two Signal Awards from the Webbys organization, Official Selection for On Air Fest, AIFilm3, Austin AI Film Festival and the Philip K. Dick Science Fiction Festival. He is a creative judge across podcast, AI Film and XR projects for The Podcast Academy, the Hainan Island International Film Festival, the Harvard XR Conference, and the MIT AI Film Hackathon.John earned advanced degrees in English Literature and Computer Information Systems from the University of Tennessee and the London School of Economics. He holds black belts in Judo, Karate and Brazilian Jiujitsu and was a competitive athlete.
bio.jp: Coming soon

bio.en: Ryoko Manabe, Managing Director, Alchemist Japan LLCRyoko is a managing director (MD) of Alchemist Japan and based in Tokyo. Before Alchemist, she worked as MD at Endeavor Japan. Endeavor is a global non-profit organization that helps build startup ecosystems all over the world. She started her career as a strategy consultant but also built experience that covers a wide range: from startup co-founder to a manager of the big corporations and from consumer goods to tech companies. Currently, she also serves as a committee member of JST START program where she evaluates and selects R&D based tech pre-seed startups.BS in Engineering, BS in Agriculture and Life Science (Dual degree) at Cornell University
bio.jp: 米系戦略コンサルティングファーム、米系製薬・医療機器会社の経営企画部での勤務を経た後、スタートアップで一部門の立ち上げを行う。 その後、PRTM (現PwC Strategy&)にてマーケティングやコンサルティングに従事した後、世界各地のスタートアップエコシステム構築を支援するNPOであるEndeavorの日本オフィスEndeavor Japanに参画、日本オフィスのプロセス構築や起業家の選出、サポートなどを行う。2023年10月よりアメリカトップのAcceleratorの一つ、Alchemist Acceleratorに参画。日本オフィスを設立し、スタートアップの海外進出をサポートしているコーネル大学工学部、農学・生命科学部卒業（Dual Degree)

bio.en: With over 25 years of experience in overseas business, he began his career in 1998, focusing on emerging markets like the CIS, Middle East and Africa. Since 2020, he is driving initiatives based on Creating Shared Value based business. He has been leveraging Japan's ODA and partnerships with global organizations like the UN to deliver digital solutions for inclusive growth and sustainable development.
bio.jp: coming soon

bio.en: Currently at Acompany, leading the development of "Acompany Secure Chat," a product designed for the secure utilization of confidential information in AI. In his capacity as a Tech PdM, he drives technical strategy and product specifications, focusing on the social implementation of secure data and AI infrastructure centered on Confidential Computing. Since joining the company in April 2025, he has played a pivotal role in the product's development and management. Previously, he graduated from the University of Tokyo’s Faculty of Engineering and completed his Master’s at the Graduate School of Information Science and Technology in 2025. His academic background includes research on processors, compilers, and data protection technologies such as differential privacy, complemented by engineering internships at various mega-ventures and startups during his graduate studies.
bio.jp: 現在、株式会社Acompanyにて、機密情報を安全にAI活用するためのプロダクト「Acompanyセキュアチャット」の開発およびTech PdMとしてプロダクトの技術戦略や仕様策定を牽引。Confidential Computing 技術を核とした、安全なデータ・AI利活用基盤の社会実装に向けた活動に従事。2025年4月の同社入社を経て、現在は同プロダクトの開発・マネジメントの主軸を担う。それ以前は、東京大学工学部電子情報工学科を卒業し、2025年に同大学大学院情報理工学系研究科電子情報学専攻修士課程を修了。在学中はプロセッサやコンパイラの研究に加え、差分プライバシー等のデータ保護技術の研究に従事したほか、大学院在学中よりメガベンチャーやスタートアップでのエンジニアインターンを経験。

company.jp: 福岡市グローバルビジネスサポート

bio.en: Shun Ono is a strategic and entrepreneurial leader based in Fukuoka, Japan, with over a decade of international experience in business development, startup ecosystem building, and cross-border partnership creation across the U.S., Europe, and Asia.He currently serves as Program Director at Fukuoka City’s Global Business Support and Project Leader at Zero-Ten Park, where he drives global expansion programs, investment pipelines, and ecosystem collaborations. Previously, he held leadership roles in energy technology, biotechnology, construction materials, and aerospace and precision manufacturing. Shun is fluent in English and Japanese, conversational in German, and frequently speaks at global startup and innovation forums.At his off times, you can find him paddleboarding around Fukuoka and/or at the local BJJ dojo.
bio.jp: 福岡を拠点に、米国・欧州・アジアで10年以上にわたり事業開発、スタートアップエコシステム構築、クロスボーダー連携に携わる戦略的リーダー。現在は福岡市グローバルビジネスサポートのプログラムディレクターおよびZero-Ten Parkのプロジェクトリーダーとして、海外展開支援プログラムや投資パイプライン、エコシステム連携を推進。これまでエネルギーテクノロジー、バイオテクノロジー、建材、航空宇宙・精密製造など幅広い分野でリーダー職を歴任。英語と日本語に堪能で、ドイツ語も会話レベルで使用し、世界各地のスタートアップ・イノベーションフォーラムで登壇している。オフタイムには福岡の海でパドルボードを楽しんだり、地元のBJJ道場に通ったりしている。

role.jp: コミュニケーション＆ブランディング ストラテジスト

bio.en: Alice BALLÉ is Communication & Branding Strategist at Ekohe Japan Ltd., a responsible intelligence integration company operating across Europe, North America, Japan, and China. She ensures Ekohe’s positioning is clearly communicated: that technology built with proactive positive intent and real accountability is what creates durable, concrete impact.
bio.jp: バレ・アリスは、欧州・北米・日本・中国を拠点とするEkohe Japan Ltd.のコミュニケーション＆ブランディング ストラテジスト。積極的な意図と真の説明責任をもって構築されたテクノロジーこそが、持続可能で具体的なインパクトを生み出すというEkoheのポジショニングを、明確に発信・浸透させる役割を担っている。

role.jp: 代表取締役CEO / 共同創業者

bio.en: A serial entrepreneur with hands-on experience across platforms, e-commerce, fintech, and gaming in the United States and Korea. After years of building ventures — some successful, some not — he closed his last company, a marketing platform in Silicon Valley, and came to Fukuoka looking for a fresh start. In 2025, he founded MenuMenu, an inbound customer acquisition platform that helps local Japanese businesses get discovered by international tourists through MEO, AI search optimization (GEO), and multilingual digital menus. He is also building Tech and Chips, a media and AI-native outsourcing project for the Kumamoto semiconductor cluster.
bio.jp: パク・シユンは、アメリカと韓国でプラットフォーム、Eコマース、フィンテック、ゲームなど多分野で起業を重ねてきたシリアルアントレプレナー。成功も失敗も経験しながら事業を続け、シリコンバレーで運営していたマーケティング事業を畳んだ後、新たな挑戦を求めて福岡へ。2025年、株式会社MenuMenuを共同創業し、MEO・AI検索最適化(GEO)・多言語メニューを統合した訪日観光客向けインバウンド集客プラットフォームを運営。並行して、熊本の半導体クラスターを対象としたメディア・AIネイティブ事業techandchipsも立ち上げている。

role.jp: ヴァイス・プレジデント

bio.en: Kikuyo began her career in investment banking at Daiwa Securities, focusing on financial advisory and capital marketstransactions. She later worked on new business development at ORIX and Japan–Taiwan cross-border projects at Taiwan’s largest commercial bank- CTBC Bank. Since August 2024, she has been a venture capitalist at CDIB Capital, Taiwan’s largest VC firm.She holds a B.A. degree from National Taiwan University.
bio.jp: 大和証券(株)にて4年間、投資銀行業務に従事し、財務アドバイザリーおよび資本市場関連取引を担当。その後、オリックス(株)における海外新規事業開発を経て、台湾最大の商業銀行である中國信託商業銀行（CTBC Bank）にて、複数の日台クロスボーダープロジェクトに携わる。2024年8月より、台湾最大手VCであるCDIBキャピタルにてベンチャーキャピタリストとして活動。国立台湾大学国際企業学部卒。

bio.en: Graduated from the Faculty of Law at Kyushu University and completed the Schwarzman Scholars Program at Tsinghua University. After working as a strategy consultant at the Boston Consulting Group, she founded Catalyst Kyushu, a general incorporated association, with the mission of “updating Kyushu.” Her work focuses on supporting startups, fostering international talent, and organizing the Asia Next Forum. As a member of the Global Shapers Community Fukuoka, she was selected for Davos 50 and attended the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting in Davos in 2025.
bio.jp: 九州大学法学部、清華大学シュワルツマンスカラーズ修了。ボストン・コンサルティング・グループで戦略コンサルタントとして勤務後、「九州をアップデートする」をミッションに一般社団法人Catalyst Kyushuを設立。スタートアップ支援、国際人材支援、Asia Next Forum開催などに注力。Global Shapers Community福岡メンバーとしてDavos50に選出され2025年ダボス会議に出席。

bio.en: coming soon
bio.jp: coming soon

company.en: Okinawa Prefecture/Department of Commerce, Industry and Labor/Industrial Policy Division
company.jp: 沖縄県 商工労働部 産業政策課

bio.en: Hajime Zakimi was born in 1972, the year Okinawa was returned to Japan, in Uruma City located in the central part of Okinawa’s main island.He joined the Okinawa Prefectural Government in 1996. Since then, he has been primarily engaged in the field of industrial promotion, working on a wide range of initiatives including expanding market channels for Awamori (a traditional Okinawan spirit), promoting traditional crafts and biotechnology-related manufacturing, formulating the prefecture’s comprehensive development plans, and implementing economic measures during the COVID-19 pandemic.He assumed his current position in April 2025.He holds high expectations for the future development of Okinawa through new initiatives centered on startups.
bio.jp: 1972年、沖縄が日本本土に復帰した年、沖縄本島中部のうるま市に生まれる。1996年に沖縄県に入庁。沖縄を代表するお酒、泡盛の販路開拓や伝統工芸、バイオなどのものづくり施策をはじめ、県の総合計画やコロナ禍における経済対策など、主に産業振興分野の業務に従事する中、2025年4月より現職に至る。　　スタートアップの新たな機軸から沖縄県の将来的な発展に期待を寄せる。

company.jp: 株式会社eiicon 地域イノベーション推進本部 地域イノベーション推進部

bio.en: Career built in corporate planning for machinery manufacturers and business support organizations. Extensive track record in launching ability-based grading systems, developing training programs, and leading the organization of B2B exhibitions and conferences for the manufacturing sector. Experienced in driving cross-industry matching in diverse sectors, including food, medical, construction, and civil engineering.Facilitates open innovation and ecosystem development in partnership with local governments and enterprises throughout Japan. Currently dedicated to building cross-sector collaboration platforms for regional revitalization.
bio.jp: 機械メーカーの経営企画部、経営支援団体を経て現職。製造業向けの資格制度立ち上げ、研修プログラム開発、カンファレンス運営、BtoB展示会などの企画・運営を長年リードし、食品・医療・建築・土木など、多くの業界のマッチング支援を推進。全国各地の自治体や地域企業と連携し、オープンイノベーションプログラムやエコシステム形成支援を展開。地域創生をミッションに、地方における産官学金の共創プラットフォーム構築を担当している。

company.en: Japan External Trade Organization (JETRO) Okinawa Office
company.jp: 日本貿易振興機構（ジェトロ）沖縄貿易情報センター

bio.en: After serving at JETRO headquarters, he joined the Okinawa Office, where he supports startups in expanding overseas and attracts international startups to the region. He is currently working to build a startup ecosystem aimed at establishing Okinawa as a global Blue Economy Hub.
bio.jp: 本部・新興国ビジネス開発課、ビジネス展開課を経て現職。沖縄事務所では、スタートアップの海外展開支援および海外スタートアップの沖縄誘致等を担当。島嶼地域でのブルーエコノミー拠点形成に向け、グローバルエコシステム構築に取り組む。

bio.en: With a background in technology, management, and policy from years in the energy sector, I now serve at Ryukyumirai, an Okinawa-based platform that drives both local government policy-making and social innovation. By connecting stakeholders across industry, government, academia, and finance, I am dedicated to evolving Okinawa’s startup ecosystem and updating the region’s industrial structure from the ground up.
bio.jp: 大手エネルギー会社や業界団体にて、技術・経営・政策の各側面からエネルギー産業の変革に長年従事。現職の琉球ミライでは、沖縄を起点に社会を動かす「プラットフォーム」として、自治体の政策立案と事業創出を両輪で推進中。産官学金のステークホルダーを繋ぎ、沖縄独自のスタートアップエコシステムを確立・深化させることで、地域から産業構造をアップデートすることに挑んでいる。

bio.en: After graduating from the University of Tasmania in Australia, I joined a comprehensive livestock manufacturer. I conducted research on coffee grounds in collaboration with the university. I became aware that a large amount of waste is produced without exception in various industries such as "livestock," "agriculture," and the "coffee industry," and that these wastes are either burned or buried without being utilized. Motivated by the desire to make use of waste and create products that meet the needs of users and society, I established Wead Co., Ltd.
bio.jp: After graduating from the University of Tasmania in Australia, I joined a comprehensive livestock manufacturer. I conducted research on coffee grounds in collaboration with the university. I became aware that a large amount of waste is produced without exception in various industries such as "livestock," "agriculture," and the "coffee industry," and that these wastes are either burned or buried without being utilized. Motivated by the desire to make use of waste and create products that meet the needs of users and society, I established Wead Co., Ltd.

company.jp: 株式会社奥村組  事業創生本部  事業開発2部  事業共創課

bio.en: In 2021, I joined Okumura Group as a new graduate. After gaining experience in the accounting department, I transferred to the New Business Development Department. I was engaged in collaboration and planning with startups and business companies, including launching projects to utilize closed schools. Subsequently, I moved to the energy-related department, where I was in charge of proposing PPA (Power Purchase Agreement) contracts and considering business opportunities related to waste utilization. Currently, my main work is the launch and operation of the in-house entrepreneurship system, and I am involved in creating new businesses by engaging both internal and external stakeholders.
bio.jp: 2021年、奥村組に新卒入社。経理部門での業務経験を経て、新規事業開発部門に異動。廃校の利活用事業の立ち上げをはじめ、スタートアップおよび事業会社との連携・企画に従事。その後エネルギー関連部署へ異動し、PPA（電力購入契約）の提案業務や、廃棄物の利活用に関する事業検討を担当。現在は、社内起業制度の立ち上げから運営までを主業務とし、社内外を巻き込んだ新規事業創出に取り組んでいる。

company.jp: 港区立産業振興センター

company.en: Resional Innovaton Promotion Office,Industry Department,Toyohashi City
company.jp: 豊橋市 産業部 地域イノベーション推進室

bio.en: after graduating from university, she worked for a food manufacturer and a cosmetics manufacturer in Aichi Prefecture, and joined the Toyohashi City Hall in 2025. Since joining the city hall, she has been in charge of supporting the development of startup companies and the creation of new businesses in the Regional Innovation Promotion Office.
bio.jp: 大学卒業後、愛知県内の食品メーカー、化粧品メーカーに勤め、2025年に豊橋市役所に入庁。入庁後は地域イノベーション推進室でスタートアップ企業の育成や新たなビジネス創出の推進支援を担当。

role.jp: 創業・承継支援係長/なし

company.jp: 株式会社LegalOn Technologies　政策企画室

role.jp: AI新規事業担当　兼職：ソフトウェア協会web3ビジネス研究会 主査

company.jp: 渋谷区　産業観光文化部　グローバル拠点都市推進課

bio.en: coming soon
bio.jp: スタートアップ・エコシステムの構築と、渋谷区における関連施策への実装を担当。書籍編集職として学校教育に携わる中で公共分野への関心を深め、まちづくり事業に従事した後、渋谷区に入区。高齢者福祉や文化分野従事を経て、Tokyo2020 組織委員会へ出向し、約8年間にわたり選手村の計画策定と運営に携わる。2022 年からは、スポーツ分野における社会課題解決に取り組み、2025年より渋谷区のスタートアップ・エコシステムに参画。イメー ジを事業へと具現化する力と、ステークホルダーとの協業・交渉に長けており、官民連携を通じて渋谷のスタートアップ施策の実現を支えている。

bio.en: Rie Kawano is the Founder and CEO of COGNITEE Inc. As a teenager, she founded and led an NPO promoting sports science, before later graduating from Keio University. She then worked at Sony in management strategy and product planning, mainly in the camera business, and was involved in global expansion initiatives at DeNA. Since founding COGNITEE in 2013, she has developed CogStructure, a patented technology in Knowledge Representation, and leads COG-SUITE, a decision-support service for corporate management used by over 400 public companies.
bio.jp: Rie Kawano is the Founder and CEO of COGNITEE Inc. As a teenager, she founded and led an NPO promoting sports science, before later graduating from Keio University. She then worked at Sony in management strategy and product planning, mainly in the camera business, and was involved in global expansion initiatives at DeNA. Since founding COGNITEE in 2013, she has developed CogStructure, a patented technology in Knowledge Representation, and leads COG-SUITE, a decision-support service for corporate management used by over 400 public companies.

role.jp: 社長執行役員 カントリーマネージャー

bio.en: Ryo joined Deel Japan Corp. (the Japanese subsidiary of Deel Inc.) in February 2025. Prior to joining Deel, he served as an Executive Officer at the Japanese subsidiary of Zoom, overseeing corporate sales for small and medium-sized enterprises. Before that, after graduating from university and working for a major domestic airline, he held positions as Sales Director for the acquiring division at a major foreign credit company, and Head of Sales at a major foreign online travel company. Subsequently, he served as Senior Vice President for the Japan, Hawaii, and Micronesia regions at a foreign startup, and as Head of Corporate Sales for SMEs at a foreign food delivery company. He is currently the Country Manager for Japan, responsible for building the local strategy and driving business growth through execution of the GTM initiative.
bio.jp: 2025年2月にDeel Japan 株式会社（Deel Inc.の日本法人）へ入社。入社以前はZoom日本法人の執行役員として中堅・中小企業向けの法人営業本部を統括。それ以前は、大学卒業後、国内大手航空会社勤務を経て、大手外資系クレジット会社で加盟店部門の営業部長、大手外資系オンライントラベル会社の営業本部長、外資系スタートアップ企業で日本・ハワイ・ミクロネシア地区のシニアバイスプレジデントを歴任。その後、外資系フードデリバリー会社で中小企業向け法人営業統括として勤務。現在は、Deel Japan 株式会社の社長執行役員・カントリーマネージャーとして、日本におけるビジネス拡大を牽引。

company.jp: 株式会社サイバーセキュリティクラウド
株式会社アストロスケールホールディングス

role.en: Senior Vice President, Global Human Resources
role.jp: 執行役員 グローバル人事本部長

bio.en: Yasutaka Asada is an Executive Officer and Senior Vice President of Human Resources at Astroscale Holdings Inc., where he leads the company’s global people and organizational strategy. He partners with senior leadership to align talent, culture, and leadership development with Astroscale’s mission of ensuring space sustainability. With extensive experience in global HR and organizational transformation, he supports the growth of a diverse, high performing international workforce.
bio.jp: アストロスケール・ホールディングスの執行役員 兼 人事シニア・バイス・プレジデントとして、同社のグローバルな人事・組織戦略を統括しています。シニアリーダーシップと連携し、「スペースサステナビリティ（宇宙の持続可能性）」の確保というミッションに向けて、人材、カルチャー、リーダーシップ開発の最適化を推進しています。グローバル人事および組織変革における豊富な経験を活かし、多様性に富んだ、高いパフォーマンスを発揮する国際的な組織の成長を支えています。

role.jp: ビジネスイノベーション部 部長

bio.en: Expertise in architectural design for large-scale redevelopments at Toda Corporation.Currently overseeing CVC and new business development within the Business Innovation Department.
bio.jp: 建築設計事務所、戸田建設建築設計統轄部で大規模再開発等の建築設計に従事。現在、CVCと新規事業開発に取組む。

bio.en: Mr.Konno is a member of the Japan-based team of SEKISUI CHEMICAL's Corporate Venture Capital (CVC).After graduating from university, he worked at a Japanese leasing company, where he was engaged in syndicated loan financing, before gaining experience in launching a CVC unit. He has been in his current role since 2024.SEKISUI CHEMICAL's CVC was established in 2016 and focuses on startup investments and business collaborations across the Residential, Advanced Lifeline, Innovative Mobility, Life Science, and Next Frontier domains.Mr.Konno is currently engaged in investment and collaboration activities with startups around the world, with a particular focus on the Residential and Robotics / Physical AI fields.
bio.jp: 紺野氏は、積水化学工業CVCチームの日本拠点メンバー。大学卒業後、日系リース会社にてシンジケートローンの融資業務に従事した後、コーポレートベンチャーキャピタル（CVC）の立ち上げを経験。2024年より現職。積水化学のCVCは2016年に設立され、レジデンシャル、アドバンストライフライン、イノベーティブモビリティ、ライフサイエンスおよびネクストフロンティアを投資領域とし、スタートアップ投資および事業連携を推進している。紺野氏は現在、レジデンシャルおよびロボティクス・フィジカルAI領域を中心に、世界各地のスタートアップとの協業や投資活動に取り組んでいる。

bio.en:
スタートアップ・エコシステムの構築、クロスボーダー事業戦略、コーポレート・イノベーション分野での経験を有するイノベーション・アクセラレーターおよびビジネスリーダーである。日本とシンガポールを軸に、スタートアップやベンチャー企業に対し、事業戦略、オペレーション、国際展開を支援している。
研究開発分野でのバックグラウンドに加え、P&GおよびJohnson & Johnsonにおけるリーダーシップ経験を有し、科学的知見と大企業における実行力を兼ね備えている。
bio.jp:
Tomotsugu Ohashi is an innovation accelerator and business leader with experience in startup ecosystem development, cross-border business strategy, and corporate innovation across Japan and Singapore.
He supports startups and ventures in business strategy, operations, and international expansion. With a background in R&D and leadership roles at Procter & Gamble and Johnson & Johnson, he brings a combination of scientific expertise and corporate execution experience.

bio.en: Makoto Saito is an attorney at law specializing in cross-border business, market entry, investment, and strategic partnerships, particularly between Japan and Singapore. He advises startups, corporates, and investors on legal and practical aspects of international expansion, including entity setup, commercial agreements, PoCs, investment structuring, and regulatory matters, supporting both structuring and execution.
bio.jp:
Makoto氏は、クロスボーダービジネス、市場参入、投資、戦略的パートナーシップを専門とする弁護士である。特に日本とシンガポールを軸とした国際展開に強みを有する。
スタートアップ、事業会社、投資家に対し、法人設立、商業契約、PoC、投資スキーム設計、規制対応など、国際展開における法務および実務の両面から助言。構想段階の設計から実行フェーズまで一貫して支援している。

bio.en:
Gang Lee is a data and AI entrepreneur and the Co-Founder & CEO of ELGO AI, with experience across public and private sectors in Singapore.
He has led initiatives in healthcare, talent analytics, and enterprise AI applications, and brings a practical founder perspective on innovation ecosystems, investment environments, and cross-border execution between Japan and Singapore.
bio.jp:
Gang Lee is a data and AI entrepreneur and the Co-Founder & CEO of ELGO AI, with experience across public and private sectors in Singapore.
He has led initiatives in healthcare, talent analytics, and enterprise AI applications, and brings a practical founder perspective on innovation ecosystems, investment environments, and cross-border execution between Japan and Singapore.

bio.en: Takumi Kawai focuses on innovation & incubation strategy, cross-border investments, ecosystem building, M&A, market entries with experience in designing and executing PoCs and international co-creation initiatives between corporates, startups, academia and governments. He also advises on corporate governance and board, linking innovation activities. With a background in government at Ministry of Economy, Trade & Industry, he serves as a Partner at Centex LLC and Gateway INC, and as Chairperson of the National University of Singapore Alumni Network Tokyo.
bio.jp:
Takumi氏は、イノベーションおよびインキュベーション戦略、クロスボーダー投資、エコシステム構築、M&A、市場参入を専門とする。企業、スタートアップ、大学、政府間におけるPoC設計・実行や国際的な共創イニシアチブの推進に豊富な実績を有する。
また、イノベーション活動と連動したコーポレートガバナンスおよび取締役会に関する助言も行っている。経済産業省での政府勤務を経て、現在はCentex LLCおよびGateway INCのパートナーを務めるとともに、National University of Singapore Alumni Network Tokyoのチェアパーソンを務めている。
